articles.title: The UCL-Lancet Commission on Migration and Health: review of the state of progress
articles.authors: Abubakar I, Tellez D, Aldridge RW, Altare C, Barreto ML, Boukari Y, Burns R, Cabieses B, et al.

abstract.text: Although progress towards implementation of international agreements since publication of the UCL-Lancet Commission on Migration and Health in December, 2018, has been slow, global trends in migration and forced displacement have continued to rise. However, the COVID-19 pandemic showed that reaching refugees and migrants with health interventions is feasible with political will. The benefits of refugee-inclusive and migrant-inclusive health-care systems during emergencies (eg, COVID-19 and the war in Ukraine) are apparent, with numerous examples of inclusive policy making being rapidly introduced and innovative models developed to support health-care access, including preventive measures such as vaccination. Lessons from these successes should be learned and incorporated into future policy and practice. However, global political and financial uncertainty and disruption-combined with multiple conflicts and natural disasters-have increased individuals' need to move, which will continue to be exacerbated by the climate crisis. Although new conflicts and exacerbations of existing ones have led to a rise in forced displacement within and across national borders, labour migration has also risen dramatically, with the pandemic highlighting the health and social needs of these groups globally. The need for strong leadership and accountability, engagement of policy makers in the highest-level fora, and improved access to quality health services for refugees and migrants has never been greater. In this Review, nearly 8 years after the UCL-Lancet Commission on Migration and Health was published, we renew our call for action to: (1) improve health-care access and optimise outcomes for refugees and migrants by emphasising health in all migration and forced displacement policies; (2) establish data systems to monitor progress, together with appropriate use of new technologies to improve access, prevent harm, and safeguard privacy; (3) support research on adaptation to and mitigation of the health consequences of climate change on refugees and migrants; and (4) renew focus on the political determinants of health outcomes for people on the move. At this pivotal moment, with geopolitical, sociodemographic, and environmental turmoil, political leaders and societies can shape a better future by leveraging the human capital of migrants and upholding the human rights and dignity of all.

articles.title: Elecoglipron, an oral small molecule GLP-1 receptor agonist in adults with type 2 diabetes (SOLSTICE): a multicentre, phase 2b, randomised, placebo-controlled trial
articles.authors: Aroda VR, Davies MJ, Maaske J, Millegård M, Juan VL, Aberle J, Ciudin A, McCrimmon RJ, et al.

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Elecoglipron is an oral, small molecule glucagon-like peptide (GLP)-1 receptor agonist currently in development for the management of type 2 diabetes. Elecoglipron is orally administered once daily with no food or fluid restrictions. SOLSTICE, a phase 2b study, evaluated the efficacy, safety, and tolerability of elecoglipron versus placebo in participants with type 2 diabetes.
abstract.textZh: Elecoglipron 是一種口服小分子胰高血糖素樣勝肽 (GLP)-1 受體激動劑，目前正在開發用於治療第 2 型糖尿病。 Elecoglipron 每天口服一次，沒有食物或液體限制。 SOLSTICE 是一項 2b 期研究，評估了 elecoglipron 與安慰劑相比對第 2 型糖尿病參與者的療效、安全性和耐受性。

abstract.label: METHODS
abstract.text: This phase 2b, randomised, double-blind, placebo-controlled trial was conducted in medical research centres and hospitals across nine countries, Canada, Germany, Hungary, Japan, Poland, Slovakia, Spain, the UK, and the USA. Sites were selected based on their capacity to fulfil protocol requirement, including, but not limited to, regulatory and ethics approvals, appropriate infrastructure and personnel, and access to the target patient population. Participants aged 18 years and older with a BMI of 23 kg/m2 or higher and type 2 diabetes (glycated haemoglobin [HbA1c] ≥7·0% to ≤10·5%, ≥6·5% to ≤10·5% in the USA) managed with diet and exercise alone or monotherapy with metformin or an SGLT2 inhibitor were enrolled. Participants were randomly assigned (3:5:3:5:3:3:6:4) via an interactive web response system to elecoglipron as oral once-daily tablets without dose escalation (5, 15, or 25 mg) or three different dose-escalation regimens, to target doses of 50 mg and 75 mg. The daily dose of 50 mg was evaluated using an every 2-week dose-escalation schedule, while 75 mg was assessed with every 2-week or every 4-week dose-escalation schedules. Participants could also be randomly assigned to placebo matched to each of the elecoglipron groups, or open-label oral semaglutide titrated to 14 mg once daily for 26 weeks. Participants, the treating physician, and the sponsor were masked to doses of elecoglipron or matched placebo, while semaglutide was open-label. The primary endpoint was percent change in HbA1c from baseline to 26 weeks. Efficacy, safety, and tolerability were assessed in all participants who received at least one dose of trial treatment. The trial is registered with ClinicalTrials.gov (NCT06579105) and clinicaltrials.eu (2024-512562-34-00) and is completed.
abstract.textZh: 這項 2b 期隨機、雙盲、安慰劑對照試驗在加拿大、德國、匈牙利、日本、波蘭、斯洛伐克、西班牙、英國和美國 9 個國家的醫學研究中心和醫院進行。地點的選擇是基於其滿足方案要求的能力，包括但不限於監管和道德批准、適當的基礎設施和人員以及接觸目標患者人群的能力。參與者年齡在 18 歲及以上，BMI 為 23 kg/m2 或更高，患有第 2 型糖尿病（糖化血紅蛋白 [HbA1c] ≥7·0% 至 ≤10·5%，在美國為 ≥6·5% 至 ≤10·5%），僅透過飲食和運動或二甲雙胍進行單一治療或 SGLT2 進行二甲雙療法治療。透過互動式網路回應系統，參與者被隨機分配（3:5:3:5:3:3:6:4），服用elecoglipron，每日一次口服片劑，無需劑量遞增（5、15或25毫克）或三種不同的劑量遞增方案，目標劑量為50毫克和75毫克。使用每 2 週劑量遞增計畫評估 50 mg 的每日劑量，而使用每 2 週或每 4 週劑量遞增計畫評估 75 mg 的每日劑量。參與者還可以被隨機分配到與每個 elecoglipron 組相匹配的安慰劑組，或開放標籤口服索馬魯肽，每日一次滴定至 14 mg，持續 26 週。參與者、治療醫生和申辦者均不接受 elecoglipron 或匹配安慰劑的劑量，而索馬魯肽是開放標籤的。主要終點是 HbA1c 從基線到 26 週的變化百分比。對所有接受至少一劑試驗治療的參與者的療效、安全性和耐受性進行了評估。該試驗已在 ClinicalTrials.gov (NCT06579105) 和 ClinicalTrials.eu (2024-512562-34-00) 註冊並已完成。

abstract.label: FINDINGS
abstract.text: From Oct 8, 2024, to June 6, 2025, 863 individuals were screened for study inclusion, 457 were excluded as they did not meet the inclusion criteria or met the exclusion criteria, 406 were enrolled and randomly assigned to one of the eight treatment groups, and 404 participants received at least one dose of trial treatment. Among those who received at least one dose of trial treatment, mean (SD) baseline characteristics were: age 58·4 years (10·7); HbA1c of 7·9% (0·9); bodyweight of 99·8 kg (22·1); and BMI of 34·9 kg/m2 (7·5). Of 404 participants, 168 (42%) of participants were female and 236 (58%) were male; 280 (69%) were White. At week 26, the mean change from baseline in HbA1c ranged between -0·91% (95% CI -1·25 to -0·58; 5 mg elecoglipron) and -1·88% (-2·23 to -1·53; 75 mg elecoglipron with every 2-week dose-escalation step) compared with -0·15% (-0·42 to 0·12) with placebo. Adverse events were reported by 63% (24 of 38 in the 5 mg group and 39 of 62 in the 15 mg group) to 87% (33 of 38 in 75 mg every 4-week dose escalation) of participants across elecoglipron doses compared with 63% (45 of 71) in the placebo group. The most common adverse events were gastrointestinal, including nausea, constipation, diarrhoea, and vomiting.
abstract.textZh: 從2024年10月8日到2025年6月6日，篩選了863名受試者納入研究，457名受試者因不符合納入標準或符合排除標準而被排除，406名受試者入組並隨機分配到八個治療組之一，404名受試者接受了至少一劑試驗治療。在接受至少一劑試驗治療的患者中，平均 (SD) 基線特徵為： 年齡 58·4 歲 (10·7)； HbA1c 為 7·9% (0·9)；體重99·8公斤（22·1）；體重指數為 34·9 kg/m2 (7·5)。在 404 名參與者中，168 名參與者（42%）為女性，236 名參與者（58%）為男性； 280 名（69%）是白人。在第 26 週時，HbA1c 相對於基線的平均變化範圍為 -0·91%（95% CI -1·25 至 -0·58；5 mg elecoglipron）和 -1·88%（-2·23 至 -1·53；每 20-05% 至安慰劑205% 20glip），而與安慰劑為 75 mg 20glip），而與安慰劑（5-05%）。服用elecoglipron劑量的參與者中，有63%（5 mg組38人中的24人，15 mg組62人中39人）至87%（每4週劑量遞增75 mg組38人中的33人）報告了不良事件，而安慰劑組的這一比例為63%（71人中45人）。最常見的不良事件是胃腸道反應，包括噁心、便秘、腹瀉和嘔吐。

abstract.label: INTERPRETATION
abstract.text: Once-daily oral elecoglipron showed reductions in glycaemia and a safety and tolerability profile consistent with the GLP-1 receptor agonist class at a similar phase of development, supporting continued development with phase 3 trials for people living with type 2 diabetes.
abstract.textZh: 每日一次口服 elecoglipron 可以降低血糖，且安全性和耐受性與處於相似開發階段的 GLP-1 受體激動劑類別一致，支持針對 2 型糖尿病患者進行 3 期試驗的持續開發。

articles.title: Elecoglipron, an oral small molecule GLP-1 receptor agonist in adults with obesity or overweight (VISTA): a multicentre, phase 2, randomised, placebo-controlled clinical trial
articles.authors: Davies MJ, Aroda VR, Rosenstock J, Capehorn M, Pedersen SD, Morizzo E, Malhotra S, Johansson PA, et al.

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Elecoglipron (AZD5004) is an oral small-molecule glucagon-like peptide-1 (GLP-1) receptor agonist administered once daily without food or fluid restriction, in development for weight management in people living with obesity or overweight and type 2 diabetes. We assessed the efficacy, safety, and tolerability of elecoglipron versus placebo in participants with obesity or overweight and at least one weight-related condition without diabetes.
abstract.textZh: Elecoglipron (AZD5004) 是一種口服小分子胰高血糖素樣勝肽-1 (GLP-1) 受體激動劑，每天給藥一次，無需限制食物或液體，旨在用於肥胖或超重和 2 型糖尿病患者的體重管理。我們評估了 elecoglipron 與安慰劑相比，在肥胖或超重且至少患有一種與體重相關的非糖尿病受試者中的療效、安全性和耐受性。

abstract.label: METHODS
abstract.text: In this double-blind, randomised, controlled, phase 2 dose-ranging study with a total treatment duration of 36 weeks, adult participants were recruited from medical research centres and hospitals in Australia, Canada, Germany, Japan, Taiwan, the UK, and the USA. Participants were aged 18 years or older living with obesity (BMI ≥30 kg/m2) or with overweight (BMI ≥27 kg/m2) with at least one weight-related condition and without type 2 diabetes. Eligible participants were randomly assigned in a 2:3:3:3:3:5 ratio to receive 5 mg, 15 mg, 50 mg, 75 mg (weekly titration), or 75 mg (every 2-week titration) of elecoglipron or matching placebo. Elecoglipron was administered as oral once-daily tablets without titration (5 mg and 15 mg) and as three different dose-titration regimens. The daily dose of 50 mg was evaluated using an every-4-weeks dose-escalation schedule, while 75 mg was assessed with weekly or every 2-week dose-escalation schedules. Participants, treating physicians, and sponsor were masked to the treatment allocation. The dual primary endpoints were percent change in bodyweight from baseline and the proportion of patients reaching at least 5% weight loss at week 26. Safety and tolerability were assessed in all participants who received at least one dose of study treatment. This trial is registered at ClinicalTrials.gov (NCT06579092) and is completed.
abstract.textZh: 在這項總治療持續時間為 36 週的雙盲、隨機、對照 2 期劑量範圍研究中，從澳洲、加拿大、德國、日本、台灣、英國和美國的醫學研究中心和醫院招募了成年參與者。參與者年齡在 18 歲或以上，患有肥胖症（BMI ≥30 kg/m2）或超重（BMI ≥27 kg/m2），且至少患有一種與體重相關的疾病，且沒有第 2 型糖尿病。符合條件的參與者以 2:3:3:3:3:5 的比例隨機分配接受 5 mg、15 mg、50 mg、75 mg（每週滴定）或 75 mg（每 2 週滴定）的 elecoglipron 或匹配的安慰劑。 Elecoglipron 以每日一次口服藥片的形式給藥，無需滴定（5 mg 和 15 mg），並以三種不同的劑量滴定方案給藥。使用每 4 週劑量遞增計畫評估 50 mg 的每日劑量，而使用每週或每 2 週劑量遞增計畫評估 75 mg 的每日劑量。參與者、治療醫師和申辦者對治療分配不知情。雙重主要終點是體重相對於基線的變化百分比以及第 26 週體重減輕至少 5% 的患者比例。對接受至少一劑研究治療的所有參與者的安全性和耐受性進行了評估。該試驗已在 ClinicalTrials.gov (NCT06579092) 註冊並已完成。

abstract.label: FINDINGS
abstract.text: From Oct 8, 2024, to Feb 18, 2025, 472 individuals were screened for potential study inclusion, 162 did not meet the inclusion criteria, and 310 participants were randomly assigned to the varied elecoglipron groups or placebo. 288 participants (93%) completed the study and 231 (75%) completed the assigned treatment. The mean age of participants was 48·4 years (SD 13·7), 225 (73%) were female, 85 (27%) were male, their mean bodyweight was 106·9 kg (SD 24·1), and their mean BMI was 38·2 kg/m2 (SD 7·2). At week 26, the estimated mean change from baseline in bodyweight was between -2·6% (5 mg elecoglipron), and -10·5% (75 mg with weekly titration steps) compared with -0·6% with placebo. The estimated proportion of participants reaching weight reductions of at least 5% at week 26 was 40·4-88·8% with elecoglipron versus 15·6% with placebo. Adverse events were reported by 84% (27 of 32) to 98% (48 of 49) of participants across elecoglipron doses compared with 84% (68 of 81) in the placebo group, the most common being nausea, constipation, diarrhoea, headache, and vomiting.
abstract.textZh: 從2024年10月8日到2025年2月18日，篩選了472名可能納入研究的個體，162名不符合納入標準，310名參與者被隨機分配到不同的elecoglipron組或安慰劑組。 288 名參與者 (93%) 完成了研究，231 名參與者 (75%) 完成了指定的治療。參與者的平均年齡為 48·4 歲 (SD 13·7)，其中女性 225 名 (73%)，男性 85 名 (27%)，平均體重為 106·9 kg (SD 24·1)，平均 BMI 為 38·2 kg/m2 (SD 7·2)。在第 26 週時，體重相對於基線的估計平均變化在 -2·6%（5 mg elecoglipron）和 -10·5%（75 mg，每週滴定步驟）之間，而安慰劑組為 -0·6%。估計在第 26 週體重減輕至少 5% 的參與者比例為 elecoglipron 組的 40·4-88·8%，而安慰劑組的比例為 15·6%。服用 elecoglipron 劑量的參與者中有 84%（32 人中的 27 人）至 98%（49 人中的 48 人）報告了不良事件，而安慰劑組的不良事件比例為 84%（81 人中的 68 人），最常見的是噁心、便秘、腹瀉、腹瀉和嘔吐。

abstract.label: INTERPRETATION
abstract.text: Daily oral elecoglipron demonstrated clinically meaningful weight reductions and a safety and tolerability profile consistent with the GLP-1 receptor agonist class in this phase 2 dose-ranging study, supporting phase 3 investigation in people living with obesity or overweight.
abstract.textZh: 在這項 2 期劑量範圍研究中，每日口服 elecoglipron 表現出具有臨床意義的體重減輕以及與 GLP-1 受體激動劑類別一致的安全性和耐受性，支持對肥胖或超重人群進行的 3 期研究。

articles.title: Perioperative serplulimab with neoadjuvant chemotherapy versus perioperative chemotherapy in PD-L1-positive gastric cancer (ASTRUM-006): a randomised, double-blind, multicentre, phase 3 study
articles.authors: Shen L, Zhang X, Ji K, Lu L, Wang Q, Guan Q, Yan S, Zhou Y, et al.

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Perioperative chemo-immunotherapy shows variable outcomes in resectable gastric or gastro-oesophageal junction adenocarcinoma. We evaluated the efficacy and safety of neoadjuvant serplulimab with S-1 plus oxaliplatin (SOX) chemotherapy followed by adjuvant serplulimab versus neoadjuvant placebo plus SOX followed by adjuvant SOX in patients with PD-L1-positive, locally advanced, resectable gastric or gastro-oesophageal junction adenocarcinoma.
abstract.textZh: 圍手術期化學免疫治療在可切除的胃或胃食道交界處腺癌中顯示出不同的結果。我們評估了新輔助serplulimab合併S-1加奧沙利鉑（SOX）化療隨後輔助serplulimab與新輔助安慰劑加SOX隨後輔助SOX在PD-L1陽性、局部晚期、可切除胃或胃食道交界處腺癌患者中的療效和安全性。

abstract.label: METHODS
abstract.text: In this randomised, double-blind, multicentre phase 3 ASTRUM-006 study, patients were screened at 75 hospitals in China and Thailand. Eligible patients aged 18-70 years with PD-L1 combined positive score (CPS) ≥5, resectable gastric or gastro-oesophageal junction adenocarcinoma were randomly assigned 1:1 to neoadjuvant serplulimab or placebo (intravenous; 4·5 mg/kg) plus SOX chemotherapy (intravenous oxaliplatin 130 mg/m2 on day 1, and oral S1 40-60 mg twice daily on days 1-14) for three cycles (cycle length 21 days), followed by adjuvant serplulimab (up to 17 cycles; serplulimab group) or SOX (five cycles; placebo group). The primary endpoint was investigator-assessed event-free survival (defined as the time from randomisation to the occurrence of progressive disease or local or distant recurrence, other new malignancies, or death), with efficacy first evaluated in PD-L1 CPS ≥10, then in the intention-to-treat (CPS ≥5) population. This study is registered with ClinicalTrials.gov, NCT04139135, and is ongoing.
abstract.textZh: 在這項隨機、雙盲、多中心 3 期 ASTRUM-006 研究中，對中國和泰國 75 家醫院的患者進行了篩檢。年齡 18-70 歲、PD-L1 綜合陽性評分 (CPS) ≥5、可切除胃或胃食道交界處腺癌的合格患者按 1:1 隨機分配至新輔助 Serplulimab 或安慰劑（靜脈注射；4·5 mg/kg）加 SOX 化療（第 1 天靜脈注射奧沙利鉑 130 mg/m/kg）加 SOX 化療（第 1 天靜脈注射奧沙利鉑 130 mg/m/1000m 2010-1000 20100m，天），持續三個週期（週期長度 21 天），然後使用輔助 serplulimab（最多 17 個週期；serplulimab 組）或 SOX（五個週期；安慰劑組）。主要終點是研究者評估的無事件存活期（定義為從隨機分組到發生疾病進展或局部或遠端復發、其他新惡性腫瘤或死亡的時間），首先在 PD-L1 CPS ≥10 中評估療效，然後在意圖治療 (CPS ≥5) 族群中評估療效。這項研究已在 ClinicalTrials.gov 註冊，NCT04139135，並且正在進行中。

abstract.label: FINDINGS
abstract.text: Between Nov 26, 2019, and April 19, 2024, 1646 patients were screened, of whom 588 patients (median age 61·0 years [IQR 55-66]; 124 [21%] female and 464 [79%] male) at 57 hospitals in China were randomly assigned to the serplulimab group (n=292) or placebo group (n=296). With a median follow-up duration of 42·7 months (IQR 24·3-53·6), median event-free survival was significantly longer with serplulimab than with placebo in the PD-L1 CPS ≥10 population (not reached [NR] vs 42·0 months; hazard ratio 0·65 [95% CI 0·47-0·90]; p=0·0082). With a median follow-up of 35·9 months (IQR 23·5-49·4), median event-free survival was also significantly longer with serplulimab than with placebo in the intention-to-treat population (NR vs 35·9 months; 0·73 [95% CI 0·56-0·94]; p=0·015). Grade 3 or worse treatment-related adverse events occurred in 136 (47%) patients in the serplulimab group and 172 (59%) patients in the placebo group; 19 (7%) and 31 (11%) patients in the respective groups discontinued treatment due to treatment-related adverse events.
abstract.textZh: 2019年11月26日至2024年4月19日期間，對1646例患者進行了篩檢，其中中國57家醫院的588例患者（中位年齡61·0歲[IQR 55-66]；124例[21%]女性和464例[79%]男性）被隨機分配到serplulimab組（n=292）或安慰劑組（n=296）。中位追蹤時間為 42·7 個月 (IQR 24·3-53·6)，在 PD-L1 CPS ≥ 10 族群中，serplulimab 組的中位無事件存活期顯著長於安慰劑組（未達 [NR] vs 42·0 個月；風險比 0·65 [95% CI 095-090% CI）。中位追蹤時間為 35·9 個月 (IQR 23·5-49·4)，在意圖治療族群中，serplulimab 組的中位無事件存活期也顯著長於安慰劑組（NR vs 35·9 個月；0·73 [95% CI 0·56-0·9415）。 Serplulimab 組中有 136 名患者（47%）發生了 3 級或更嚴重的治療相關不良事件，安慰劑組有 172 名患者（59%）發生了 3 級或更嚴重的治療相關不良事件；各組中分別有 19 名 (7%) 和 31 名 (11%) 患者因治療相關不良事件而停止。

abstract.label: INTERPRETATION
abstract.text: Neoadjuvant serplulimab plus SOX followed by adjuvant serplulimab significantly improved event-free survival and demonstrated a better safety profile compared with neoadjuvant and adjuvant SOX in PD-L1-positive, resectable gastric or gastro-oesophageal junction adenocarcinoma. Extended follow-up for the overall survival data is warranted to confirm a survival advantage of this perioperative strategy with a chemotherapy-sparing adjuvant component for this indication.
abstract.textZh: 在PD-L1陽性、可切除的胃或胃食道交界處腺癌中，新輔助serplulimab加SOX隨後輔助serplulimab顯著改善了無事件生存期，並且與新輔助和輔助SOX相比具有更好的安全性。有必要對總體生存數據進行長期隨訪，以確認這種針對該適應症使用化療輔助成分的圍手術期策略的生存優勢。

articles.title: Tafasitamab plus lenalidomide and R-CHOP versus R-CHOP for first-line treatment of patients with high-risk diffuse large B-cell lymphoma (frontMIND): a global, phase 3, randomised, double-blind, placebo-controlled trial
articles.authors: Lenz G, Trněný M, Burke JM, Nowakowski GS, Fox CP, Chiappella A, Duell J, Jeon YW, et al.

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Approximately 40% of patients with high-risk diffuse large B-cell lymphoma (DLBCL) are not cured with first-line R-CHOP (rituximab, cyclophosphamide, doxorubicin, vincristine, and prednisone or prednisolone). We aimed to investigate the addition of tafasitamab (an Fc-enhanced anti-CD19 monoclonal antibody) and lenalidomide to R-CHOP (tafa-len-R-CHOP) in patients with high-risk aggressive B-cell lymphomas.
abstract.textZh: 大約 40% 的高風險瀰漫性大 B 細胞淋巴瘤 (DLBCL) 患者無法透過一線 R-CHOP（利妥昔單抗、環磷酰胺、阿黴素、長春新鹼和潑尼鬆或潑尼松龍）治癒。我們的目的是研究在 R-CHOP (tafa-len-R-CHOP) 中添加他法西他單抗（一種 Fc 增強型抗 CD19 單株抗體）和來那度胺治療高風險侵襲性 B 細胞淋巴瘤患者。

abstract.label: METHODS
abstract.text: frontMIND is a phase 3, randomised, double-blind, placebo-controlled study conducted at 298 centres in North America, South America, Europe, and the Asia-Pacific region. Patients aged 18-80 years with previously untreated, high-intermediate-risk or high-risk DLBCL or high-grade B-cell lymphoma (HGBL) were randomly allocated (1:1), stratified by International Prognostic Index (IPI) or age-adjusted IPI and geographical region, to receive six 21-day cycles of standard R-CHOP (rituximab 375 mg/m2 intravenous on day 1, cyclophosphamide 750 mg/m2 intravenous on day 1, doxorubicin 50 mg/m2 intravenous on day 1, vincristine 1·4 mg/m2 [maximum 2 mg] intravenous on day 1, and prednisone or prednisolone 100 mg/day orally on days 1-5); patients in the tafa-len-R-CHOP group additionally received tafasitamab (12 mg/kg intravenous on days 1, 8, and 15) plus lenalidomide (25 mg/day orally on days 1-10), while those in the R-CHOP group received matching placebos. The primary endpoint was investigator-assessed progression-free survival (defined as time from randomisation to disease progression or death from any cause), analysed in the intention-to-treat population; safety was included as a secondary endpoint among all patients who received at least one dose of study treatment. The trial is registered with ClinicalTrials.gov (NCT04824092) and EUDRA-CT (2020-002990-84) and is active but no longer enrolling.
abstract.textZh: frontMIND 是一項隨機、雙盲、安慰劑對照的 3 期研究，在北美、南美、歐洲和亞太地區的 298 個中心進行。年齡為 18-80 歲、患有先前未經治療的高、中危或高危險 DLBCL 或高級別 B 細胞淋巴瘤 (HGBL) 的患者被隨機分配 (1:1)，按國際預後指數 (IPI) 或年齡調整的 IPI 和地理區域分層，接受 6 個為期 21 天的標準 R-CHOP 靜脈注射第 1 天抗靜脈注射/靜脈注射 13 月 15 天/靜脈注射抗靜脈 1 天/25 天/13 天/ 750 mg/m2，第 1 天靜脈注射阿黴素 50 mg/m2，第 1 天靜脈注射長春新鹼 1·4 mg/m2 [最大 2 mg]，第 1-5 天口服潑尼鬆或潑尼松龍 100 mg/天； tafa-len-R-CHOP 組的患者另外接受他法西 15 天； mg/kg）加來那度胺（第 1-10 天口服 25 mg/天），而 R-CHOP 組的患者則接受配對的安慰劑。主要終點是研究者評估的無惡化存活期（定義為從隨機分組到疾病進展或任何原因死亡的時間），在意向治療人群中進行分析；安全性被列為接受至少一劑研究治療的所有患者的次要終點。該試驗已在 ClinicalTrials.gov (NCT04824092) 和 EUDRA-CT (2020-002990-84) 註冊，並且正在進行中，但不再招募。

abstract.label: FINDINGS
abstract.text: Between May 11, 2021, and March 2, 2023, 1229 patients were screened, among whom 899 were randomly allocated: 448 (50%) to the tafa-len-R-CHOP group and 451 (50%) to the R-CHOP group. At the time of primary analysis (median follow-up 35·2 months [95% CI 35·0-35·4]), progression-free survival was improved in the tafa-len-R-CHOP group versus the R-CHOP group (hazard ratio [HR] 0·75 [95% CI 0·59-0·96]; p=0·0194), with 2-year progression-free survival rates of 71·1% (66·3-75·4) with tafa-len-R-CHOP versus 62·9% (57·9-67·5) with R-CHOP. Interim HR for overall survival was 0·85 (0·63-1·14). The overall rate of grade 3 or higher treatment-emergent adverse events was higher with tafa-len-R-CHOP (384 [87%] of 443) than with R-CHOP (340 [76%] of 447). Additionally, a higher rate of fatal treatment-emergent adverse events was observed with tafa-len-R-CHOP (26 [6%]) than with R-CHOP (17 [4%]). However, the number of overall deaths in the study was lower with tafa-len-R-CHOP than with R-CHOP (82 [19%] vs 97 [22%]). Based on disposition data, rates of premature discontinuation of all study drugs were similar in the tafa-len-R-CHOP group (71 [16%] of 443) and R-CHOP group (66 [15%] of 447).
abstract.textZh: 2021年5月11日至2023年3月2日期間，篩選了1229名患者，其中899名患者被隨機分配：448名（50%）分配到tafa-len-R-CHOP組，451名（50%）分配到R-CHOP組。在主要分析時（中位追蹤時間 35·2 個月 [95% CI 35·0-35·4]），與 R-CHOP 組相比，tafa-len-R-CHOP 組的無惡化存活期有所改善（風險比 [HR] 0·75 [95% CI 0·59-0·9619100% 10%） tafa-len-R-CHOP 時為 (66·3-75·4)，而使用 R-CHOP 時為 62·9% (57·9-67·5)。總存活期的中期 HR 為 0·85 (0·63-1·14)。 tafa-len-R-CHOP 組中 3 級或以上治療引起的不良事件的總體發生率（443 例中的 384 例 [87%]）高於 R-CHOP 組（447 例中的 340 例 [76%]）。此外，tafa-len-R-CHOP (26 [6%]) 觀察到的致命治療不良事件發生率高於 R-CHOP (17 [4%])。然而，在研究中，tafa-len-R-CHOP 組的總死亡人數低於 R-CHOP 組（82 [19%] vs 97 [22%]）。根據處置數據，tafa-len-R-CHOP 組（443 例中有 71 例[16%]）和 R-CHOP 組（447 例中有 66 例[15%]）提前停用所有研究藥物的比率相似。

abstract.label: INTERPRETATION
abstract.text: Progression-free survival was significantly improved with tafa-len-R-CHOP versus R-CHOP; however, the safety profile indicated increases in adverse events, including treatment-emergent adverse events leading to death, with the addition of tafasitamab and lenalidomide. Overall survival data are immature; follow-up is ongoing. Further analyses, including of circulating tumor DNA, will help to assess whether deeper molecular responses are contributing to the progression-free survival benefit observed with tafa-len-R-CHOP. Tafa-len-R-CHOP might represent a potential new first-line treatment for patients with high-risk DLBCL or HGBL.
abstract.textZh: 與 R-CHOP 相比，tafa-len-R-CHOP 顯著改善無惡化存活期；然而，安全性表明，添加他法西他單抗和來那度胺後，不良事件會增加，包括導致死亡的治療引起的不良事件。整體生存數據不成熟；後續行動正在進行中。進一步的分析，包括循環腫瘤 DNA 的分析，將有助於評估更深層的分子反應是否有助於 tafa-len-R-CHOP 觀察到的無進展生存獲益。 Tafa-len-R-CHOP 可能代表高風險 DLBCL 或 HGBL 患者的潛在新第一線治療方法。

articles.title: Management of Differentiated Thyroid Cancer
articles.authors: Hegedüs L, Wirth LJ, Tuttle RM

abstract.text: Modern risk-adapted management of thyroid cancer involves risk stratification as an active, dynamic process that begins with the detection of a thyroid nodule and continues throughout the clinical course of diagnosis, active surveillance or treatment, and follow-up. Rooted in clinicopathological staging, which can be further refined with the molecular risk characterization of the tumor, initial management plans are developed and modified over time on the basis of the natural history of the disease and the response to therapy. We present a clinical framework for therapeutic decision making that can be used to compare, contrast, and illustrate the relative risks, benefits, and patient preferences that are integral to the development of a personalized management plan. We examine examples of therapeutic decision making in active surveillance of low-risk papillary thyroid cancer, minimalist therapeutic management options for low- and intermediate-risk thyroid cancer, and systemic therapies for advanced thyroid cancer, showing how the therapeutic decision-making framework can be used to achieve informed consensus and management recommendations.
abstract.textZh: 現代適應風險的甲狀腺癌管理涉及風險分層作為一個主動的動態過程，從檢測甲狀腺結節開始，並在診斷、主動監測或治療以及隨訪的整個臨牀過程中持續進行。 植根於臨牀病理分期，可以通過腫瘤的分子風險表徵進一步完善，根據疾病的自然病史和對治療的反應，隨著時間的推移制定和修改初始管理計劃。 我們提出了一個治療決策的臨牀框架，可用於比較、對比和說明相對風險、益處和患者偏好，這些是制定個性化管理計劃不可或缺的一部分。 我們檢查了低風險甲狀腺乳頭狀腺癌主動監測中的治療決策實例，低風險和中風險甲狀腺癌的最低限度治療管理選擇，以及晚期甲狀腺癌的全身治療，展示了如何使用治療決策框架來實現知情的共識和管理建議。

articles.titleZh: 分化型甲狀腺癌的處理

articles.title: Cefazolin for Methicillin-Susceptible Staphylococcus aureus Bacteremia
articles.authors: Staphylococcus aureus Network Adaptive Platform (SNAP) Trial Group, Lee TC, Barina LA, Walls G, Goodman AL, Yahav D, Cheng MP, Bonten M, et al.

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Staphylococcus aureus bacteremia is associated with high mortality. Whether cefazolin or an antistaphylococcal penicillin should be preferred for the treatment of methicillin-susceptible S. aureus bacteremia is unclear.
abstract.textZh: 金黃色葡萄球菌菌血症與高死亡率有關。頭孢唑啉或抗葡萄球菌青黴素是否應優先用於治療甲氧西林敏感的金黃色葡萄球菌菌血症尚不清楚。

abstract.label: METHODS
abstract.text: In an ongoing international Bayesian adaptive platform trial, we conducted an open-label, randomized comparison of cefazolin with an antistaphylococcal penicillin (flucloxacillin or cloxacillin) in adult patients with penicillin-resistant, methicillin-susceptible S. aureus bacteremia. The primary outcome, which was evaluated with a hierarchical Bayesian logistic-regression model, was death from any cause within 90 days after enrollment in the platform. We assessed the posterior probability of the noninferiority of cefazolin to flucloxacillin or cloxacillin (with the criterion for noninferiority prespecified as an adjusted odds ratio of <1.2, which approximates an absolute difference in mortality of <2.5 percentage points if mortality in the antistaphylococcal-penicillin group is 15%), as well as the posterior probability of superiority (with the criterion of an adjusted odds ratio of <1.0). Secondary safety outcomes included the development of acute kidney injury within 14 days.
abstract.textZh: 在一項正在進行的國際貝葉斯適應性平臺試驗中，我們在患有青黴素抗性、甲氧西林敏感性金黃色葡萄球菌菌血症的成年患者中進行了頭孢唑啉與抗葡萄球菌青黴素（氟氯西林或氯氧西林）的開放標籤、隨機比較。使用分層貝葉斯邏輯回歸模型評估的主要結果是入組平臺後90天內任何原因導致的死亡。我們評估了頭孢唑啉對氟氯沙西林或氯沙西林非劣效性的後置概率（非劣效性標準預先指定為調整比值比< 1.2 ，如果抗葡萄球菌青黴素組的死亡率為15% ，則死亡率的絕對差異約為< 2.5個百分點） ，以及優效性的後置概率（調整比值比的標準< 1.0 ）。次要安全性結果包括14天內發生急性腎損傷。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: This domain of the ongoing trial was conducted between February 17, 2022, and August 7, 2024, by which time the criterion for noninferiority had been met. Mortality at 90 days among adults who could be evaluated was 15.0% (97 deaths among 645 patients) in the cefazolin group and 17.0% (109 deaths among 642 patients) in the antistaphylococcal-penicillin group (adjusted odds ratio, 0.81; 95% credible interval, 0.59 to 1.12; probability of noninferiority, 99.2%; probability of superiority, 89.8%). Acute kidney injury occurred in 92 of 660 patients (13.9%) in the cefazolin group, as compared with 127 of 648 (19.6%) in the antistaphylococcal-penicillin group (adjusted odds ratio, 0.67; 95% credible interval, 0.50 to 0.89; probability of superiority, 99.7%).
abstract.textZh: 正在進行的試驗的此領域在2022年2月17日至2024年8月7日期間進行，當時已達到非劣效性標準。頭孢唑啉組成人90天死亡率為15.0% （ 645名患者中有97人死亡） ，抗葡萄球菌青黴素組成人死亡率為17.0% （ 642名患者中有109人死亡） （調整比值比， 0.81 ； 95%可信區間， 0.59至1.12 ；非劣效性概率， 99.2% ；優效性概率， 89.8% ）。頭孢唑啉組660名患者中有92名（ 13.9% ）發生急性腎損傷，而抗葡萄球菌青黴素組648名患者中有127名（ 19.6% ）發生急性腎損傷（調整比值比， 0.67 ； 95%可信區間， 0.50至0.89 ；優勢概率， 99.7% ）。

abstract.label: CONCLUSIONS
abstract.text: In patients with methicillin-susceptible S. aureus bacteremia, cefazolin was noninferior to flucloxacillin or cloxacillin with respect to 90-day mortality and was associated with a lower incidence of acute kidney injury. (Funded by the National Health and Medical Research Council and others; SNAP ClinicalTrials.gov number, NCT05137119.).
abstract.textZh: 在甲氧西林敏感的金黃色葡萄球菌細菌血症患者中，頭孢唑啉在90天死亡率方面不劣於氟氯西林或氯沙西林，並且與較低的急性腎損傷發生率相關。（由國家衛生和醫學研究委員會及其他機構資助； SNAP ClinicalTrials.gov編號為NCT05137119。）

articles.titleZh: 甲氧西林敏感金黃色葡萄球菌菌血症的頭孢唑啉

articles.title: Prehospital Resuscitation with Type O Whole Blood for Trauma and Hemorrhage
articles.authors: Sperry JL, Guyette FX, Cotton BA, Luther JF, Utarnachitt RB, Kutcher ME, Daley BJ, Peetz AB, et al.

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Blood transfusion before arrival at a hospital reduces mortality from traumatic hemorrhage and shock. Whether transfusion with whole blood is more beneficial than transfusion with blood components is uncertain, as are the effects of the length of time that blood products are in storage between donation and transfusion.
abstract.textZh: 在到達醫院之前輸血可以降低創傷性出血和休克的死亡率。全血輸血是否比血液成分輸血更有益尚不確定，血液製品在捐贈和輸血之間的儲存時間長短的影響也是如此。

abstract.label: METHODS
abstract.text: In this pragmatic, multicenter, phase 3, cluster-randomized trial, we assigned 44 air medical bases in a 2:1 ratio to the use of up to 2 units of whole blood or as-indicated blood components (plasma, red cells, or both) for prehospital transfusion in trauma patients during 1-month blocks. The primary outcome was death from any cause within 30 days after randomization. An observational substudy assessed outcomes according to the storage age of whole blood.
abstract.textZh: 在這項實用的、多中心、3期、叢集隨機試驗中，我們以2: 1的比例將44個空氣醫療基地分配給最多2個單位的全血或適應的血液成分（血漿、紅細胞或兩者） ，用於創傷患者的院前輸血，為期1個月。主要結果是隨機分組後30天內因任何原因死亡。一項觀察性子研究根據全血儲存年齡評估結果。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: Of 1020 eligible patients transported to hospitals by the air bases, 715 were assigned to receive whole blood and 305 to receive blood components; 695 and 298, respectively, were included in the primary analysis. Mortality at 30 days was 25.9% in the whole-blood group and 20.5% in the component group (adjusted odds ratio, 1.24; 95% confidence interval [CI], 0.87 to 1.76; P = 0.24). No substantial between-group differences in adverse events were observed. In the observational substudy, 30-day mortality was 27.1% among 210 patients who received whole blood with a storage age of 15 to 21 days and 26.4% among 443 patients who received whole blood with a storage age of 1 to 14 days (adjusted odds ratio, 0.99; 95% CI, 0.74 to 1.32).
abstract.textZh: 在空軍基地運送到醫院的1020名合格患者中， 715名被分配接受全血， 305名接受血液成分； 695名和298名分別被納入主要分析。全血組和成分組在30天時的死亡率分別為25.9%和20.5% （調整比值比， 1.24 ； 95%置信區間[CI] ， 0.87至1.76 ； P = 0.24 ）。未觀察到不良事件組間的顯著差異。在觀察子研究中， 210名接受儲存年齡為15至21天的全血的患者中， 30天死亡率為27.1% ， 443名接受儲存年齡為1至14天的全血的患者中， 30天死亡率為26.4% （調整比值比， 0.99 ； 95% CI ， 0.74至1.32 ）。

abstract.label: CONCLUSIONS
abstract.text: In injured patients with hemorrhagic shock, the use of whole blood for prehospital transfusion did not result in lower 30-day mortality than the use of blood components. (Funded by the Defense Health Agency Research Technology Portfolio Management, Combat Casualty Portfolio; TOWAR ClinicalTrials.gov number, NCT04684719.).
abstract.textZh: 在受傷的出血性休克患者中，使用全血進行院前輸血並沒有導致比使用血液成分更低的30天死亡率。（由國防衛生局研究技術組合管理，戰鬥傷亡組合資助; TOWAR ClinicalTrials.gov編號， NCT04684719。）。

articles.titleZh: O型全血院前復甦治療創傷和出血

articles.title: Endovascular Therapy for Post-Thrombotic Syndrome - A Randomized Trial
articles.authors: Vedantham S, Kahn SR, Marston WA, Weinberg I, Sista AK, Magnuson EA, Cohen DJ, Wasan SM, et al.

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Post-thrombotic syndrome is common after deep-vein thrombosis and can cause severe symptoms involving the limbs that impair patients' activity and quality of life. Endovascular therapy can eliminate chronic venous obstruction and is hypothesized to reduce the severity of post-thrombotic syndrome.
abstract.textZh: 血栓後綜合症在深靜脈血栓形成後很常見，可能會導致涉及四肢的嚴重症狀，從而損害患者的活動和生活質量。血管內療法可以消除慢性靜脈阻塞，並被假設為減輕血栓後綜合徵的嚴重程度。

abstract.label: METHODS
abstract.text: We randomly assigned 225 patients with moderate or severe post-thrombotic syndrome and imaging-confirmed iliac-vein obstruction to receive endovascular therapy (iliac-vein stent placement and enhanced antithrombotic therapy) plus standard post-thrombotic syndrome care or standard post-thrombotic syndrome care alone. The severity of post-thrombotic syndrome at 6 months (the primary outcome) was assessed with the validated Venous Clinical Severity Score (VCSS) tool (scores range from 0 to 30, with higher scores indicating more severe post-thrombotic syndrome) by evaluators who were unaware of the group assignments. Key secondary outcomes included venous disease-specific and overall quality of life.
abstract.textZh: 我們隨機分配了225名患有中度或重度血栓後綜合徵和影像學確認的髂靜脈阻塞的患者接受血管內治療（髂靜脈支架置入和加強抗血栓治療）加上標準的血栓後綜合徵護理或單獨的標準血栓後綜合徵護理。使用經過驗證的靜脈臨牀嚴重程度評分（ VCSS ）工具（評分範圍從0到30 ，評分越高表明血栓後綜合徵越嚴重）評估6個月時的血栓後綜合徵（主要結果）的嚴重程度，評估者不知道組分配。關鍵次要結果包括靜脈疾病特異性和整體生活質量。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: At 6 months, the severity of post-thrombotic syndrome was lower in the endovascular-therapy group than in the no-endovascular-therapy group (mean [±SD] VCSS, 8.1±5.1 vs. 10.0±4.9; adjusted difference, -2.0; P = 0.001). Venous disease-specific quality of life as assessed with the Venous Insufficiency Epidemiological and Economic Study Quality of Life questionnaire was better in the endovascular-therapy group than in the no-endovascular-therapy group at 6 months (adjusted difference, 14.5 points; P<0.001), as was overall quality of life as assessed with the Medical Outcomes Study 36-Item Short-Form Health Status Survey physical component summary score (adjusted difference, 6.1 points; P<0.001); scores on both tools range from 0 to 100. Through 6 months, bleeding was more common in the endovascular-therapy group than in the no-endovascular-therapy group (in 11.6% vs. 3.6% of the patients; P = 0.03).
abstract.textZh: 在6個月時，血管內治療組的血栓後綜合徵嚴重程度低於非血管內治療組（平均[± SD] VCSS ， 8.1 ± 5.1對比10.0 ± 4.9 ；校正差異， -2.0 ； P = 0.001 ）。使用靜脈功能不全流行病學和經濟研究生活質量問卷評估的靜脈疾病特異性生活質量在6個月時，血管內治療組比非血管內治療組更好（調整後差異， 14.5分； P < 0.001 ） ，使用醫學結果研究36項短期健康狀況調查的整體生活質量總分（調整後差異， 6.1分； P < 0.001 ） ；兩種工具的評分範圍從0到100。通過6個月，血管內治療組比非血管內治療組更常見出血（ 11.6 ％對3.6 ％的患者； P = 0.03 ）。

abstract.label: CONCLUSIONS
abstract.text: Among patients with moderate or severe post-thrombotic syndrome and iliac-vein obstruction, endovascular therapy led to less severe post-thrombotic syndrome and better health-related quality of life than standard care over a 6-month period but with a higher risk of bleeding. (Funded by the National Heart, Lung, and Blood Institute and others; C-TRACT ClinicalTrials.gov number, NCT03250247.).
abstract.textZh: 在患有中度或重度血栓後綜合徵和髂靜脈阻塞的患者中，與標準護理相比，血管內治療在6個月內導致較不嚴重的血栓後綜合徵和較好的健康相關生活質量，但出血風險較高。（由國家心臟、肺和血液研究所及其他機構資助； C-TRACT ClinicalTrials.gov編號， NCT03250247。）。

articles.titleZh: 血栓後綜合症的血管內治療-一項隨機試驗

articles.title: Prehospital Whole Blood in Traumatic Hemorrhage - A Randomized Controlled Trial
articles.authors: Smith JE, Cardigan R, Sanderson E, Silsby L, Rourke C, Barnard EBG, Basham P, Antonacci G, et al.

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Whole-blood transfusion has recently gained favor in the management of severe hemorrhage; however, data from large clinical trials evaluating its clinical effectiveness and safety are lacking.
abstract.textZh: 全血輸血最近在嚴重出血的處理中獲得青睞；然而，缺乏來自評估其臨牀有效性和安全性的大型臨牀試驗的數據。

abstract.label: METHODS
abstract.text: We conducted a pragmatic, phase 3, multicenter, unblinded, randomized, superiority trial across 10 air ambulance services in England. Patients with major traumatic hemorrhage who were attended by a participating air ambulance service were randomly assigned to receive either whole-blood transfusion (up to 2 units) or standard care with blood components (up to 2 units each of red cells and plasma) before arrival at the hospital. The primary outcome was a composite of death from any cause or massive transfusion (≥10 units of blood components or products) within 24 hours after randomization.
abstract.textZh: 我們在英國的10個空中救護服務中進行了一項務實的、3期、多中心、非盲、隨機、優越性試驗。在到達醫院之前，由參與空中救護服務的嚴重創傷性出血患者被隨機分配接受全血輸血（最多2單位）或含有血液成分的標準護理（每個紅細胞和血漿最多2單位）。主要結果是隨機分組後24小時內因任何原因或大規模輸血（ ≥ 10單位的血液成分或產品）而死亡的綜合結果。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: A total of 942 patients underwent randomization. After the exclusion of participants with nontraumatic hemorrhage or traumatic cardiac arrest, 616 were included in the analysis (314 in the whole-blood group and 302 in the standard-care group). A primary-outcome event occurred in 48.7% of the participants in the whole-blood group and in 47.7% of those in the standard-care group (relative risk, 1.02; 95% confidence interval, 0.80 to 1.31; P = 0.84). The incidence of death from any cause at all time points, massive transfusion, and other secondary outcomes appeared to be similar in the two groups. Prothrombin times were above the normal range in 40.7% of the participants in the whole-blood group and in 30.5% of those in the standard-care group. More serious adverse events occurred in the standard-care group than in the whole-blood group (37 and 31, respectively). The incidence of thrombotic events appeared to be similar in the two groups.
abstract.textZh: 共有942名患者接受了隨機分組。排除非創傷性出血或創傷性心臟驟停的參與者後， 616人被納入分析（全血組314人，標準護理組302人）。主要結局事件發生在全血組的48.7%參與者和標準護理組的47.7%參與者中（相對風險， 1.02 ； 95%置信區間， 0.80至1.31 ； P = 0.84 ）。在任何時間點，任何原因導致的死亡發生率、大規模輸血和其他次要結果在兩組中似乎相似。全血組參與者的凝血酶原時間高於正常範圍40.7% ，標準護理組參與者的凝血酶原時間高於正常範圍30.5%。標準護理組比全血組發生更嚴重的不良事件（分別為37和31 ）。兩組的血栓事件發生率似乎相似。

abstract.label: CONCLUSIONS
abstract.text: Among participants with life-threatening hemorrhage, prehospital transfusion of 2 units of whole blood was not superior to standard care in reducing the risk of death or massive transfusion within 24 hours. (Funded by NHS Blood and Transplant and others; ISRCTN Registry number, ISRCTN23657907.).
abstract.textZh: 在患有危及生命的出血的參與者中，院前輸注2單位全血在24小時內降低死亡或大規模輸血風險方面並不優於標準護理。（由NHS血液和移植等資助； ISRCTN註冊號碼， ISRCTN23657907。）。

articles.titleZh: 院前創傷性出血中的全血-一項隨機對照試驗

articles.title: Eczema, acne, and psoriasis in people with skin of colour: a qualitative UK-based study
articles.authors: Hutchison EJ, Parslow RM, Wainman HE, Ridd MJ

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Inflammatory dermatoses have a varied prevalence and appearance in diverse skin tones. The underrepresentation of people with skin of colour in medical education and clinical trials is widely acknowledged. However, there has been limited research on experiences from a patient perspective.
abstract.textZh: 炎症性皮膚病在不同的膚色中具有不同的患病率和外觀。在醫學教育和臨牀試驗中，有色人種的代表性不足是廣泛公認的。然而，從患者的角度來看，對經驗的研究有限。

abstract.label: AIM
abstract.text: To explore the experiences of eczema, acne, and psoriasis in adults with skin of colour in the UK.
abstract.textZh: 探索英國有色皮膚成人患濕疹、痤瘡和牛皮癬的經驗。

abstract.label: DESIGN AND SETTING
abstract.text: This was a qualitative study of 20 people in the UK with eczema, acne, and psoriasis and skin of colour, recruited using online methods.
abstract.textZh: 這是一項針對英國20名患有濕疹、痤瘡、牛皮癬和彩色皮膚的人進行的定性研究，使用線上方法招募。

abstract.label: METHOD
abstract.text: Participants took part in online, one-to-one, semi-structured interviews. NVivo qualitative data analysis software was used to code and organise the data. Reflexive thematic analysis was used to generate themes using an iterative approach.
abstract.textZh: 參與者參加了線上、一對一、半結構化的訪談。使用NVivo定性數據分析軟件對數據進行編碼和組織。反身主題分析被用於使用迭代方法產生主題。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: Participants were mostly female (65%, 13/20), Asian/Asian British ethnicity (45%, 9/20), and had eczema (55%, 11/20). We identified eight themes: delayed or missed diagnosis; preferences regarding healthcare professionals; lack of online information and social media use; misunderstanding in cultural communities; concerns about treatment and lack of research in skin of colour; complementary medicine use; experiences and impact of dyspigmentation; and challenges with structural racism.
abstract.textZh: 參與者多為女性(65% ， 13/20)、亞裔/亞裔英國人(45% ， 9/20) ，並有濕疹(55% ， 11/20)。我們確定了八個主題：延遲或錯過診斷；對醫療保健專業人員的偏好；缺乏線上資訊和社交媒體使用；文化社區中的誤解；對治療的擔憂和缺乏對有色皮膚的研究；補充藥物的使用；色素紊亂的經驗和影響；以及結構性種族主義的挑戰。

abstract.label: CONCLUSION
abstract.text: The themes generated highlight the unique experiences and challenges faced by UK adults with eczema, acne, and psoriasis. The findings can help guide diagnostic approaches, culturally sensitive communication, and treatment discussions for patients with skin of colour. Further research is needed in this underrepresented group.
abstract.textZh: 產生的主題突出了英國成年人患有濕疹、痤瘡和牛皮癬的獨特經驗和面臨的挑戰。這些發現可以幫助指導有色皮膚患者的診斷方法、文化敏感的溝通和治療討論。在這個代表性不足的羣體中，還需要進一步的研究。

articles.titleZh: 有色皮膚患者的濕疹、痤瘡和牛皮癬：一項基於英國的定性研究

articles.title: Bispecific Antibody Ivonescimab Added to Chemotherapy in EGFR-Variant Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer: The HARMONi-A Randomized Clinical Trial
articles.authors: HARMONi-A Study Investigators, Fang W, Zhao Y, Luo Y, Yang R, Huang Y, He Z, Zhao H, et al.

abstract.label: IMPORTANCE
abstract.text: Patients with epidermal growth factor receptor (EGFR) gene variant nonsquamous non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) who have disease progression after prior EGFR tyrosine kinase inhibitor (TKI) therapy have limited treatment options, creating a need for more effective subsequent therapies.
abstract.textZh: 表皮生長因子受體(EGFR)基因變異的非扁平非小細胞肺癌(NSCLC)患者，在既往EGFR酪氨酸激酶抑制劑(TKI)治療後疾病進展，治療選擇有限，需要更有效的後續治療。

abstract.label: OBJECTIVE
abstract.text: To provide final overall results of a trial assessing whether adding ivonescimab (a bispecific antibody targeting programmed cell death protein 1 and vascular endothelial growth factor) to chemotherapy improves overall survival in this population.
abstract.textZh: 提供一項試驗的最終整體結果，評估在化療中加入ivonescimab （一種針對程序性細胞死亡蛋白1和血管內皮生長因子的雙特異性抗體）是否能改善該族羣的整體存活率。

abstract.label: DESIGN, SETTING, AND PARTICIPANTS
abstract.text: Randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled phase 3 trial conducted at 55 sites in China. From January 25 to November 2, 2022, a total of 322 adult patients with locally advanced or metastatic EGFR-variant nonsquamous NSCLC who had received prior EGFR-TKI therapy were enrolled. The data cutoff date was April 12, 2025.
abstract.textZh: 在中國55個研究中心進行的隨機、雙盲、安慰劑對照3期試驗。從2022年1月25日至11月2日，共招募了322名既往接受過EGFR-TKI治療的局部晚期或轉移性EGFR變異性非鱗狀NSCLC成人患者。數據截止日期爲2025年4月12日。

abstract.label: INTERVENTIONS
abstract.text: Patients were randomized 1:1 to receive ivonescimab (20 mg/kg; n = 161) or placebo (n = 161) plus chemotherapy with pemetrexed and carboplatin once every 3 weeks for 4 cycles, followed by maintenance therapy.
abstract.textZh: 患者以1: 1的比例隨機接受ivonescimab （ 20 mg/kg ； n = 161 ）或安慰劑（ n = 161 ）加培美曲塞和卡鉑化療，每3週一次，共4個週期，然後進行維持治療。

abstract.label: MAIN OUTCOMES AND MEASURES
abstract.text: This final results report focuses on overall survival, the key secondary end point, tested in a hierarchical manner (the primary end point was progression-free survival assessed by an independent radiology review committee).
abstract.textZh: 這份最終結果報告著重於總生存期，即關鍵次要終點，以分層方式進行測試（主要終點是由獨立放射學審查委員會評估的無惡化生存期）。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: The 322 enrolled patients had a median age of 59.4 years, and 51.6% were female. During a median follow-up of 32.5 months, ivonescimab plus chemotherapy improved overall survival compared with chemotherapy alone (median survival, 16.8 months vs 14.1 months; stratified hazard ratio, 0.74; 95% CI, 0.58-0.95; P = .02). The absolute difference in median overall survival was 2.7 months. Estimated 30-month survival rates were 29.1% (95% CI, 22.1%-36.4%) with ivonescimab and 18.4% (95% CI, 12.8%-24.8%) with placebo. Grade 3 or higher treatment-emergent adverse events occurred in 67.1% and 54.7% of patients receiving ivonescimab and placebo, respectively.
abstract.textZh: 322名入組患者的中位年齡為59.4歲， 51.6%為女性。在32.5個月的中位隨訪期間， ivonescimab加化療與單獨化療相比改善了總生存期（中位生存期， 16.8個月對14.1個月；分層風險比， 0.74 ； 95% CI ， 0.58-0.95 ； P = 0.02 ）。總生存期中位數的絕對差異為2.7個月。使用ivonescimab的預估30個月生存率為29.1% （ 95% CI ， 22.1% -36.4% ） ，使用安慰劑的預估30個月生存率為18.4% （ 95% CI ， 12.8% -24.8% ）。接受ivonescimab和安慰劑的患者分別有67.1%和54.7%發生3級或以上治療中出現的不良事件。

abstract.label: CONCLUSIONS AND RELEVANCE
abstract.text: Ivonescimab plus chemotherapy provided a statistically significant and clinically meaningful improvement in overall survival with an acceptable safety profile in patients with EGFR-variant NSCLC after EGFR-TKI therapy.
abstract.textZh: 在EGFR-TKI治療後的EGFR變異性NSCLC患者中， Ivonescimab加化療在總生存期方面提供了具有統計學意義和臨牀意義的改善，具有可接受的安全性。

abstract.label: TRIAL REGISTRATION
abstract.text: ClinicalTrials.gov Identifier: NCT05184712.
abstract.textZh: ClinicalTrials.gov識別碼： NCT05184712。

articles.titleZh: 在EGFR變種非小細胞肺癌化療中加入雙特異性抗體Ivonescimab ： HARMONi-A隨機臨牀試驗

articles.title: Prone Positioning in Infants With Acute Bronchiolitis: The PROPOSITIS Randomized Clinical Trial
articles.authors: Baudin F, Pouyau R, Subtil F, Jarrasse C, Tochon M, Afanetti M, Milési C, Piloquet JE, et al.

abstract.label: IMPORTANCE
abstract.text: Prone positioning has been shown to improve respiratory mechanics and oxygenation, but its clinical benefit in infants with acute viral bronchiolitis receiving high-flow nasal cannula (HFNC) support remains unknown.
abstract.textZh: 俯臥位已被證明可以改善呼吸力學和氧合作用，但其對接受高流量鼻插管（ HFNC ）支撐的急性病毒性細支氣管炎嬰兒的臨牀益處仍然未知。

abstract.label: OBJECTIVE
abstract.text: To investigate whether prone positioning in infants with moderate to severe acute bronchiolitis and HFNC support reduces escalation to noninvasive or invasive ventilation.
abstract.textZh: 研究患有中度至重度急性細支氣管炎和HFNC支持的嬰兒傾向性定位是否可以減少升級為非侵入性或侵入性通氣。

abstract.label: DESIGN, SETTING, AND PARTICIPANTS
abstract.text: Multicenter, randomized, open-label trial conducted in 15 pediatric intermediate or intensive care units in France. Infants aged 6 months or younger admitted for 24 hours or less with a diagnosis of acute bronchiolitis with moderate to severe respiratory distress requiring HFNC support were enrolled between January 2021 and November 2023 and followed up until hospital discharge (last patient discharged on December 11, 2023).
abstract.textZh: 在法國15個兒科中級或重症監護病房進行的多中心、隨機、開放標籤試驗。在2021年1月至2023年11月期間，入院24小時或以下且診斷為急性細支氣管炎且需要HFNC支持的中度至重度呼吸窘迫的嬰兒被招募，並隨訪至出院（最後一位患者於2023年12月11日出院）。

abstract.label: INTERVENTIONS
abstract.text: Participants were randomly assigned to the prone position (n = 221) or supine position (n = 230). Infants in the prone position group received prone positioning for 24 hours or longer during the first 48 hours. All participants received standardized HFNC support at 2 L/kg/min.
abstract.textZh: 參與者被隨機分配到俯臥位（ n = 221 ）或仰臥位（ n = 230 ）。俯臥姿勢組的嬰兒在前48小時內接受了24小時或更長時間的俯臥姿勢。所有參與者均接受2 L/kg/min的標準化HFNC支援。

abstract.label: MAIN OUTCOMES AND MEASURES
abstract.text: The primary outcome was the need for escalation of care to noninvasive or invasive ventilation within the first 72 hours, according to prespecified criteria. Secondary outcomes included treatment failure, determined by an independent clinical adjudication committee; tolerance of prone positioning; length of hospital stay; duration of respiratory support; infant comfort; and adverse events.
abstract.textZh: 主要結果是根據預先規定的標準，需要在前72小時內將護理升級為非侵入性或侵入性通氣。次要結果包括由獨立臨牀裁定委員會決定的治療失敗；俯臥位耐受性；住院時間；呼吸支持持續時間；嬰兒舒適度；和不良事件。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: Among 451 infants randomized, 446 were included in the primary analysis (median age, 41 [IQR, 19-72] days; 54% male). Escalation of care occurred in 80 infants (17.9%), with no significant difference between the prone position (33/220 [15.0%]) and supine position (47/226 [20.8%]) groups (adjusted odds ratio, 0.66 [95% CI, 0.40-1.07]; P = .09). Secondary outcomes did not differ significantly between the 2 groups. In the safety analysis, serious adverse events occurred in 2 of 180 infants (1.1%) in the prone position group and 2 of 264 (0.8%) in the supine position group.
abstract.textZh: 在隨機分配的451名嬰兒中， 446名被納入主要療效分析（中位年齡， 41 [IQR ， 19-72]天； 54%為男性）。80名嬰兒（ 17.9 ％ ）發生護理升級，俯臥位（ 33/220 [15.0 ％] ）和仰臥位（ 47/226 [20.8 ％] ）組之間沒有顯著差異（調整比值比， 0.66 [95 ％ CI ， 0.40-1.07]; P = 0.09 ）。兩組之間的次要結果沒有顯著差異。在安全性分析中，俯臥位組180名嬰兒中有2名（ 1.1% ）發生嚴重不良事件，仰臥位組264名嬰兒中有2名（ 0.8% ）發生嚴重不良事件。

abstract.label: CONCLUSIONS AND RELEVANCE
abstract.text: Prone positioning in infants with moderate to severe bronchiolitis receiving HFNC support did not significantly reduce escalation of care. However, the wide 95% confidence interval around the observed odds ratio suggests that this study was not definitive and further research is warranted.
abstract.textZh: 接受HFNC支持的中度至重度細支氣管炎嬰兒的俯臥位並未顯著減少護理升級。然而，圍繞觀察到的優勢比的寬95%置信區間表明，這項研究並不明確，需要進一步研究。

abstract.label: TRIAL REGISTRATION
abstract.text: ClinicalTrials.gov Identifier: NCT03976895.
abstract.textZh: ClinicalTrials.gov識別碼： NCT03976895。

articles.titleZh: 急性細支氣管炎嬰兒的俯臥位： PROPOSITIS隨機臨牀試驗

articles.title: Cost-Effectiveness of Pharmacologic Treatments in Adults With Overweight or Obesity: A Systematic Review for the American College of Physicians
articles.authors: Jenniskens K, Huis In 't Veld LF, Lokerse ME, Idema DL, Kusters MPT, van der Braak K, Spijker R, Vernooij RWM, et al.

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: A comprehensive overview of the cost-effectiveness of pharmacologic treatments for overweight or obesity is lacking.
abstract.textZh: 目前缺乏對超重或肥胖藥物治療的成本效益的全面概述。

abstract.label: PURPOSE
abstract.text: To evaluate cost-effectiveness of pharmacologic treatments in adults with overweight or obesity in a U.S. setting.
abstract.textZh: 評估美國超重或肥胖成人藥物治療的成本效益。

abstract.label: DATA SOURCES
abstract.text: MEDLINE, Embase, and economic databases, searched on 13 October 2025.
abstract.textZh: MEDLINE、Embase 和經濟資料庫，檢索日期：2025 年 10 月 13 日。

abstract.label: STUDY SELECTION
abstract.text: Non-industry-sponsored U.S. trial-based and model-based cost-effectiveness evaluations of pharmacologic treatments in adults with overweight or obesity.
abstract.textZh: 美國非產業贊助的基於試驗和模型的對超重或肥胖成人藥物治療的成本效益評估。

abstract.label: DATA EXTRACTION
abstract.text: Data on clinical characteristics, economic characteristics (for example, model type), and study outcomes were extracted by one reviewer and verified by a second reviewer. Study quality was assessed using the CHEQUE (Criteria for Health Economic Quality Evaluation) tool; value was assessed using incremental cost-effectiveness ratios (ICERs), with thresholds for high value (<$100 000 per quality-adjusted life-year [QALY], or dominant), intermediate value ($100 000 to $200 000 per QALY), low value (>$200 000 per QALY), and no value (strict or extended dominance, or less costly and less effective); and certainty of evidence was assessed using the GRADE (Grading of Recommendations Assessment, Development and Evaluation) approach.
abstract.textZh: 有關臨床特徵、經濟特徵（例如模型類型）和研究結果的數據由一名評審員提取，並由另一名評審員驗證。使用CHECK（衛生經濟品質評估標準）工具評估研究品質；使用增量成本效益比 (ICER) 評估價值，其中高價值閾值（每個品質調整生命年 [QALY]<100 000 美元，或占主導地位）、中位數（每個 QALY 100 000 美元至 20000000 美元（美元）和無價值（嚴格或擴展主導，或成本較低）且效果較差）；證據的確定性採用 GRADE（建議評估、制定和評估分級）方法進行評估。

abstract.label: DATA SYNTHESIS
abstract.text: Four out of 9 included studies were at low risk of bias. None of the 42 pairwise comparisons that were reported had high certainty. In the 6 studies with moderate certainty, liraglutide had low value and phentermine-topiramate and tirzepatide had high value when each was compared with lifestyle modification. Semaglutide had low value compared with naltrexone-bupropion and phentermine-topiramate and high value compared with liraglutide.
abstract.textZh: 9 篇納入研究中有 4 篇具有低偏倚風險。所報告的 42 項配對比較中沒有一項具有高確定性。在 6 項中等確定性研究中，與生活方式改變進行比較時，利拉魯肽的價值較低，芬特明-托吡酯和替澤帕肽的價值較高。索馬魯肽與納曲酮-安非他酮和芬特明-托吡酯相比價值較低，與利拉魯肽相比價值較高。

abstract.label: LIMITATIONS
abstract.text: All studies were model-based. ICERs were not reported for all potential treatment comparisons. Most studies had incomplete reporting or were at high risk of bias.
abstract.textZh: 所有研究都是基於模型的。沒有報告所有潛在治療比較的 ICER。大多數研究的報告不完整或有很高的偏倚風險。

abstract.label: CONCLUSION
abstract.text: Current evidence on cost-effectiveness of pharmacologic treatment of overweight or obesity is hampered by poor-quality studies, limiting the ability to draw conclusions.
abstract.textZh: 目前關於超重或肥胖藥物治療成本效益的證據受到低品質研究的阻礙，限制了結論的能力。

abstract.label: PRIMARY FUNDING SOURCE
abstract.text: American College of Physicians. (PROSPERO: CRD42023491646).
abstract.textZh: 美國內科醫師學會。 （普洛斯彼羅：CRD42023491646）。

articles.titleZh: 超重或肥胖成人藥物治療的成本效益：美國醫師學會的系統性評價

articles.title: Benefits and Harms of Pharmacologic Treatments in Adults With Overweight or Obesity: A Living Systematic Review and Network Meta-analysis for the American College of Physicians
articles.authors: Damen JAA, Idema DL, Vernooij RWM, Huis In 't Veld LF, Kusters MPT, Lokerse ME, de Kanter E, Spijker R, et al.

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Overweight and obesity are closely linked to diseases such as type 2 diabetes, coronary heart disease, and stroke and have been shown to increase mortality risk.
abstract.textZh: 超重和肥胖與第2型糖尿病、冠狀動脈心臟病和中風等疾病密切相關，並已被證明會增加死亡風險。

abstract.label: PURPOSE
abstract.text: To conduct a living systematic review of pharmacologic treatments for weight management in overweight or obesity in adults.
abstract.textZh: 對成人超重或肥胖的體重管理藥物治療進行即時系統性回顧。

abstract.label: DATA SOURCES
abstract.text: MEDLINE and Cochrane Central Register of Controlled Trials until October 2025.
abstract.textZh: MEDLINE 和 Cochrane 對照試驗中央註冊庫截至 2025 年 10 月。

abstract.label: STUDY SELECTION
abstract.text: Randomized controlled trials that compared pharmacologic treatments for weight management (dulaglutide, exenatide, liraglutide, lixisenatide, naltrexone-bupropion, orforglipron, phentermine, phentermine-topiramate, retatrutide, semaglutide, semaglutide-cagrilintide, tirzepatide, or any combination with or without lifestyle intervention [LI]) for overweight or obesity (body mass index ≥25 kg/m2) in adults for outcomes such as mortality, weight loss, and quality of life.
abstract.textZh: 比較體重管理藥物治療（度拉魯肽、艾塞那肽、利拉魯肽、利西拉肽、納曲酮-安非他酮、奧福格列酮、芬特明、芬特明-托吡酯、瑞他魯肽、索馬魯肽、索馬魯肽-卡格林肽、替澤帕肽或有或沒有生活方式乾預的任何組合[LI]）對體重指數的任何體重指數對超重或沒有體重測量的至少25125或沒有生活方式乾預。 kg/m2）對於成人的死亡率、體重減輕和生活品質等結果。

abstract.label: DATA EXTRACTION
abstract.text: One reviewer extracted data and assessed risk of bias and certainty of the evidence; a second reviewer verified these data.
abstract.textZh: 評審員擷取資料並評估偏倚風險和證據的確定性；第二位評審員驗證了這些資料。

abstract.label: DATA SYNTHESIS
abstract.text: The review included 69 studies with a total of 112 511 participants. Thirty-seven studies were at low risk of bias. In meta-analyses, nearly all studied interventions were more effective than placebo and/or LI in reducing weight, but more discontinuations due to adverse events were observed. Semaglutide probably reduced mortality and major adverse cardiovascular events (MACE), and both semaglutide and tirzepatide led to the greatest weight loss compared with placebo and/or LI in pairwise and network meta-analyses. Evidence for outcomes such as mortality, MACE, and serious adverse events was limited.
abstract.textZh: 該綜述包括 69 項研究，共有 112 511 名參與者。 37 項研究的偏倚風險較低。在統合分析中，幾乎所有研究的介入措施在減重方面都比安慰劑和/或 LI 更有效，但觀察到更多因不良事件而停藥的情況。索馬魯肽可能降低死亡率和主要不良心血管事件 (MACE)，在配對和網絡統合分析中，與安慰劑和/或 LI 相比，索馬魯肽和替西帕肽均導致最大的體重減輕。死亡率、MACE 和嚴重不良事件等結局的證據有限。

abstract.label: LIMITATION
abstract.text: Direct head-to-head comparisons of different treatments were limited.
abstract.textZh: 不同治療方法的直接直接比較是有限的。

abstract.label: CONCLUSION
abstract.text: Nearly all studied interventions were more effective than placebo and/or LI in reducing weight. Semaglutide and tirzepatide showed the most favorable results across outcomes.
abstract.textZh: 幾乎所有研究的干預措施在減輕體重方面都比安慰劑和/或 LI 更有效。索馬魯肽和替澤帕肽在所有結局中顯示出最有利的結果。

abstract.label: PRIMARY FUNDING SOURCE
abstract.text: American College of Physicians. (PROSPERO: CRD42023491646).
abstract.textZh: 美國內科醫師學會。 （普洛斯彼羅：CRD42023491646）。

articles.titleZh: 超重或肥胖成人藥物治療的益處和危害：美國醫師學會的即時系統性回顧和網絡統合分析

articles.title: Multimodal Prehabilitation for Older Adults Undergoing Spinal Fusion : A Randomized Clinical Trial
articles.authors: Wang S, Wang P, Li J, Han D, Zhao Y, Zhang Y, Li Z, Du Y, et al.

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Older adults often have impaired physiologic reserve and are at higher risk for postoperative complications after spinal fusion surgery.
abstract.textZh: 老年人通常生理儲備受損，脊椎融合手術後發生術後併發症的風險較高。

abstract.label: OBJECTIVE
abstract.text: To evaluate the efficacy of multimodal prehabilitation plus Enhanced Recovery After Surgery (PREERAS) versus ERAS alone on 90-day postoperative complications in older adults undergoing elective spinal fusion.
abstract.textZh: 旨在評估多模式預復健合併加速復健外科 (PREERAS) 與單獨 ERAS 對接受擇期脊椎融合的老年人術後 90 天併發症的療效。

abstract.label: DESIGN
abstract.text: Multicenter, open-label, assessor-blinded, 1:1 parallel-group randomized controlled trial. (ClinicalTrials.gov: NCT06140797).
abstract.textZh: 多中心、開放標籤、評估者盲法、1:1 平行組隨機對照試驗。 （ClinicalTrials.gov：NCT06140797）。

abstract.label: SETTING
abstract.text: 3 tertiary hospitals in China.
abstract.textZh: 中國三級醫院3家。

abstract.label: PARTICIPANTS
abstract.text: Adults aged 75 years or older undergoing elective spinal fusion surgery between May 2024 and May 2025.
abstract.textZh: 2024 年 5 月至 2025 年 5 月期間接受選擇性脊椎融合手術的 75 歲或以上成年人。

abstract.label: INTERVENTION
abstract.text: Participants were randomly assigned to receive either preoperative Vivifrail-based, multimodal PREERAS (PREERAS group) or ERAS alone (ERAS group). The 4-week prehabilitation program integrated supervised group sessions, Vivifrail multicomponent exercise, nutritional optimization, and psychological interventions.
abstract.textZh: 參與者被隨機分配接受術前基於 Vivifrail 的多模式 PREERAS（PREERAS 組）或單獨 ERAS（ERAS 組）。為期 4 週的預復健計畫整合了監督小組課程、Vivifrail 多成分運動、營養優化和心理幹預。

abstract.label: MEASUREMENTS
abstract.text: The primary outcome was the occurrence of any postoperative complication within 90 days of surgery, recorded and graded per the Clavien-Dindo classification system.
abstract.textZh: 主要結局是手術後 90 天內發生的任何術後併發症，根據 Clavien-Dindo 分類系統進行記錄和分級。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: A total of 312 patients were assessed for eligibility, with 164 randomly assigned. Of the 159 patients included in the final analysis (mean age, 78.7 years; 59% women), 59 patients (74.7%) in the PREERAS group and 73 patients (91.2%) in the ERAS group experienced at least 1 complication (risk ratio, 0.80 [95% CI, 0.67 to 0.95]; risk difference, -18.0% [CI, -27.0% to -9.0%]).
abstract.textZh: 共有 312 名患者接受了資格評估，其中 164 名患者被隨機分配。在最終分析中納入的 159 名患者（平均年齡為 78.7 歲；59% 為女性）中，PREERAS 組中的 59 名患者（74.7%）和 ERAS 組中的 73 名患者（91.2%）經歷了至少 1 種併發症（風險比，0.80 [95% CI，0.95%，0.95%， -27.0% 至 -9.0%]）。

abstract.label: LIMITATIONS
abstract.text: Unblinded participants and clinicians. Generalizability may be limited with longer hospital stays in the Chinese health care system.
abstract.textZh: 不設盲的參與者和臨床醫師。由於中國醫療保健系統中住院時間較長，普遍性可能會受到限制。

abstract.label: CONCLUSION
abstract.text: The implementation of multimodal prehabilitation in 3 tertiary hospitals in China reduced 90-day postoperative complications in older adults undergoing enhanced recovery after spinal fusion surgery. However, individual sites will need to consider applicability of findings and resource requirements of prehabilitation before implementation.
abstract.textZh: 中國3家三級醫院實施多模式預康復，減少了脊椎融合手術加速康復的老年人術後90天的併發症。然而，各個地點在實施之前需要考慮調查結果的適用性和預康復的資源需求。

abstract.label: PRIMARY FUNDING SOURCE
abstract.text: Capital's Funds for Health Improvement and Research.
abstract.textZh: 資本健康改善和研究基金。

articles.titleZh: 接受脊椎融合術的老年人的多模式預復健：一項隨機臨床試驗

articles.title: Dementia Risk After Recombinant Herpes Zoster Vaccination in Older Adults With a Recent Skilled-Nursing Facility Stay : A Target Trial Emulation
articles.authors: Hayes KN, Harris DA, McConeghy KW, Grove LR, Joshi R, Han L, Davidson HE, Chachlani P, et al.

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Observational studies report a protective association between herpes zoster (HZ) vaccination and dementia, but they have methodological limitations or examined a live attenuated vaccine no longer available in the United States.
abstract.textZh: 觀察性研究報告帶狀皰疹 (HZ) 疫苗接種與失智症之間存在保護性關聯，但它們存在方法學局限性，或檢查了美國不再提供的減毒活疫苗。

abstract.label: OBJECTIVE
abstract.text: Among older adults recently admitted to a skilled-nursing facility for postacute or long-term care, to estimate the association between dementia and receipt of the recombinant HZ vaccine (RZV) within 12 months of entering the facility or after discharge.
abstract.textZh: 在最近入住專業護理機構進行急性期後或長期護理的老年人中，評估癡呆症與進入機構後 12 個月內或出院後接種重組帶狀皰疹疫苗 (RZV) 之間的關聯。

abstract.label: DESIGN
abstract.text: The researchers conducted a cohort study using target trial emulation and the clone-censor-weight approach. Participants were followed for up to 4 years until the outcome of dementia, Medicare disenrollment, or death. Inverse probability of clone-censoring weights were applied to pooled logistic regression models to estimate effects.
abstract.textZh: 研究人員使用目標試驗模擬和克隆審查權重方法進行了一項隊列研究。參與者被追蹤長達 4 年，直到出現失智症、退出醫療保險或死亡。將克隆審查權重的逆機率應用於合併邏輯迴歸模型以估計效果。

abstract.label: SETTING
abstract.text: Medicare claims linked to nursing home electronic health record (EHR) data.
abstract.textZh: 醫療保險索賠與療養院電子健康記錄 (EHR) 數據相關。

abstract.label: PARTICIPANTS
abstract.text: Medicare fee-for-service beneficiaries aged 66 years or older who were admitted to a skilled-nursing facility between 1 January 2017 and 31 December 2022, had linked EHR data, had no diagnosed dementia, and were eligible for RZV.
abstract.textZh: 醫療保險按服務收費受益人，年齡為 66 歲或以上，在 2017 年 1 月 1 日至 2022 年 12 月 31 日期間入住熟練護理機構，已關聯 EHR 數據，未診斷出癡呆症，並且有資格享受 RZV。

abstract.label: INTERVENTION
abstract.text: Receipt of at least 1 RZV in the facility or, if discharged, by 12 months after admission versus no receipt of RZV.
abstract.textZh: 在機構中至少收到 1 個 RZV，或如果出院，則在入院後 12 個月內收到至少 1 個 RZV，而不是沒有收到 RZV。

abstract.label: MEASUREMENTS
abstract.text: Validated dementia diagnosis and 57 baseline and time-varying covariates.
abstract.textZh: 經過驗證的癡呆症診斷和 57 個基線和時變協變數。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: The study cohort included 509 926 participants (mean age, 79 years); 8843 (1.73%) received at least 1 RZV dose within 12 months after admission, and of these, 87.0% received RZV after discharge. Receipt of RZV was associated with risk for dementia being 5.8 percentage points lower (95% CI, 3.9 to 7.5 percentage points lower; risk ratio, 0.76 [CI, 0.69 to 0.84]; 4-year risk, 18.8% with ≥1 RZV vs. 24.6% with no RZV). Associations were attenuated in men and those with prior live HZ vaccination.
abstract.textZh: 研究族群包括 509 926 名參與者（平均年齡 79 歲）； 8,843 例（1.73%）在入院後 12 個月內至少接受 1 劑 RZV，其中 87.0% 在出院後接受了 RZV。接受 RZV 與失智症風險降低 5.8 個百分點相關（95% CI，降低 3.9 至 7.5 個百分點；風險比，0.76 [CI，0.69 至 0.84]；4 年風險，≥1 RZV 為 18.8%，而沒有 RZV 為 24.6%）。在男性和先前接種過活帶狀皰疹疫苗的人中，關聯性減弱。

abstract.label: LIMITATION
abstract.text: Negative control analyses suggest some residual confounding.
abstract.textZh: 陰性對照分析顯示存在一些殘留的混雜因素。

abstract.label: CONCLUSION
abstract.text: Receipt of RZV during admission to a skilled-nursing facility or within 12 months was associated with lower dementia risk.
abstract.textZh: 在進入專業護理機構期間或 12 個月內接受 RZV 與較低的失智症風險相關。

abstract.label: PRIMARY FUNDING SOURCE
abstract.text: GlaxoSmithKline.
abstract.textZh: 葛蘭素史克。

articles.titleZh: 最近入住熟練護理機構的老年人接種重組帶狀皰疹疫苗後的癡呆風險：目標試驗模擬

articles.title: Pharmacologic Treatments With Lifestyle Modifications in Nonpregnant Adults With Overweight or Obesity in Outpatient Settings: A Living Clinical Guideline From the American College of Physicians (April 2026)
articles.authors: Qaseem A, Cross JT, Harrod CS, Owens DK, Balk EM, Crandall CJ, Clinical Guidelines Committee of the American College of Physicians

abstract.label: DESCRIPTION
abstract.text: The American College of Physicians (ACP) developed this clinical guideline for internal medicine physicians and other clinicians caring in outpatient settings for adults with overweight or obesity.
abstract.textZh: 美國內科醫師學會 (ACP) 為內科醫生和其他在門診治療超重或肥胖成人的臨床醫生製定了本臨床指南。

abstract.label: METHODS
abstract.text: This guideline is based on systematic reviews of pharmacologic treatments in adults with overweight or obesity and used the GRADE (Grading of Recommendations Assessment, Development and Evaluation) approach.
abstract.textZh: 本指引是基於對超重或肥胖成人藥物治療的系統性評價，並使用 GRADE（建議評估、制定和評估分級）方法。

abstract.label: RECOMMENDATION 1
abstract.text: ACP suggests initiating one of the following pharmacologic treatments with lifestyle modifications for weight management in nonpregnant adults with obesity (body mass index ≥30 kg/m2) in outpatient settings (conditional recommendation): First-line treatments are semaglutide (moderate-certainty evidence) and tirzepatide (moderate-certainty evidence); second-line treatment is phentermine-topiramate (low-certainty evidence); third-line treatment is liraglutide (low-certainty evidence); fourth-line treatment is naltrexone-bupropion (low-certainty evidence). When initiating a recommended medication for weight management or switching to another recommended medication because of an inadequate response, clinicians and patients should discuss benefits, harms, costs, access and availability, clinical comorbidities, weight loss goals, life expectancy, values and preferences, and contraindications and warnings (for example, the requirement for monthly pregnancy tests with use of phentermine-topiramate, the contraindication to phentermine-topiramate in those with cardiovascular disease, and suicidal ideation with naltrexone-bupropion).
abstract.textZh: ACP 建議在門診環境中對非妊娠肥胖成人（體重指數≥30 kg/m2）開始以下藥物治療之一併調整生活方式來控制體重（有條件推薦）：一線治療是索馬魯肽（中等質量證據）和替澤帕肽（中等質量證據）；二線治療是芬特明-托吡酯（低質量證據）和替澤帕肽（中等質量證據）；二線治療是芬特明-托吡酯（低質量證據）和替澤帕肽（中等質量證據）；二線治療是芬特明-托吡酯（低質量證據）和替澤帕肽（中等質量證據）；當開始使用建議的體重管理藥物或因反應不足而改用另一種推薦藥物時，臨床醫生和患者應討論益處、危害、成本、可及性和可用性、臨床合併症、減肥目標、預期壽命、價值觀和偏好以及禁忌症和警告（例如，使用芬特明-托吡酯時每月進行妊娠試驗的要求、患有心血管疾病的患者使用芬特酮-托吡酸

abstract.label: RECOMMENDATION 2
abstract.text: ACP suggests initiating one of the following pharmacologic treatments with lifestyle modifications for weight management in nonpregnant adults with overweight (body mass index ≥27 to 30 kg/m2) and type 2 diabetes, dyslipidemia, hypertension, obstructive sleep apnea, or cardiovascular disease (conditional recommendation): First-line treatments are semaglutide (moderate-certainty evidence) and tirzepatide (moderate-certainty evidence); second-line treatment is liraglutide (low-certainty evidence). When initiating a recommended medication for weight management or switching to another recommended medication because of an inadequate response, clinicians and patients should discuss benefits, harms, costs, access and availability, clinical comorbidities, weight loss goals, life expectancy, values and preferences, and contraindications and warnings (for example, use in pregnancy).
abstract.textZh: ACP 建議對超重（體重指數≥27 至 30 kg/m2）和 2 型糖尿病、血脂異常、高血壓、阻塞性睡眠呼吸中止症或心血管疾病（有條件推薦）的非妊娠成人開始以下藥物治療之一，並調整生活方式來控制體重：一線治療是索馬魯肽（質量證據）和替澤帕肽（中等質量證據）；二線治療質量低肽（中等質量證據）和替澤帕肽（中等質量證據）。當開始使用建議的體重管理藥物或因反應不足而改用另一種建議的藥物時，臨床醫生和患者應討論益處、危害、成本、可及性和可用性、臨床合併症、減肥目標、預期壽命、價值觀和偏好以及禁忌症和警告（例如，在懷孕期間使用）。

articles.titleZh: 對門診超重或肥胖的非妊娠成年人進行生活方式改變的藥物治療：美國醫師學會的即時臨床指南（2026 年 4 月）

articles.title: Using large language models to identify prediagnostic clinical features of ovarian cancer from healthcare records: a population-based case-control study
articles.authors: Funston G, Park N, Thompson M, Yetisgen M, Goff BA, Kessler L, Walter FM

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Most women with ovarian cancer are diagnosed after developing symptoms. However, symptoms are often recorded as free text within electronic health records (EHRs), which is not readily accessible for research.
abstract.textZh: 大多數患有卵巢癌的女性是在出現症狀後被診斷出來的。然而，症狀通常以自由文字形式記錄在電子健康記錄 (EHR) 中，不易用於研究。

abstract.label: AIM
abstract.text: To use EHRs to examine associations between coded and large language model (LLM)-extracted free-text clinical features with ovarian cancer diagnosis.
abstract.textZh: 使用 EHR 檢查編碼和大語言模型 (LLM) 提取的自由文本臨床特徵與卵巢癌診斷之間的關聯。

abstract.label: DESIGN AND SETTING
abstract.text: Population-based case-control study using EHRs and cancer registry data from women attending primary care, outpatient, and emergency clinics associated with the University of Washington, US.
abstract.textZh: 基於人群的病例對照研究，使用美國華盛頓大學相關初級保健、門診和急診診所的女性的電子病歷和癌症登記資料。

abstract.label: METHOD
abstract.text: In total, 136 women with ovarian cancer cases (diagnosed 2012-2019) were matched (age, clinic type) to 1360 control participants. Twelve months of prediagnosis coded and free-text data were extracted from EHRs. LLMs were tested on annotated notes, before extracting information on 17 prespecified clinical features. Univariate conditional logistic regression analyses were used to identify clinical features associated with ovarian cancer.
abstract.textZh: 總共有 136 名患有卵巢癌病例（2012-2019 年診斷）的女性與 1360 名對照參與者進行了配對（年齡、診所類型）。從 EHR 中提取了十二個月的診斷前編碼和自由文字資料。在提取 17 個預先指定的臨床特徵的資訊之前，法學碩士在帶註釋的筆記上進行了測試。使用單變量條件邏輯回歸分析來識別與卵巢癌相關的臨床特徵。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: There were 14 clinical features that were more commonly identified from free text using LLMs than from codes in both the case and control groups. There were 14 features that were significantly associated with ovarian cancer when using codes and LLM-extracted data, but only eight features were significant using codes alone. Using both coded and LLM-extracted data, 11 features had odds ratios >2. Thirteen features were significantly associated when restricting analysis to early-stage (I-II) diagnosis.
abstract.textZh: 在病例組和對照組中，有 14 種臨床特徵在使用法學碩士的自由文本中比從代碼中更常見。當使用代碼和 LLM 提取的數據時，有 14 個特徵與卵巢癌顯著相關，但僅使用代碼時只有 8 個特徵顯著相關。使用編碼資料和 LLM 擷取的數據，11 個特徵的優勢比 >2。當將分析限制於早期 (I-II) 診斷時，有 13 個特徵顯著相關。

abstract.label: CONCLUSION
abstract.text: There is an identifiable ovarian cancer symptom signature within EHRs, with LLM-based natural language processing approaches enabling extraction of key non-coded symptom information. LLMs could support EHR-based research, while LLM-based clinical decision support tools may improve identification of patients with symptoms of possible cancer.
abstract.textZh: EHR 中有可識別的卵巢癌症狀特徵，基於法學碩士的自然語言處理方法可以提取關鍵的非編碼症狀資訊。法學碩士可以支援基於電子病歷的研究，而基於法學碩士的臨床決策支援工具可以改善對可能患有癌症症狀的患者的識別。

articles.titleZh: 使用大語言模型從醫療記錄中識別卵巢癌的診斷前臨床特徵：基於人群的病例對照研究

articles.title: Impact of structured medication reviews on prescribing in English primary care: a retrospective observational cohort study
articles.authors: Sheppard JP, Bateman PA, Wright-Drakesmith C, Clark CE, Barnes RK, Clegg AP, Ford GA, Gadhia S, et al.

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Structured medication reviews (SMRs) were introduced in 2020 to address polypharmacy in patients most at risk of medicines-related harm.
abstract.textZh: 2020 年推出了結構化藥物審查 (SMR)，以解決最有可能遭受藥物相關傷害的患者的多重用藥問題。

abstract.label: AIM
abstract.text: To evaluate the impact of SMRs on prescribing in primary care.
abstract.textZh: 評估 SMR 對初級保健處方的影響。

abstract.label: DESIGN AND SETTING
abstract.text: Retrospective observational cohort study of electronic health records from patients aged ≥65 years, prescribed ≥1 medications, and fulfilling the specific eligibility criteria for an SMR, registered at practices contributing data to the Oxford Clinical Informatics Digital Hub, between 1 April 2020 and 30 September 2022.
abstract.textZh: 對 2020 年 4 月 1 日至 2022 年 9 月 30 日期間年齡≥65 歲、處方≥1 種藥物、滿足 SMR 特定資格標準、在向牛津臨床資訊學數位中心提供資料的診所註冊的患者的電子健康記錄進行回顧性觀察隊列研究。

abstract.label: METHOD
abstract.text: The association between SMRs and prescription changes was examined by matching individuals who received an SMR to individuals who did not receive an SMR, according to age, sex, and primary care practice, using cumulative density sampling. Analyses were undertaken using adjusted logistic regression.
abstract.textZh: 透過使用累積密度抽樣，根據年齡、性別和初級保健實踐，將接受 SMR 的個人與未接受 SMR 的個人進行匹配，檢查 SMR 與處方變更之間的關聯。使用調整後的邏輯迴歸進行分析。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: Of 635 698 eligible patients, 82 285 (12.9%, 95% confidence interval [CI] = 12.9 to 13.0) received ≥1 SMR during the study observation period. In those prescribed potentially inappropriate drug combinations prior to an SMR, between 12.5% and 40.0% were corrected up to 3 months later. In matched analyses, SMRs were most strongly associated with an increase in new prescriptions of angiotensin-converting enzyme inhibitors (adjusted odds ratio [aOR] 1.56, 95% CI = 1.35 to 1.81), statins (aOR 1.78, 95% CI = 1.57 to 2.02), and antidepressants (aOR 1.45, 95% CI = 1.28 to 1.63). SMRs were also most strongly associated with stopping these drug classes in those previously prescribed treatment.
abstract.textZh: 在 635 698 名符合條件的患者中，82 285 名（12.9%，95% 置信區間 [CI] = 12.9 至 13.0）在研究觀察期間接受了 ≥1 SMR。在 SMR 之前開立的可能不適當的藥物組合中，12.5% 至 40.0% 的患者在 3 個月後得到糾正。在配對分析中，SMR 與血管緊張素轉換酶抑制劑（調整後優勢比 [aOR] 1.56，95% CI = 1.35 至 1.81）、他汀類藥物（aOR 1.78，95% CI = 1.57 至 2.02）和抗憂鬱劑（aOR 1.45，95% CI = 195% CI = 19575% CI 2057575% CI 的處方。 1.28 至 1.63）。 SMR 也與在先前規定的治療中停止這些藥物類別密切相關。

abstract.label: CONCLUSION
abstract.text: SMRs were associated with starting new medications and stopping existing prescriptions compared with usual care. Further work is needed to understand if these changes improved patient outcomes.
abstract.textZh: 與常規治療相比，SMR 與開始新藥物治療和停止現有處方有關。需要進一步的工作來了解這些變化是否改善了患者的治療結果。

articles.titleZh: 結構化藥物審查對英國初級保健處方的影響：一項回顧性觀察隊列研究

articles.title: Sustaining a career in general practice: a qualitative study of experienced GPs in South West England
articles.authors: Khan NF, Treadgold BM, Campbell J

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: General practice in the UK faces a growing retention crisis, with many experienced GPs reducing hours or leaving patient care amid rising workload and system strain. Understanding what sustains GP careers is crucial to stabilising the workforce.
abstract.textZh: 英國的全科醫生面臨著日益嚴重的保留危機，許多經驗豐富的全科醫生在工作量和系統壓力不斷增加的情況下減少了工作時間或離開病人護理。了解維持全科醫師職業生涯的因素對於穩定勞動力隊伍至關重要。

abstract.label: AIM
abstract.text: To explore how experienced GPs' career intentions have evolved since the 2016 ReGROUP study and to identify factors influencing decisions to stay, reduce, or leave clinical work.
abstract.textZh: 探討自 2016 年 ReGROUP 研究以來經驗豐富的全科醫生的職業意圖如何演變，並確定影響留下、減少或離開臨床工作決策的因素。

abstract.label: DESIGN AND SETTING
abstract.text: A qualitative interview study was undertaken with experienced GPs in South West England, and analysed using the Job Demands-Resources (JD-R) model.
abstract.textZh: 對英格蘭西南部經驗豐富的全科醫生進行了定性訪談研究，並使用工作需求-資源 (JD-R) 模型進行分析。

abstract.label: METHOD
abstract.text: We conducted 19 semi-structured interviews with GPs who had previously completed the ReGROUP survey. Transcripts were analysed thematically with input from public and professional stakeholders.
abstract.textZh: 我們對先前完成 ReGROUP 調查的全科醫生進行了 19 次半結構化訪談。根據公眾和專業利益相關者的意見，對成績單進行了主題分析。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: GPs described escalating clinical and administrative workloads, moral distress, and reduced control as key pressures driving burnout and exit. Hybrid access models, secondary care workload transfer, and punitive regulatory processes intensified strain. Retention was supported by clear workload boundaries, continuity of care, supportive practice systems, portfolio careers, and collective advocacy. Some GPs maintained engagement by reshaping their roles or practice structures to regain control and sustain meaning.
abstract.textZh: 全科醫生表示，不斷增加的臨床和行政工作量、道德困境和控制力下降是導致倦怠和退出的關鍵壓力。混合訪問模式、二級護理工作量轉移和懲罰性監管流程加劇了壓力。明確的工作量界限、連續性護理、支持性實踐系統、組合職業和集體倡導為保留提供了支持。一些全科醫生透過重塑自己的角色或實踐結構來維持參與，以重新獲得控制權並維持意義。

abstract.label: CONCLUSION
abstract.text: Retention depends not only on reducing workload but also on restoring the conditions that make being a 'good GP' feel possible, through continuity, manageable demand, and supportive organisational culture. Creating space for flexibility, autonomy, and role redesign may help sustain experienced GPs and strengthen workforce resilience.
abstract.textZh: 保留不僅取決於減少工作量，還取決於透過連續性、可管理的需求和支持性的組織文化來恢復使成為「好全科醫生」成為可能的條件。為靈活性、自主性和角色重新設計創造空間可能有助於維持經驗豐富的全科醫生並增強員工的應變能力。

articles.titleZh: 在全科醫生中維持職業生涯：對英格蘭西南部經驗豐富的全科醫生的定性研究

articles.title: Conceptualising diagnostic liminality: a qualitative exploration of the journey to heart failure diagnosis
articles.authors: Goyder CR, Taylor CJ, Newhouse N, Pope C, Hobbs FR, Hinton L

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Heart failure (HF) is a global public health priority. HF diagnosis in primary care is linked to improved outcomes, but most patients are diagnosed in hospital. The pathway to HF diagnosis in primary care is poorly understood.
abstract.textZh: 心臟衰竭（HF）是全球公共衛生的優先事項。初級保健中的心臟衰竭診斷與改善預後有關，但大多數患者是在醫院診斷的。人們對初級保健中心力衰竭診斷的途徑知之甚少。

abstract.label: AIM
abstract.text: To gain deeper understanding of the patient experience of missed opportunities for HF diagnosis and develop recommendations for clinical practice.
abstract.textZh: 更深入了解患者錯失心臟衰竭診斷機會的經歷，並為臨床實踐提出建議。

abstract.label: DESIGN AND SETTING
abstract.text: A qualitative study with patients recruited through general practice and community nurse clinics in England.
abstract.textZh: 透過英格蘭全科診所和社區護理診所招募的患者進行的一項定性研究。

abstract.label: METHOD
abstract.text: We conducted remote, semi-structured interviews with 24 patients who had a diagnosis of HF. Data were analysed using reflexive thematic analysis.
abstract.textZh: 我們對 24 名診斷為心臟衰竭的患者進行了遠端半結構化訪談。使用反思性主題分析對資料進行分析。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: Three themes were developed: diagnostic liminality and suffering at the threshold of HF diagnosis (when participants were unwell but not yet diagnosed or were unaware of their diagnosis); meaning and framing in the diagnostic moment; and truth-telling and sense-making facilitating the escape from liminality. Although receiving the diagnosis brought relief, it also came as a shock owing to the meanings associated with the term. Some thought HF meant imminent death and was incompatible with living. Participants also described not being properly informed about their diagnosis.
abstract.textZh: 制定了三個主題：診斷界限和心臟衰竭診斷閾值時的痛苦（當參與者身體不適但尚未診斷或不知道自己的診斷時）；診斷時刻的意義和框架；講真話和講道理有助於擺脫閾限。雖然收到診斷結果讓人鬆了口氣，但由於與該術語相關的含義，也令人震驚。有些人認為心臟衰竭意味著死亡臨近，與生存格格不入。參與者也表示沒有正確告知他們的診斷結果。

abstract.label: CONCLUSION
abstract.text: Although life was disrupted by an HF diagnosis, the diagnosis did not enable the transition from liminality. It was truth-telling, in combination with careful explanation, that facilitated the shift from diagnostic liminality. Through sense-making, participants were able to build an understanding of what an HF diagnosis actually meant for them and their future. Clinicians have a vitally important role in guiding patients away from diagnostic liminality through prompt HF diagnosis and thoughtful communication.
abstract.textZh: 儘管心臟衰竭的診斷擾亂了生活，但該診斷並沒有使人們擺脫閾限狀態。講真話與仔細的解釋相結合，促進了診斷閾限的轉變。透過意義建構，參與者能夠了解心臟衰竭診斷對他們及其未來的實際意義。透過及時的心臟衰竭診斷和深思熟慮的溝通，臨床醫生在引導患者擺脫診斷界限方面發揮著至關重要的作用。

articles.titleZh: 概念化診斷閾限：心臟衰竭診斷之旅的定性探索

articles.title: Optimising personal continuity in general practice: process evaluation of a toolkit
articles.authors: Groot LJ, Uijen AA, Schers HJ, Burgers JS, Smalbrugge M, van der Horst HE, Maarsingh OR

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Personal continuity - having a GP who knows and follows the patient - is a core value of general practice, yet changes in society and health care have challenged its provision.
