Therefore, we developed TOOL-kit: an intervention to opTimise persOnal cOntinuity for oLder patients in general practice, a multi-component intervention aimed to optimise personal continuity for patients aged ≥65 years.
abstract.textZh: 個人連續性——擁有一位了解並追蹤患者的全科醫生——是全科醫學的核心價值，但社會和醫療保健的變化對其提供提出了挑戰。因此，我們開發了 TOOL-kit：一種在全科實踐中優化老年患者個人連續性的干預措施，一種旨在優化 65 歲以上患者個人連續性的多成分乾預措施。

abstract.label: AIM
abstract.text: To evaluate TOOL-kit's implementation and identify barriers and facilitators influencing its delivery.
abstract.textZh: 評估工具包的實施並確定影響其交付的障礙和促進因素。

abstract.label: DESIGN AND SETTING
abstract.text: This mixed-methods study was embedded in the main effect trial (August 2020 to April 2022).
abstract.textZh: 這項混合方法研究被納入主效應試驗（2020 年 8 月至 2022 年 4 月）。

abstract.label: METHOD
abstract.text: Implementation was assessed via 3-monthly surveys and 93 interviews with GPs and practice staff (n = 221) from 31 general practices. Based on Saunders' paradigm, it was evaluated on the process indicators of recruitment and reach, fidelity (adherence to protocol), dose delivered (extent of improvement plans), and dose received (goal achievement, sustained organisational change). Barriers and facilitators were evaluated on the intervention, staff, organisational, and sociopolitical levels.
abstract.textZh: 透過為期 3 個月的調查以及對來自 31 個全科診所的 93 名全科醫生和執業人員 (n = 221) 的訪談來評估實施情況。根據桑德斯的範式，根據招募和範圍、忠誠度（遵守協議）、交付劑量（改善計畫的程度）和接收劑量（目標實現、持續組織變革）等過程指標進行評估。對介入、人員、組織和社會政治層面的障礙和促進因素進行了評估。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: Of 31 practices, 23 adhered to protocol. TOOL-kit was delivered at a (very) low dose in 17 of 31 practices. At study end, 55% of practice goals were met. After 24 months, 19 of 31 practices had observed sustained positive effects regarding personal continuity. A good-quality improvement infrastructure facilitated TOOL-kit implementation, while work pressure and staff shortages, exacerbated by COVID-19, were seen as the main barriers for implementation.
abstract.textZh: 在 31 项实践中，23 项遵守了协议。在 31 次實踐中，有 17 次以（非常）低的劑量提供了工具套件。研究結束時，55% 的實踐目標實現。 24 個月後，31 項實踐中的 19 項觀察到對個人連續性產生了持續的正面影響。 A good-quality improvement infrastructure facilitated TOOL-kit implementation, while work pressure and staff shortages, exacerbated by COVID-19, were seen as the main barriers for implementation.

abstract.label: CONCLUSION
abstract.text: Despite implementation challenges, TOOL-kit was able to enhance work procedures and improve the focus on personal continuity within practice. Fostering practices' quality improvement infrastructure and decision-making processes could improve implementation.
abstract.textZh: 儘管實施方面存在挑戰，TOOL-kit 仍能夠增強工作程序並提高對實踐中個人連續性的關注。促進實踐品質改善基礎設施和決策流程可以改善實施。

articles.titleZh: 優化一般實踐中的個人連續性：工具包的過程評估

articles.title: Value of measuring waist circumference in primary care: a mixed-methods study
articles.authors: van den Hout WJ, van Peet PG, Numans ME, Boone SC, Raas L, Le Cessie S, Rosendaal FR, Mook-Kanamori DO, et al.

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: It remains a challenge for GPs to identify all patients at increased risk of cardiovascular disease (CVD) in their practice, as performing cardiovascular risk assessment in every single patient is not feasible in routine practice. There is need for a simple tool to screen who is eligible for cardiovascular risk assessment and identify those at increased CVD risk.
abstract.textZh: 對於全科醫生來說，在其實踐中識別所有心血管疾病 (CVD) 風險增加的患者仍然是一個挑戰，因為在常規實踐中對每位患者進行心血管風險評估是不可行的。需要一種簡單的工具來篩選誰有資格進行心血管風險評估並識別心血管疾病風險增加的人。

abstract.label: AIM
abstract.text: To investigate the value of measuring waist circumference in primary care by investigating: current recording practices of GPs; barriers and facilitators; and its contribution as a screening tool in the identification of patients at increased risk of CVD.
abstract.textZh: 透過調查以下內容來探討測量腰圍在初級保健中的價值： 全科醫生目前的記錄做法；障礙和促進因素；及其作為篩檢工具在識別 CVD 風險增加患者方面的貢獻。

abstract.label: DESIGN AND SETTING
abstract.text: A mixed-methods study was conducted in Dutch primary care.
abstract.textZh: 在荷蘭初級保健中進行了一項混合方法研究。

abstract.label: METHOD
abstract.text: We investigated the following three datasets: routine data from general practices (n = 676 708 health records of adults); qualitative data from six focus groups (n = 21 GPs); data from the Netherlands Epidemiology of Obesity (NEO) study (n = 6671 middle-aged individuals).
abstract.textZh: 我們調查了以下三個資料集：來自一般實踐的常規資料（n = 676 708 成人健康記錄）；來自六個焦點小組的定性資料（n = 21 GP）；資料來自荷蘭肥胖流行病學 (NEO) 研究（n = 6671 名中年人）。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: Between 2012 and 2023, incidence rates of recorded waist circumference by GPs decreased from 47 to 3 per 1000 person-years. Barriers to GPs measuring waist circumference included discomfort, inability to measure it accurately, lack of measuring tape, and perceived uselessness. Facilitators included knowledge that increased waist circumference is a cardiovascular risk factor. In the NEO study population, after excluding patients already treated for the prevention of CVD (n = 2407), 1731 patients were at increased risk of CVD (n = 1113 intermediate risk, n = 618 high risk). Measuring waist circumference would identify 89% (993/1113) of those at intermediate and 93% (575/618) of those at high predicted cardiovascular risk.
abstract.textZh: 2012 年至 2023 年間，全科醫師記錄的腰圍發生率從每 1,000 人年 47 例下降到 3 例。全科醫生測量腰圍的障礙包括不適、無法準確測量、缺乏捲尺以及被認為無用。主持人介紹了腰圍增加是心血管危險因子的知識。在 NEO 研究族群中，排除已經接受 CVD 預防治療的患者 (n = 2407) 後，1731 名患者的 CVD 風險增加（n = 1113 名中度風險，n = 618 名高風險）。測量腰圍可以識別出 89% (993/1113) 的中度心血管風險族群和 93% (575/618) 的高預測心血管風險族群。

abstract.label: CONCLUSION
abstract.text: Waist circumference measurement may serve as a valuable screening tool to select patients eligible for cardiovascular risk assessment to identify those at increased risk of CVD in primary care. Since GPs currently rarely measure waist circumference, inclusion in guidelines and addressing identified barriers and facilitators is warranted.
abstract.textZh: 腰圍測量可作為一種有價值的篩檢工具，用於選擇符合心血管風險評估資格的患者，以識別初級保健中心血管疾病風險增加的患者。由於全科醫生目前很少測量腰圍，因此有必要將其納入指南並解決已確定的障礙和促進因素。

articles.titleZh: 測量腰圍在初級保健中的價值：一項混合方法研究

articles.title: Lonvoguran Ziclumeran - In Vivo CRISPR Gene Editing in Hereditary Angioedema
articles.authors: Cohn DM, Gurugama P, Longhurst HJ, Aygören-Pürsün E, Craig TJ, Farkas H, Jacobs J, Lumry WR, et al.

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Hereditary angioedema is a rare and potentially life-threatening genetic condition characterized by recurrent and debilitating swelling attacks. Lonvoguran ziclumeran (lonvo-z) - an investigational, in vivo gene-editing treatment based on clustered regularly interspaced short palindromic repeats (CRISPR) - is being developed as a single-dose treatment for hereditary angioedema.
abstract.textZh: 遺傳性血管性水腫是一種罕見且可能危及生命的遺傳性疾病，其特徵是反覆出現並使人衰弱的腫脹發作。 Lonvoguran ziclumeran (lonvo-z) 是一種基於成簇規則間隔短回文重複序列 (CRISPR) 的研究性體內基因編輯治療方法，目前正在開髮用於治療遺傳性血管性水腫的單劑量治療方法。

abstract.label: METHODS
abstract.text: In a phase 3, double-blind trial, we randomly assigned, in a 2:1 ratio, patients who were 16 years of age or older and had hereditary angioedema with C1 inhibitor deficiency to receive a single intravenous infusion of lonvo-z (at a dose of 50 mg) or placebo. The primary end point was the number of investigator-confirmed hereditary angioedema attacks per month (the monthly attack rate) from week 5 through week 28 after infusion.
abstract.textZh: 在一项 3 期双盲试验中，我们以 2:1 的比例随机分配 16 岁或以上、患有 C1 抑制剂缺乏症的遗传性血管性水肿的患者接受单次静脉输注 lonvo-z（剂量为 50 mg）或安慰剂。主要終點是輸注後第 5 週至第 28 週期間經研究者確認的每月遺傳性血管水腫發作次數（每月發作率）。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: A total of 80 patients underwent randomization; 52 were assigned to receive lonvo-z and 28 to receive placebo. As of February 10, 2026, the median duration of follow-up was 7.5 months (range, 4.9 to 12.8). The least-squares mean monthly attack rate from weeks 5 through 28 was 0.26 (95% confidence interval [CI], 0.15 to 0.45) in the lonvo-z group and 2.10 (95% CI, 1.55 to 2.86) in the placebo group (relative difference, -87%; 95% CI, -93 to -78; P<0.001). Adverse events that occurred during or after infusion of lonvo-z or placebo were reported in 92% and 86% of the patients in the lonvo-z and placebo groups, respectively, from day 1 through week 28. Among the adverse events that occurred during or after infusion and more often in the lonvo-z group than in the placebo group, the most common (occurring in >10% of the patients in the lonvo-z group) included infusion-related reaction, headache, fatigue, back pain, and upper respiratory tract infection. No serious or grade 3 or higher adverse events were reported in the lonvo-z group.
abstract.textZh: 總共80名患者接受了隨機分組； 52 人被分配接受 lonvo-z，28 人被分配接受安慰劑。截至2026年2月10日，中位追蹤時間為7.5個月（範圍4.9至12.8個月）。 lonvo-z 組第 5 週至第 28 週的最小平方法平均每月發作率為 0.26（95% 信賴區間 [CI]，0.15 至 0.45），安慰劑組為 2.10（95% CI，1.55 至 2.86）（安慰劑組為 2.10（95% CI，1.55 至 2.86）（相對差異，-87%；從第 1 天到第 28 週，lonvo-z 組和安慰劑組的患者分別有 92% 和 86% 的患者報告了在輸注 lonvo-z 或安慰劑期間或之後發生的不良事件。在輸注期間或之後發生的不良事件中，lonvo-z 組比安慰劑組更常見，最常見的不良事件（發生在 lonvo-z 組 > 10% 的患者）包括輸注相關事件反應、頭痛、疲勞、背痛和上呼吸道感染。 lonvo-z 組未通報嚴重或 3 級或以上不良事件。

abstract.label: CONCLUSIONS
abstract.text: Among patients with hereditary angioedema, a single intravenous infusion of lonvo-z resulted in a significantly lower rate of hereditary angioedema attacks than placebo. (Funded by Intellia Therapeutics; HAELO ClinicalTrials.gov number, NCT06634420.).
abstract.textZh: 在遺傳性血管性水腫患者中，單次靜脈輸注 lonvo-z 導致遺傳性血管性水腫發作率顯著低於安慰劑。 （由 Intellia Therapeutics 資助；HAELO ClinicalTrials.gov 編號，NCT06634420。）。

articles.titleZh: Lonvoguran Ziclumeran - 體內 CRISPR 基因編輯治療遺傳性血管性水腫

articles.title: Talquetamab-Daratumumab in Relapsed or Refractory Myeloma
articles.authors: Mina R, Beksac M, Rodríguez-Otero P, Chen W, Mateos MV, Li J, Moreau P, Cohen YC, et al.

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Talquetamab, a bispecific antibody targeting GPRC5D and CD3, has led to durable responses in patients with heavily pretreated relapsed or refractory multiple myeloma in phase 1-2 trials, with a limited effect on normal B cells.
abstract.textZh: Talquetamab 是一種針對 GPRC5D 和 CD3 的雙特異性抗體，在 1-2 期試驗中已對經過大量治療的複發性或難治性多發性骨髓瘤患者產生了持久的反應，但對正常 B 細胞的影響有限。

abstract.label: METHODS
abstract.text: In a phase 3 trial, we randomly assigned patients with relapsed or refractory multiple myeloma who had previously received at least one line of therapy to receive talquetamab plus daratumumab and pomalidomide (Tal-DP), talquetamab plus daratumumab (Tal-D), or daratumumab plus pomalidomide and dexamethasone (DPd). The primary end point was progression-free survival as assessed by an independent review committee. Key secondary end points were overall response, complete response or better (complete or stringent complete response), measurable residual disease-negative complete response, and overall survival.
abstract.textZh: 在一項 3 期試驗中，我們將既往至少接受過一種治療的複發性或難治性多發性骨髓瘤患者隨機分配接受他克他單抗加達雷妥尤單抗和泊馬度胺 (Tal-DP)、他克他單抗加達雷妥尤單抗 (Tal-D) 或達雷妥尤加泊馬度胺和單抗加泊馬度胺 (dDPdDP)。主要終點是由獨立審查委員會評估的無惡化存活期。關鍵的次要終點是整體緩解、完全緩解或更好（完全或嚴格完全緩解）、可測量的殘留疾病陰性完全緩解和總生存期。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: A total of 287, 287, and 290 patients were assigned to the Tal-DP, Tal-D, and DPd groups, respectively. At the interim analysis (median follow-up, 24.6 months), progression-free survival was significantly longer with Tal-DP and Tal-D than with DPd (24-month estimate, 81.3% and 77.6% vs. 51.2%; hazard ratio for disease progression or death, Tal-DP vs. DPd, 0.28 [95% confidence interval {CI}, 0.20 to 0.40], and Tal-D vs. DPd, 0.33 [95% CI, 0.24 to 0.46]; P<0.001 for both comparisons). The overall response was higher with Tal-DP and Tal-D than with DPd (88.2% and 88.5% vs. 77.6%), as was complete response or better (71.1% and 69.0% vs. 34.5%) and measurable residual disease-negative complete response (52.3% and 46.3% vs. 15.9%) (P<0.001 for all comparisons). Overall survival at 24 months was 89.2% with Tal-DP, 87.9% with Tal-D, and 79.1% with DPd (hazard ratio for death, Tal-DP vs. DPd, 0.47 [95% CI, 0.30 to 0.73], and Tal-D vs. DPd, 0.51 [95% CI, 0.33 to 0.78]). Serious adverse events occurred in 63.0%, 52.6%, and 53.7% of the patients in the Tal-DP, Tal-D, and DPd groups, respectively; fatal adverse events occurred in 1.8%, 4.0%, and 4.6%.
abstract.textZh: 共有 287 名、287 名和 290 名患者分別被分配到 Tal-DP、Tal-D 和 DPd 組。中期分析（中位追蹤時間，24.6 個月）中，Tal-DP 和 Tal-D 組的無惡化存活期顯著長於 DPd 組（24 個月估計值，81.3% 和 77.6% vs. 51.2%；疾病惡化或死亡的風險比，Tal-DP vs. DPd， Tal-D 與 DPd，0.33 [95% CI，0.24 至 0.46]；兩個比較 P<0.001）。 Tal-DP 和 Tal-D 的整體緩解率高於 DPd 組（88.2% 和 88.5% vs. 77.6%），完全緩解或更好（71.1% 和 69.0% vs. 34.5%）以及可測量的殘留疾病陰性完全緩解（52.3% 和 46.3% vs. 13%）（所有組）。 Tal-DP 組的 24 個月總存活率為 89.2%，Tal-D 組為 87.9%，DPd 組為 79.1%（死亡風險比，Tal-DP 與 DPd 為 0.47 [95% CI，0.30 至 0.73]，Tal-D DP. 0.78]）。 Tal-DP、Tal-D和DPd組的患者發生嚴重不良事件的比例分別為63.0%、52.6%和53.7%；致命不良事件發生率分別為 1.8%、4.0% 和 4.6%。

abstract.label: CONCLUSIONS
abstract.text: Among patients with relapsed or refractory multiple myeloma who had previously received at least one line of therapy, both Tal-DP and Tal-D led to significantly longer progression-free survival than DPd. (Funded by Johnson & Johnson; MonumenTAL-3 ClinicalTrials.gov number, NCT05455320.).
abstract.textZh: 在先前接受過至少一種治療的複發性或難治性多發性骨髓瘤患者中，Tal-DP 和 Tal-D 均比 DPd 顯著延長了無惡化存活期。 （由強生公司資助；MonumenTAL-3 ClinicalTrials.gov 編號，NCT05455320。）。

articles.titleZh: 他克他單抗-達雷木單抗治療復發性或難治性骨髓瘤

articles.title: Continuing Glucagon-Like Peptide-1 Receptor Agonists Into the First Trimester of Pregnancy and Pregnancy Outcomes : A Target Trial Emulation Study Using Claims Information
articles.authors: Brown JP, Huybrechts KF, Straub L, Patorno E, Seely EW, Bateman BT, Hernández-Díaz S

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Glucagon-like peptide-1 receptor agonist (GLP-1RA) use has increased among women of reproductive age, but limited data exist on safety in pregnancy.
abstract.textZh: 胰高血糖素樣肽-1受體激動劑（ GLP-1RA ）在育齡婦女中的使用有所增加，但關於懷孕安全性的數據有限。

abstract.label: OBJECTIVE
abstract.text: To estimate the risk for nonlive birth, abnormal fetal growth, and major congenital malformation (MCM) with GLP-1RA dispensing in early pregnancy.
abstract.textZh: 估計妊娠早期使用GLP-1RA進行非活產、胎兒異常生長和嚴重先天性畸形(MCM)的風險。

abstract.label: DESIGN
abstract.text: In an observational cohort of pregnant women aged 16 to 55 years with a GLP-1RA dispensation in the 90 days before the last menstrual period (LMP), a target trial with 2 treatment strategies was emulated: continuation of dispensing into the first trimester (≥1 further dispensation), or noncontinuation.
abstract.textZh: 在最後一個月經期（ LMP ）前90天內有GLP-1RA分配的16至55歲孕婦的觀察隊列中，模擬了一項有2種治療策略的目標試驗：繼續分配到孕早期（ ≥ 1次進一步分配） ，或不繼續。

abstract.label: SETTING
abstract.text: Merative MarketScan U.S. insurance claims data (2011 to 2024).
abstract.textZh: Merative MarketScan美國保險理賠數據（ 2011年至2024年）。

abstract.label: PARTICIPANTS
abstract.text: 3572 pregnancies (41.1% [n = 1467] among women with type 2 diabetes).

abstract.label: MEASUREMENTS
abstract.text: Risk for nonlive birth was estimated using a weighted Kaplan-Meier estimator. Among live-birth pregnancies linked to infants, the weighted prevalence of MCM, small for gestational age (SGA), and large for gestational age (LGA) was estimated.
abstract.textZh: 使用加權Kaplan-Meier估計器估計非活產的風險。在與嬰兒有關的活產懷孕中，估計了MCM的加權患病率，小於胎齡（ SGA ） ，大於胎齡（ LGA ）。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: The weighted risk for nonlive birth was 29.7% with continuation and 27.1% with noncontinuation (adjusted risk ratio, 1.09 [95% CI, 0.98 to 1.23]). Among 2529 live-birth pregnancies, 1443 (57.1%) received at least 1 GLP-1RA dispensation after LMP and 1499 (829 continuers) were linked to an infant. Weighted prevalence ratios for continuation versus noncontinuation were 1.29 (CI, 0.82 to 2.06) for SGA, 1.08 (CI, 0.84 to 1.40) for LGA, and 1.21 (CI, 0.83 to 1.82) for MCM.
abstract.textZh: 繼續非活產的加權平均風險為29.7% ，不繼續非活產的加權平均風險為27.1% （調整後風險比， 1.09 [95% CI ， 0.98至1.23] ）。在2529例活產懷孕中， 1443例（ 57.1 ％ ）在LMP後接受了至少一次GLP-1RA分配， 1499例（ 829名繼續者）與嬰兒有關。繼續與不繼續的加權患病率比率為SGA為1.29 （ CI ， 0.82至2.06 ） ， LGA為1.08 （ CI ， 0.84至1.40 ） ， MCM為1.21 （ CI ， 0.83至1.82 ）。

abstract.label: LIMITATION
abstract.text: Potential residual confounding by prior glycemic control.
abstract.textZh: 既往血糖控制的潛在殘留混淆。

abstract.label: CONCLUSION
abstract.text: Risks for nonlive birth, SGA, LGA, and MCM were not definitively higher with continuation of GLP-1RAs into early pregnancy. However, estimates for MCM and SGA were imprecise and were compatible with both no increased risk and clinically relevant differences in risk.
abstract.textZh: 非活產、SGA、LGA和MCM的風險在GLP-1RA持續到妊娠早期時並非明確更高。然而，對MCM和SGA的估計是不精確的，並且與沒有增加的風險和臨牀相關的風險差異相容。

abstract.label: PRIMARY FUNDING SOURCE
abstract.text: National Institutes of Health.
abstract.textZh: 國立衛生研究院。

articles.titleZh: 繼續胰高血糖素樣肽-1受體激動劑進入妊娠和妊娠結局的第一個三個月：使用聲明信息的靶向試驗模擬研究

articles.title: Estimating the Effect of Hospital Admission on Health Care Outcomes and Spending Among Persons With Dementia : A Quasi-experimental Study
articles.authors: Ikesu R, Mayeda ER, McGarry K, Nianogo RA, Ramirez CM, Tsugawa Y

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Because transitions in care settings can be confusing for persons with dementia (PWD), hospital admissions can negatively affect their physical and cognitive function. However, the effect of hospital admissions on patient outcomes and health care spending remains largely unknown.
abstract.textZh: 由於護理環境的轉變可能會讓失智症患者（ PWD ）感到困惑，因此住院可能會對他們的身體和認知功能產生負面影響。然而，住院對患者結果和醫療保健支出的影響在很大程度上仍然未知。

abstract.label: OBJECTIVE
abstract.text: To estimate the effects of hospital admissions on health outcomes and health care spending among PWD.
abstract.textZh: 估計住院對殘疾人健康結果和醫療保健支出的影響。

abstract.label: DESIGN
abstract.text: Quasi-experimental instrumental variable method, using emergency physicians' admission propensity as the instrument.
abstract.textZh: 準實驗工具變量法，以急診醫師的入院傾向為工具。

abstract.label: SETTING
abstract.text: United States.
abstract.textZh: 美國

abstract.label: PATIENTS
abstract.text: Medicare fee-for-service beneficiaries aged 66 years or older with dementia who visited an emergency department (ED) in 2017 to 2019.
abstract.textZh: 年滿66歲或以上患有失智症的Medicare收費服務受益人，於2017年至2019年期間前往急診室（ ED ）。

abstract.label: MEASUREMENTS
abstract.text: Death, inpatient days (excluding the index hospital admission), and health care spending (excluding the index ED visit and hospital admission) within 30 and 90 days of ED visits.
abstract.textZh: ED就診後30天和90天內的死亡、住院天數（不包括指標住院天數）和醫療保健支出（不包括指標ED就診和住院天數）。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: Among 872 085 ED visits (62.9% women; mean age, 83.1 years) included in the analysis, 482 208 (55.3%) resulted in hospital admission. There was no evidence that hospital admission was associated with 30-day mortality rate (adjusted risk difference, -2.6 percentage points [pp] [95% CI, -5.2 to 0.1 pp]) or inpatient days (adjusted difference, 0.1 days [CI, -0.2 to 0.5 days]). Hospital admission was associated with higher 30-day health care spending (adjusted difference, $2547 [CI, $1390 to $3703]). Patterns were similar for 90-day outcomes.
abstract.textZh: 在分析中包括的872 085次ED就診（ 62.9 ％婦女；平均年齡為83.1歲）中， 482 208 （ 55.3 ％ ）導致住院。沒有證據表明住院與30天死亡率（調整後的風險差異， -2.6個百分點[pp] [95% CI ， -5.2至0.1 pp] ）或住院天數（調整後的差異， 0.1天[CI ， -0.2至0.5天] ）有關。住院與較高的30天醫療保健支出相關（調整後的差異， $ 2547 [CI ， $ 1390至$ 3703] ）。90天結果的模式相似。

abstract.label: LIMITATION
abstract.text: Residual confounding.
abstract.textZh: 剩餘的混淆。

abstract.label: CONCLUSION
abstract.text: Among Medicare beneficiaries with dementia who visited an ED, there was no evidence that hospital admission was associated with mortality rates. Under conventional statistical criteria, an effect of hospital admissions between a 5.2-pp decrease and a 0.1-pp increase in 30-day mortality rates was highly compatible with the data. On the contrary, hospital admission was associated with higher health care spending.
abstract.textZh: 在訪問ED的Medicare失智症受益人中，沒有證據表明住院與死亡率有關。在傳統統計標準下，住院率在30天死亡率降低5.2pp和增加0.1pp之間的影響與數據高度相容。相反，住院與更高的醫療支出有關。

abstract.label: PRIMARY FUNDING SOURCE
abstract.text: None.
abstract.textZh: 無。

articles.titleZh: 估計入院對失智症患者醫療結果和支出的影響：準實驗研究

articles.title: Moving on from patient safety incidents: a qualitative study exploring GP perspectives in England
articles.authors: Tawse J, Armitage C, Chew-Graham CA, Panagioti M

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Patient safety incidents (PSIs), defined as unintended or unexpected events that could have or did lead to patient harm, can have profound effects on general practitioners (GPs). Understanding how GPs experience and recover from PSIs is important for workforce wellbeing and patient safety in primary care.
abstract.textZh: 患者安全事件（ PSI ）被定義為可能或確實導致患者受傷的意外或意外事件，可能對全科醫生（ GP ）產生深遠影響。了解全科醫生如何體驗並從PSI中恢復，對於初級保健中的員工福祉和患者安全非常重要。

abstract.label: AIM
abstract.text: To explore how GPs experience PSIs, how they move on, and how they use available support.
abstract.textZh: 探索全科醫生如何體驗PSI、他們如何繼續前進，以及他們如何使用可用的支援。

abstract.label: DESIGN & SETTING
abstract.text: Qualitative study with GPs in England.
abstract.textZh: 在英國與全科醫生進行定性研究。

abstract.label: METHOD
abstract.text: Semi-structured interviews were conducted with 22 GPs. Data were analysed using thematic analysis. Participants were eligible if they had been involved in a PSI in general practice, spanning near misses to events resulting in patient harm. Themes were developed inductively and mapped onto the Theoretical Domains Framework (TDF) to identify cognitive, social, and environmental influences on learning, help-seeking, and recovery.
abstract.textZh: 與22位全科醫生進行了半結構化訪談。使用主題分析對數據進行分析。如果參與者在一般實踐中參與了PSI ，從幾乎錯過到導致患者受傷的事件，則符合資格。主題是歸納開發的，並映射到理論領域框架（ TDF ）上，以識別認知、社會和環境對學習、尋求幫助和恢復的影響。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: Three themes were generated: personal and professional consequences, recovery and learning processes, and barriers to healing. GPs described emotional responses, including guilt, self-doubt, and fear of reputational or regulatory consequences. Peer support was valued, but access to structured support was limited. Formal investigations were experienced as distressing and compounded emotional impact. Recovery and learning were facilitated by empathetic, systems-focused cultures, protected time for reflection, and structured opportunities to learn from incidents.
abstract.textZh: 產生了三個主題：個人和專業後果、恢復和學習過程以及治療障礙。全科醫生描述了情緒反應，包括內疚、自我懷疑以及對聲譽或監管後果的恐懼。同儕支持受到重視，但獲得結構化支持的機會有限。正式調查被認為是令人痛苦和複雜的情緒影響。同理心、以系統為中心的文化、受保護的反思時間，以及從事件中學習的結構化機會，都有助於恢復和學習。

abstract.label: CONCLUSION
abstract.text: GPs rely on informal and self-directed strategies to recover from PSIs, with variable access to formal support. Recovery is shaped by individual and organisational factors. Findings highlight importance of compassionate, non-punitive support systems and psychologically safe environments to enable recovery and promote learning.
abstract.textZh: 全科醫生依靠非正式和自我導向的策略來從PSI中恢復，並可獲得可變的正式支持。恢復是由個人和組織因素塑造的。研究結果強調了富有同情心、非懲罰性的支持系統和心理安全環境的重要性，以促進康復和促進學習。

articles.titleZh: 繼續研究患者安全事件：一項探索英國全科醫生觀點的定性研究

articles.title: Fighting to be heard: Thematic analysis of parent perspectives of safety in general practice
articles.authors: Purchase T, Quinn-Scoggins HD, McFadzean IJ, Donovan L, Hope I, Clarke E, Lifford KJ, Hodson N, et al.

abstract.text: Background Children are particularly vulnerable to healthcare-associated harm. Parents play a vital but under-recognised protective role in paediatric patient safety. Parent perceptions of and contributions to safety improvement efforts within hospital settings are well documented, but little is known about parent experiences and perspectives in primary care. Aim To explore diverse parental perspectives on paediatric safety in primary care and identify target areas for improvement. Design/Setting A qualitative study was conducted through online (n=2) and in-person (n=2) workshops with parents, taking place between June and July 2024. Method Workshops were structured around a descriptive analysis of paediatric patient safety incident reports in general practice. Parents discussed and reflected on their own experiences in relation to the findings. Thematic analysis of transcripts and field notes was conducted via NVIVO to identify key themes. Results Thirty-three parents from varied backgrounds, including under-served communities, participated. Three major themes are described: (1) Responsibility of care, highlighting perceived unclear roles between parents and healthcare teams; (2) Navigating the system, where parents described the need to 'fight' for care and the challenges of understanding healthcare processes; and (3) Communication and language, emphasising the difficulties of being heard, especially among ethnic minority parents and those lacking the confidence to speak up. Conclusion Parent perspectives on paediatric safety in primary care have highlighted key areas for practices, researchers and safety improvement teams to target system change and intervention development. Engaging parents as co-partners in these efforts could enhance trust, reduce risk, and improve safety outcomes for paediatric patients.
abstract.textZh: 背景兒童特別容易受到與醫療保健相關的傷害。 父母在兒科患者安全方面起著至關重要但未被認可的保護作用。 家長對醫院環境中安全改善工作的看法和貢獻有據可查，但對家長在初級保健方面的經驗和觀點知之甚少。 目的探索父母對初級護理中兒科安全的不同觀點，並確定需要改善的目標領域。 設計/設定在2024年6月至7月期間，透過與家長的線上（ n = 2 ）和面對面（ n = 2 ）工作坊進行定性研究。 方法研討會是圍繞一般實踐中兒科患者安全事件報告的描述性分析而組織的。 父母討論並反思他們自己與調查結果相關的經驗。 通過NVIVO對成績單和現場筆記進行了主題分析，以確定關鍵主題。 結果有33位來自不同背景的家長參與，包括服務不足的社區。 描述了三個主要主題： （ 1 ）照護的責任，強調父母和醫療團隊之間感知不清晰的角色; （ 2 ）導航系統，父母描述了需要“戰鬥”的照護和理解醫療保健過程的挑戰; （ 3 ）溝通和語言，強調被傾聽的困難，特別是在少數族裔父母和那些缺乏說話信心的人中

articles.title: Recommended point-of-care tests in out-of-hours primary care: A modified Delphi study
articles.authors: Redek L, Brettell R, Payne RE, Huibers L, Homar V

abstract.text: Background Point-of-care tests (POCTs) are increasingly used to enhance diagnostic accuracy and facilitate rapid clinical decision-making in settings with limited laboratory access. However, there is currently no consensus on which POCTs should be routinely available in out-of-hours (OOH) primary care services. Aim To establish expert consensus on which POCTs should be considered essential or optional in European OOH primary care services. Design and Setting A modified Delphi consensus study involving an international panel of experts from 20 European countries, representing diverse clinical and academic backgrounds in OOH primary care. Method A three-round Delphi process was conducted. Round 1 assessed current POCT availability via questionnaire. In Round 2, panellists rated 28 POCTs as essential, optional, or unnecessary. In Round 3, results were discussed in a structured in-person workshop, followed by anonymous re-voting. Consensus was predefined as ≥66.6% agreement. Results Six POCTs achieved consensus as essential: blood glucose, urine dipstick, C-reactive protein (CRP), pregnancy testing, electrocardiography (ECG), and haemoglobin measurement. Twelve tests were classified as optional, while ten were deemed unnecessary. Key concerns included inappropriate use, variability in clinician confidence, and patient-driven demand. Conclusion This study provides the first European consensus on POCT prioritisation in OOH primary care. Implementation of essential POCTs, supported by training and governance, may improve diagnostic efficiency, while optional tests should be tailored to local service needs.
abstract.textZh: 背景護理點測試（ POCT ）越來越多地用於提高診斷準確性，並在實驗室訪問受限的環境中促進快速臨牀決策。 然而，目前尚未就非工作時間（ OOH ）初級保健服務中應定期提供哪些POCT達成共識。 目的建立專家共識，確定哪些POCT在歐洲OOH初級保健服務中應被視為必不可少或可選。 設計和設定經過修改的Delphi共識研究，涉及來自20個歐洲國家的國際專家小組，代表OOH初級保健的不同臨牀和學術背景。 方法進行三輪德爾菲過程。 第1輪通過問卷評估當前POCT的可用性。 在第2輪中，專題小組成員將28個POCT評為必要、可選或不必要。 在第3輪中，在結構化的現場工作坊中討論結果，然後進行匿名重新投票。 共識預定義為大於或等於66.6%。 結果六個POCT達成了共識：血糖，尿液試紙， C反應蛋白（ CRP ） ，妊娠測試，心電圖（ ECG ）和血紅蛋白測量。 十二個測試被歸類為可選，而十個被認為是不必要的。 關鍵問題包括不當使用、臨牀醫師信心的變異性以及患者驅動的需求。 結論這項研究提供了歐洲對OOH初級保健中POCT優先順序的第一個共識。 實施必要的POCT ，

articles.title: Early start of urate-lowering therapy improves serum urate control: results from a large national primary care cohort
articles.authors: Pou MA, Reyes C, Martinez-Laguna D, Satorra P, Tebe C, Dalbeth N, Diaz-Torne C

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Gout is a prevalent chronic inflammatory disease associated with a substantial clinical and cardiovascular burden. Despite the availability of effective urate-lowering therapies (ULT), gout management remains suboptimal.
abstract.textZh: 痛風是一種流行的慢性炎症性疾病，伴隨著大量的臨牀和心血管負擔。儘管有有效的降尿酸療法（ ULT ） ，但痛風管理仍然不理想。

abstract.label: AIM
abstract.text: To describe clinical characteristics and treatment patterns, and to identify factors associated with long-term serum urate (SU) control in gout.
abstract.textZh: 描述臨牀特徵和治療模式，並確定與痛風中長期血清尿酸（ SU ）控制相關的因素。

abstract.label: DESIGN AND SETTING
abstract.text: Retrospective population-based cohort study using the Primary Care Research Database (SIDIAP), covering >75% of Catalan population within a universal healthcare system.
abstract.textZh: 使用初級保健研究資料庫（ SIDIAP ）的回溯性人羣隊列研究，涵蓋全民醫療系統中> 75%的加泰隆尼亞人口。

abstract.label: METHOD
abstract.text: Individuals with incident gout diagnosed between 2012-2023 were included. Demographic, clinical, and ULT data were collected. Good SU control was defined as SU levels <6 mg/dL for at least 80% of follow-up time. Factors associated with SU control were analysed.
abstract.textZh: 2012年至2023年間診斷出痛風事件的個體也被納入其中。收集了人口統計學、臨牀和ULT數據。良好的SU控制定義為在至少80%的隨訪時間內SU濃度< 6 mg/dL。分析了與SU對照相關的因素。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: A total of 94,759 patients were included (mean age 66.3 years; 79.6% male; median follow-up 5.4 years). Hypertension (65.2%), dyslipidaemia (50.6%), diabetes (24.2%), and chronic kidney disease (32.8%) were common. 88.9% had at least one SU measurement. 37.3% never received ULT. Allopurinol was the initial therapy in 96.1% of treated patients. Only 12.4% achieved good SU control, with no improvement over time. Short ULT duration (≤25 days) occurred in 15.9% of patients. Good control was associated with longer treatment duration, higher allopurinol doses, febuxostat use, and better adherence, while delayed ULT initiation, male sex, obesity, chronic kidney disease, dyslipidaemia, and hypertension were associated with poor control.
abstract.textZh: 共有94,759名患者被納入（平均年齡66.3歲； 79.6%男性；中位隨訪5.4年）。高血壓(65.2%)、血脂異常(50.6%)、糖尿病(24.2%)和慢性腎臟疾病(32.8%)常見。88.9%至少進行一次SU測量。37.3%從未接受ULT。別嘌呤醇是96.1%接受治療的患者的初始治療。只有12.4%取得了良好的SU控制，但隨著時間的推移沒有改善。15.9%的患者發生ULT持續時間短（ ≤ 25天）。良好的控制與更長的治療持續時間、更高的別嘌呤醇劑量、非布司他使用和更好的依從性相關，而延遲ULT開始、男性、肥胖、慢性腎病、血脂異常和高血壓與不良的控制相關。

abstract.label: CONCLUSION
abstract.text: Long-term SU control in gout remains poor in primary care. Early initiation of ULT, appropriate dose optimisation, and improved adherence represent key modifiable targets to improve gout management.
abstract.textZh: 痛風的長期SU控制在初級保健中仍然很差。早期開始ULT、適當的劑量優化和改善的依從性是改善痛風管理的關鍵可修改目標。

articles.title: Diagnostic models for male lower urinary tract symptom management in primary care
articles.authors: Harding C, Agarwal R, Bates J, Bray A, Milosevic S, Thomas-Jones E, Drinnan M, Drake MJ, et al.

abstract.text: Objectives - To develop and independently validate risk-prediction models for three common urological conditions based on a combination of simple, minimally-invasive index tests in men with lower urinary tract symptoms (LUTS) presenting to primary care. Design - A prospective, multicentre, diagnostic accuracy study with independent development and validation cohorts. Setting - 67 general practices in England and Wales. Participants - 601 men presenting to primary care with LUTS: 350 in the development cohort and 251 in the validation cohort. Interventions -Index tests - validated symptom assessment, bladder diary, physical examination, serum prostate specific antigen, uroflowmetry and post-void residual volume estimation. Invasive urodynamic studies provided a diagnostic reference standard. Risk prediction models were developed and validated in independent cohorts. Main outcome measures - Discriminative and calibration performance of the risk prediction models for diagnosing bladder outlet obstruction (BOO), detrusor underactivity (DU) and detrusor overactivity (DO) using the c-index, calibration slope and plot and sensitivity and specificity of the models. Results - The BOO model from the development cohort demonstrated good discriminative performance (optimism-corrected c-index of 0.80). The models derived from the development cohort for DU and DO demonstrated moderate discriminative ability (optimism-corrected c-indices of 0.64 and 0.67 respectively). Similar estimates of c-index were observed for each model within the independent validation cohort (BOO=0.82, DU= 0.63 and DO =0.62).. Conclusions - Using a combination of simple, non-invasive index tests can accurately predict common urological diagnoses in men with LUTS, potentially facilitating earlier initiation of evidence-based treatments and improved management in primary care.
abstract.textZh: 目的-基於對初級保健的男性下尿路症狀（ LUTS ）的簡單、微創指數測試的組合，開發並獨立驗證三種常見泌尿系統疾病的風險預測模型。 設計-具有獨立開發和驗證隊列的前瞻性、多中心、診斷準確性研究。 背景-英格蘭和威爾斯的67個一般實踐。 參與者- 601名接受LUTS初級護理的男性：發展隊列中的350名和驗證隊列中的251名。 幹預措施-指數測試-經過驗證的症狀評估、膀胱日記、體格檢查、血清前列腺特異性抗原、尿流量測定和排尿後剩餘體積估計。 侵入性尿動力學研究提供了診斷參考標準。 在獨立隊列中開發並驗證了風險預測模型。 主要結果測量-使用模型的c指數、校準斜率和繪圖以及靈敏度和特異度來診斷膀胱出口阻塞（ BOO ）、逼尿肌活動不足（ DU ）和逼尿肌活動過度（ DO ）的風險預測模型的判別和校準性能。 結果-來自發展隊列的BOO模型顯示出良好的辨別績效（樂觀糾正的c指數為0.80 ）。 來自DU和DO發展隊列的模型顯示出中度辨別能力（樂觀修正的c指數分別為0.64和0.67 ）。類似的估計

articles.titleZh: 初級保健中男性下尿路症狀管理的診斷模型

articles.title: The Sieve of Asclepius: A History of Navigating the Medical Literature, From Index to Algorithm
articles.authors: Lea AS, Podolsky SH

abstract.text: For centuries, physicians have lamented the proliferating medical literature. This article traces the evolving strategies by which physicians have attempted to render this literature navigable for the purposes of research, teaching, and patient care. Beginning with John Shaw Billings' foundational indexing work at the Library of the Surgeon General's Office, the article examines successive (and overlapping) search regimes-including personal curation practices, abstract journals, pharmaceutical industry information services, citation indexing, and computerized retrieval systems-analyzing how each embedded value judgments about what counted as important or useful medical knowledge. Even as systems of search have evolved over time in conjunction with new technologic capabilities, business models, and search-related behavioral patterns, they have also grappled with enduring tensions between selectivity and comprehensiveness, between commercialism and scientific merit, and among the very boundaries of the conditions to be categorized and navigated. This history underscores how systems of search are not external maps of the knowledge ecosystem but are constitutive of it, influencing everything from journal rankings to research priorities to clinical practice. As literature search becomes integrated with artificial intelligence capabilities, a historical perspective helps physicians appreciate how such technologies condition what they know.
abstract.textZh: 幾個世紀以來，醫生們一直對醫學文獻的激增感到遺憾。 本文追蹤了醫生試圖為研究、教學和患者護理目的導航此文獻的不斷發展的策略。 從約翰·肖·比林斯（ John Shaw Billings ）在外科醫生辦公室圖書館的基礎索引工作開始，本文研究了連續（和重疊）的搜索制度，包括個人策展實踐、摘要期刊、製藥行業信息服務、引文索引和電腦化檢索系統，分析了每個嵌入式價值判斷如何判斷哪些是重要或有用的醫學知識。 即使搜索系統隨著時間的推移與新的技術能力、商業模式和與搜索相關的行為模式一起發展，它們也一直在努力應對選擇性和全面性之間、商業主義和科學價值之間，以及要分類和導航的條件邊界之間的持久緊張關係。 這段歷史強調了搜索系統不是知識生態系統的外部地圖，而是其組成部分，影響著從期刊排名到研究優先順序到臨牀實踐的一切。 隨著文獻搜尋與人工智慧功能整合，歷史觀點有助於醫師了解這些技術如何調節他們所知道的內容。

articles.titleZh: 阿斯克勒庇俄斯的篩：醫學文獻導覽史，從索引到演算法

articles.title: Relationships of actual and expected levels of income with GP job satisfaction: a repeated cross-sectional study
articles.authors: Walker B, Anderson M, Ganepola R, Hutchinson J, Gibson J, Urwin S, Checkland K, Sutton M

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Income is known to be a key driver of job satisfaction, especially when compared to expectations. The pertinence of this for General Practitioners (GPs) is not fully understood.
abstract.textZh: 眾所周知，收入是工作滿意度的關鍵驅動因素，尤其是與預期相比。這與全科醫生（ GP ）的相關性尚不完全清楚。

abstract.label: AIM
abstract.text: To examine whether GP job satisfaction and intentions to quit are affected by actual and expected levels of income.
abstract.textZh: 檢查全科醫生的工作滿意度和辭職意圖是否受到實際和預期收入水平的影響。

abstract.label: DESIGN AND SETTING
abstract.text: We analysed responses to four waves of the GP Worklife Survey, a survey of GPs in England, between 2015 and 2021.
abstract.textZh: 我們分析了2015年至2021年間英國全科醫生工作生活調查（ GP Worklife Survey ）的四波回應。

abstract.label: METHOD
abstract.text: We used linear regression models to examine the associations of actual income with 10 domains of job satisfaction and three aspects of intentions to quit, adjusted for potential confounders. We then added respondents' self-reported expected income to these models. Finally, we repeated these analyses, stratifying by contract status and age.
abstract.textZh: 我們使用線性迴歸模型來檢查實際收入與10個工作滿意度領域和三個辭職意圖方面的關聯，並針對潛在的混雜因素進行調整。然後，我們將受訪者自我報告的預期收入添加到這些模型中。最後，我們重複這些分析，按合約狀態和年齡分層。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: Higher actual income was significantly associated with increased satisfaction across most job satisfaction domains except for amount of variety in your job, satisfaction with colleagues, and physical working conditions. There was little evidence of a relationship between actual income and intentions to quit. Higher expected income, conditional on actual income, was significantly associated with reduced job satisfaction across all domains, and increased intentions to quit. The relationship between expected income and job satisfaction was stronger for GPs under 40, and the relationship between actual income and job satisfaction was stronger for GP partners and for GPs over 50 years old.
abstract.textZh: 除了工作的多樣性、對同事的滿意度和實際工作條件之外，實際收入的增加與大多數工作滿意度領域的滿意度提高顯著相關。實際收入與辭職意圖之間的關係幾乎沒有證據。以實際收入為條件的較高預期收入與所有領域的工作滿意度降低以及辭職意願增加顯著相關。預期收入和工作滿意度之間的關係對於40歲以下的全科醫生來說更強，實際收入和工作滿意度之間的關係對於全科醫生合作夥伴和50歲以上的全科醫生來說更強。

abstract.label: CONCLUSION
abstract.text: Income is a determinant of GP job satisfaction. Discrepancy between expected and actual income is an important source of dissatisfaction and intentions to quit.
abstract.textZh: 收入是全科醫生工作滿意度的決定因素。預期收入和實際收入之間的差異是不滿意和打算退出的重要來源。

articles.titleZh: 實際和預期收入水平與GP工作滿意度的關係：重複的橫斷面研究

articles.title: Who are we listening to? A Systematic Scoping Review of Surveys Exploring Patient Satisfaction, Care Experience, And Access to Primary Care Services
articles.authors: Estupiñán Fernández de Mesa M, Hassan E, Hobabagabo A, Friedemann Smith C, von Wagner C, Cox A, Kerrison RS, Whitaker K

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Globally, patient surveys are used to improve quality of primary care services. Survey items lacking an equity focus may limit the applicability of findings, leading to changes in services that are not tailored to the needs of underserved populations (e.g., socially disadvantaged populations and those with greater needs).
abstract.textZh: 在全球範圍內，患者調查被用於提高初級保健服務的質量。缺乏公平重點的調查項目可能會限制調查結果的適用性，導致服務變化不適合服務不足的人羣（例如，社會弱勢羣體和需求更大的人羣）的需求。

abstract.label: AIM
abstract.text: To review the global literature to 1) identify validated surveys used to evaluate quality in primary care and 2) assess if these surveys were designed for underserved populations (using the Candidacy Framework: a tool designed to examine equity in primary care).
abstract.textZh: 審查全球文獻，以1 ）確定用於評估初級護理質量的經過驗證的調查，以及2 ）評估這些調查是否為服務不足的人羣設計（使用候選人框架：一種旨在檢查初級護理公平性的工具）。

abstract.label: DESIGN AND SETTING
abstract.text: The Arksey and O'Malley framework for systematic scoping reviews guided the study. All findings were reported according to the PRISMA-Equity 2012 guidelines.
abstract.textZh: Arksey和O'Malley的系統範圍審查框架指導了這項研究。所有結果均根據PRISMA-Equity 2012指南報告。

abstract.label: METHOD
abstract.text: Five datasets Medline, CINHAL, PsycINFO, Embase, and Web of Science and reference lists of relevant published literature were systematically searched to identify studies that reported validated quantitative survey to assess access of primary care services, and/or care experience and patient satisfaction.
abstract.textZh: 系統搜索了五個數據集Medline、CINHAL、PsycINFO、Embase和Web of Science以及相關已發表文獻的參考列表，以確定報告經過驗證的定量調查的研究，以評估初級保健服務的獲取和/或護理經驗和患者滿意度。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: From 5,404 records, 69 articles were included, and 46 unique surveys identified. Twenty-one articles (30%) reported a survey tailored to underserved populations or contexts. Most survey items mapped to permeability of services, with few focused on adjudication by healthcare professionals or digital care experience. Tools assessing dimensions of quality in primary care often overlook the potentially nuanced experience of underserved populations (e.g., ableism, racism).

articles.title: Non-antibiotic interventions to prevent recurrent urinary tract infections in women: overview of systematic reviews of randomised controlled trials
articles.authors: Santer M, Miller S, Fraser S, Francis N, Lown M, Becque T, Tenters F, Hanna L, et al.

abstract.text: Background Recurrent urinary tract infections (rUTI), i.e. 2 or more UTIs in last 6 months or 3 or more in last 12 months, are common, have substantial impact on quality of life and cause major antibiotic use. Design Overview of systematic reviews of randomised controlled trials (RCTs) of non-pharmaceutical and pharmaceutical (non-antibiotic) interventions for preventing rUTI in women. Methods We searched MEDLINE, EMBASE, CINAHL, Google Scholar and Cochrane from January 2014 to May 2025 for systematic reviews of RCTs assessing effectiveness of community-based non-antibiotic interventions for preventing UTI in women aged 16 or over with rUTI. We excluded studies in intensive care units, people with indwelling catheters or comparing different oral antibiotic regimens. There were no limitations regarding outcome measures or language. Findings 27 systematic reviews met inclusion criteria evaluating probiotics (9), D-mannose (7), vaginal oestrogen (7), cranberry (6), methenamine hippurate (3), herbal medicine (3), increased fluid intake (2), systemic oestrogen (4), acupuncture (2), vaccines (2). Eight examined combination strategies. Cranberry and methenamine hippurate use are supported by systematic reviews, as is vaginal oestrogen amongst postmenopausal women, although questions remain around dose, duration and treatment adherence. Reviews of probiotics, D-mannose, herbal medicine, acupuncture and vaccines concluded that stronger evidence is needed. Increased fluid intake benefits women with low intake, but further research is needed on optimal intake. There was little information on treatment adherence or acceptability for many interventions. Conclusions For effective interventions, questions remain about optimal use and for many stronger evidence is needed.

articles.title: Online triage and cancer diagnostic activity in general practice: cross-sectional study
articles.authors: Paule A, Atherton H, Parsons J, Hiller L, Abel GA

abstract.text: Background Patient facing online triage tools potentially offer GPs a way to recognise cancer related symptoms and features to facilitate appropriate suspected cancer referrals. Little is known about their impact on cancer diagnostic process and outcomes. Aim To describe patterns of cancer outcome and process indicators associated with the use of online triage tools in primary care. Design and setting Publicly reported data on 3,053 English general practices using an online triage tool, linked to practice level data on 31,233,594 triage forms in 2022/2023. Method Cross-sectional analysis (mixed-effects regression) of the association between the annual rate of eConsult forms received (weighted to practice registrations) and various cancer diagnosis process and outcome measures. Results Increased use of online triage forms was associated with higher rates of Urgent Suspected Cancer (USC) referrals and investigations, for example there was a 7.75% difference in colonoscopy rate (95%CI: 3.83% to 8.98%) across the 90% mid-range of practices. Despite this, there was no evidence of an association with USC referrals resulting in diagnosis or emergency presentations. Conclusion Greater use of online triage forms is associated with more investigations and referrals for suspected cancer, but not associated with better diagnostic outcomes. This may indicate that any additional referrals are of lower quality and overall there is an increase in inappropriate use of USC referrals. Research is needed to understand how this impacts investigations and referrals for individual patients.

articles.title: Primary Care Cardiovascular Risk Reduction after Pregnancy Complications: A Qualitative Systematic Review
articles.authors: Hodges VJ, Shareef S, Chew-Graham CA, Wu P, Adetola M, Mitchell C

abstract.text: Background Adverse pregnancy outcomes (APOs) affect approximately 30% of pregnancies and confer lifelong elevated cardiovascular disease (CVD) risk. Behavioural interventions may mitigate this risk. Aim To systematically review qualitative literature on women's experiences of behavioural change for cardiovascular risk reduction following APOs, with a focus on health equity. Design and setting Qualitative systematic review. Limited to high income countries with universal access to healthcare. Method A systematic search of PubMed, Embase, CINAHL from inception to March 2025 identified primary studies. Thematic synthesis followed Thomas and Harden's three-stage approach. Themes were mapped onto the COM-B framework to theoretically ground and structure analysis. Results Eighteen studies involving 339 women met inclusion criteria. Minority ethnic women formed the majority in only two studies. Demographic data regarding socio-economic status, ethnicity or both were absent from five. Experiences shaping behaviour change aligned with COM-B domains. Delayed physical and psychological recovery after APOs reduced women's capability to initiate changes. Competing demands, including childcare, household responsibilities and work, restricted opportunity to focus on long‑term cardiovascular health. Opportunities improved when behaviour changes were easily integrated into family life and offered shared benefits. Motivation was strengthened by awareness of increased CVD risk, the responsibilities of parenthood, and personalised advice from healthcare professionals. Tailored, proactive follow‑up supported engagement, especially for minority ethnic and socio‑economically disadvantaged groups. Conclusion Prevention of CVD after APOs requires structured, system‑level support to prioritise family-based behaviour change. High-risk groups are under‑represented in research; coproducing interventions with these groups may help to avoid widening health inequalities.

articles.title: Equity and impact of social prescribing in type 2 diabetes prevention: cross-sectional and cohort study using national primary care data
articles.authors: Calderón-Larrañaga S, Meza-Torres B, de Lusignan S, Mathur R, Finer S, Stow D

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Social prescribing(SP) has expanded rapidly in English primary care since 2019 to support the prevention and management of long-term conditions. However,evidence on its equity of access and effectiveness for type 2 diabetes(T2D) prevention is limited.
abstract.textZh: 自2019年以來，社會處方（ SP ）在英國初級保健領域迅速擴展，以支持長期病症的預防和管理。然而，關於2型糖尿病（ T2D ）預防的公平獲取和有效性的證據有限。

abstract.label: AIM
abstract.text: To examine the reach,equity of access,and potential impact of SP on T2D prevention among adults at high risk. Design&Setting.Observational study using routinely collected data from the Royal College of General Practitioners Research and Surveillance Centre, including 1,790 general practices in England(January 2019-November 2023).

abstract.label: METHOD
abstract.text: Cross-sectional analyses using multivariable logistic regression examined factors associated with SP referral amongst adults at high risk of T2D.Cohort analyses estimated the association between SP referral and incident T2D, adjusting for baseline covariates. We used calendar-period-stratified Cox models to capture programme roll-out and COVID-19 changes.Exploratory time-since-index analyses tested whether effects varied over time.

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: Among 2,326,400 adults at high-risk of T2D, 271,582(11.7%)developed T2D over a median 3.7 years.Referrals to SP increased 27-fold from 0.3% to 7.1% and were more common among women(aOR 1.42 [95%CI1.40-1.43]),individuals living in more deprived areas(aOR:1.89 [95%CI:1.86-1.93]), current smokers(1.71 [1.68-1.73]),people with obesity(1.19 [1.17-1.21]), depression/anxiety(2.52 [2.49-2.54]),and multimorbidity(1.45 [1.43-1.47]).By calendar year,SP was associated with increased risk in 2019(aHR 1.67 [1.20-2.32]) but became protective by 2023 (aHR 0.84 [0.79-0.89]).By follow-up,SP increased risk within 0-2 years post-referral(aHR 1.09 [1.04-1.15])but was protective after ≥3 years (aHR 0.88 [0.80-0.97]).

abstract.label: CONCLUSION
abstract.text: SP reached those with greater health and social need. The protective association against T2D emerged as services matured post-COVID and with longer follow-up, potentially reflecting cumulative engagement, though activity data were unavailable.

articles.title: Nausea and Vomiting During Pregnancy
articles.authors: Williamson B, Light KJ, Chapa H

abstract.text: Nausea and vomiting are some of the most common symptoms during pregnancy. Severity should be assessed with a tool such as the Pregnancy-Unique Quantification of Emesis and Nausea (PUQE) score. In severe cases, additional medical history should be obtained to rule out possible secondary causes. Treatment depends on the severity of symptoms, beginning with behavioral modification such as trigger avoidance and dietary changes for mild cases. Modification includes meals that are small, frequent, bland, dry, and high in protein. First-line pharmacologic management for mild or moderate cases is vitamin B6 with or without doxylamine. When conservative measures are ineffective or not tolerated, additional pharmacologic options include other antihistamines or dopamine antagonists. Metoclopramide and ondansetron are considered second-line treatments for persistent symptoms. Dehydration and electrolyte abnormalities should be corrected and may necessitate hospitalization if oral intake is not possible. Treatment of refractory or severe symptoms include the consideration of corticosteroids and, in rare cases, supplemental enteral or parenteral nutrition.
abstract.textZh: 噁心和嘔吐是懷孕期間最常見的症狀。 應使用妊娠獨特的嘔吐和噁心量化(PUQE)評分等工具評估嚴重程度。 在嚴重情況下，應獲得額外的病史以排除可能的次要原因。 治療取決於症狀的嚴重程度，從行為改變開始，例如輕微病例的觸發回避和飲食改變。 修飾包括少量、頻繁、平淡、乾燥和高蛋白質的餐點。 輕度或中度病例的一線藥理治療是維生素B6加或不加多西拉明。 當保守措施無效或不能耐受時，其他藥理選項包括其他抗組胺藥或多巴胺拮抗劑。 Metoclopramide和ondansetron被認為是持續症狀的第二線治療藥物。 脫水和電解質異常應予以糾正，如果無法口服，可能需要住院治療。 難治性或嚴重症狀的治療包括考慮使用皮質類固醇，在極少數情況下，考慮補充腸內或腸外營養。

articles.title: Metabolic Dysfunction-Associated Steatotic Liver Disease: Diagnosis and Management
articles.authors: Ohri S, Waterman E, Quiñones AR

abstract.text: Metabolic dysfunction-associated steatotic liver disease (MASLD; formerly nonalcoholic fatty liver disease) is an increasingly common cause of chronic liver disease. It is fatty infiltration of the liver with at least one cardiometabolic risk factor, without a secondary cause and no or low alcohol use. People with MASLD and other risk factors (eg, diabetes, obesity) are at higher risk for long-term adverse outcomes, including cirrhosis and hepatocellular carcinoma. Screening for advanced fibrosis involves two-step sequential noninvasive testing. Clinicians should risk stratify using the Fibrosis-4 index. Secondary risk assessment with vibration-controlled transient elastography or ultrasound-based methods is needed in people with indeterminate or high-risk Fibrosis-4 scores. Monitoring and management of earlier stages of the MASLD spectrum in primary care may reduce the risk of adverse outcomes and maximize care before specialist referral. Patients should be counseled on lifestyle interventions (eg, at least 5% weight loss for people with overweight or obesity, healthy diet, at least 150 minutes of moderate aerobic physical activity per week) to improve steatosis and lower cardiovascular risk. Additional lifestyle recommendations include smoking cessation, limited alcohol intake in people with no or mild fibrosis, and no alcohol for those with more significant fibrosis. Semaglutide and resmetirom are approved by the US Food and Drug Administration for treatment of metabolic dysfunction- associated steatohepatitis in patients with moderate or severe fibrosis.
abstract.textZh: 代謝功能障礙相關脂肪性肝病（ MASLD ；以前稱為非酒精性脂肪性肝病）是慢性肝病越來越常見的原因。 這是肝臟的脂肪浸潤，至少有一個心臟代謝危險因素，沒有次要原因，沒有或低酒精使用。 患有MASLD和其他風險因素（如糖尿病、肥胖症）的人，長期不良結果的風險較高，包括肝硬化和肝細胞癌。 晚期纖維化篩查包括兩步驟順序無創檢測。 臨牀醫生應使用Fibrosis-4指數進行風險分層。 對於不確定或高風險纖維化-4評分的人羣，需要使用振動控制的瞬態彈性成像或基於超聲波的方法進行次要風險評估。 在初級保健中監測和管理MASLD譜系的早期階段可以降低不良結果的風險，並在專科轉介之前最大限度地提高護理效果。 應建議患者採取生活方式幹預措施（例如，超重或肥胖、健康飲食、每週至少150分鐘中度有氧身體活動的人至少減重5% ） ，以改善脂肪變性和降低心血管風險。 其他生活方式建議包括戒煙、對沒有或輕度纖維化的人限制飲酒，以及對纖維化較嚴重的人禁止飲酒。 Semaglutide和resmetirom獲得美國食品和藥物管理局批準用於代謝治療

articles.title: Type 2 Diabetes: Outpatient Insulin Management
articles.authors: Marrison ST, Bragg S, Tran E

abstract.text: More than 29 million adults in the United States are diagnosed with type 2 diabetes, and insulin therapy is estimated to be needed in up to 15% of cases. Insulin should be considered first-line treatment in patients with severe hyperglycemia (eg, A1C greater than 10%, blood glucose 300 mg/dL or higher), symptoms of hyperglycemia, or catabolism. To optimize insulin use in an outpatient setting, family physicians must consider strategies for initiation, titration, and adherence. The preferred starting regimen is basal insulin with stepwise intensification to prandial or premixed insulin. Insulin regimens can be titrated as frequently as every 2 to 3 days until blood glucose targets are reached. Long-acting insulin analogues offer improved duration of action and reduced risk of hypoglycemia compared with intermediate-acting insulin. Continuous glucose monitoring may improve diabetes control and can be considered in patients who need insulin. Weight gain, hypoglycemia, and insulin regimen complexity are key challenges in diabetes management. Family physicians should use individualized targets that consider life expectancy, age, medical comorbidities, and hypoglycemia risk. Insulin treatment remains a significant but complex aspect of managing type 2 diabetes.
abstract.textZh: 美國有超過2900萬成年人被診斷出患有2型糖尿病，據估計，高達15%的病例需要胰島素治療。 在患有嚴重高血糖症（例如A1C大於10%、血糖300 mg/dL或更高）、高血糖症狀或分解代謝症的患者中，應考慮使用胰島素作為一線治療。 為了在門診環境中優化胰島素的使用，家庭醫生必須考慮開始、滴定和依從性的策略。 首選的起始方案是基礎胰島素，並逐步強化為餐飲或預混合胰島素。 胰島素方案可以每2至3天滴定一次，直到達到血糖目標。 與中效胰島素相比，長效胰島素類似物可改善作用持續時間並降低低血糖風險。 持續的葡萄糖監測可以改善糖尿病控制，並且可以在需要胰島素的患者中考慮。 體重增加、低血糖和胰島素療法的複雜性是糖尿病管理的主要挑戰。 家庭醫生應使用考慮預期壽命、年齡、合併症和低血糖風險的個性化目標。 胰島素治療仍然是管理2型糖尿病的一個重要但複雜的方面。
