articles.title: Recurrent UTI in Women: Diagnosis and Management
articles.authors: Zwahlen D, Ball J, Jackson Q

abstract.text: Recurrent urinary tract infection (UTI) is defined as two or more UTIs within 6 months or three or more within 1 year. The annual recurrence rate of UTI in women is approximately 14% to 25%. Risk factors for recurrent UTI include antimicrobial exposures, more frequent sexual activity, use of spermicidal agents or diaphragms, peri- or postmenopausal status, personal hygiene practices, urinary stasis from incomplete bladder emptying, pelvic organ prolapse, and voiding dysfunction. When women present with recurrent UTI symptoms, urinalysis and urine culture should be obtained. Management guidelines recommend empiric treatment with a first-line antibiotic based on prior culture results, then changing the antibiotic if the new culture shows resistance, or waiting for culture results before selecting an antibiotic. Longer duration of therapy does not reduce the risk of recurrent UTI. Asymptomatic bacteriuria should not be treated, except in patients who are pregnant or undergoing invasive urologic procedures. Prevention of recurrent UTI begins with behavioral modification and hygienic practices. The next step is prescription of antibiotic prophylaxis with shared decision-making. Nonantibiotic methods are also used to prevent recurrent UTI, and evidence of their effectiveness varies. These methods include use of cranberry products, Lactobacillus probiotics, vaginal estrogen, methenamine supplements.
abstract.textZh: 復發性泌尿道感染 (UTI) 定義為 6 個月內發生 2 次或以上泌尿道感染，或 1 年內發生 3 次或以上泌尿道感染。女性泌尿道感染的年復發率約為 14% 至 25%。復發性泌尿道感染的危險因子包括抗菌藥物暴露、更頻繁的性活動、使用殺精劑或隔膜、圍絕經期或停經後狀態、個人衛生習慣、膀胱排空不完全導致的尿瘀、骨盆器官脫垂和排尿功能障礙。當女性出現復發性泌尿道感染症狀時，應進行尿液分析和尿液培養。管理指引建議根據先前的培養結果使用第一線抗生素進行經驗性治療，然後如果新培養物顯示抗藥性則更換抗生素，或等待培養結果再選擇抗生素。較長的治療時間並不能降低復發性泌尿道感染的風險。無症狀菌尿不應接受治療，除非是懷孕或接受侵入性泌尿外科手術的患者。預防復發性泌尿道感染始於行為改變和衛生習慣。下一步是透過共同決策制定抗生素預防處方。非抗生素方法也可用於預防復發性泌尿道感染，其有效性的證據各不相同。這些方法包括使用蔓越莓產品、乳酸菌益生菌、陰道雌激素、烏洛托品補充劑。

articles.titleZh: 女性復發性泌尿道感染：診斷與治療

articles.title: Gambling Disorder: Diagnosis and Treatment
articles.authors: Kaminski DM, Naik H, Weiss DS

abstract.text: Pathologic gambling, also known as gambling disorder, is a behavioral addiction. The prevalence of gambling disorder has increased in recent years as gambling has become more accessible. Gambling disorder is often underdiagnosed and may have disabling effects on patients. Although men are more often affected, the rate of gambling disorder has been increasing in women. Risk factors include comorbid substance use disorder, mental health diagnoses, lower socioeconomic status, and participation in other risky behaviors. The US Preventive Services Task Force has not addressed screening for gambling disorders. In the United Kingdom, the National Institute for Health and Care Excellence has developed a guideline for case-finding based on expert opinion; the guideline suggests asking a direct question, such as "Do you gamble?," to assess patients for gambling disorder. The Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders, 5th ed., text revision criteria should be used to confirm the diagnosis and classify severity. Pharmacologic interventions such as naltrexone or olanzapine may reduce symptom severity in the short-term, although more study is needed. Psychotherapy, including cognitive behavior therapy and motivational interviewing, offers short-term benefits; however, its long-term effectiveness is uncertain. Self-help and family support groups have limited evidence but provide safe places for affected individuals and loved ones to alleviate the stress associated with the financial and emotional consequences of gambling.
abstract.textZh: 病理性賭博，也稱為賭博障礙，是一種行為成癮。近年來，隨著賭博變得越來越容易，賭博障礙的盛行率增加。賭博障礙常常未被充分診斷​​，並可能對患者造成殘疾影響。儘管男性更容易受到賭博障礙的影響，但女性賭博障礙的比例卻在增加。危險因子包括共病物質使用疾患、心理健康診斷、較低的社經地位、參與其他危險行為。美國預防服務工作小組尚未解決賭博障礙篩檢問題。在英國，國家健康與照護卓越研究所根據專家意見制定了病例發現指南；該指南建議直接詢問「你賭博嗎？」等問題來評估患者是否患有賭博障礙。應使用《精神疾病診斷與統計手冊》第五版文字修訂標準來確認診斷並對嚴重程度進行分類。儘管還需要更多研究，但納曲酮或奧氮平等藥物幹預措施可能會在短期內減輕症狀嚴重程度。心理治療，包括認知行為治療和動機式訪談，可以提供短期益處；然而，其長期有效性尚不確定。自助和家庭支持團體的證據有限，但為受影響的個人和親人提供安全的場所，以減輕與賭博造成的經濟和情感後果相關的壓力。

articles.titleZh: 賭博障礙：診斷與治療

articles.title: Pacemaker Therapy: Indications and Recommendations
articles.authors: Lanney H, Hu Y, Karnovsky SC

abstract.text: Pacemakers are implantable cardiac devices used in the treatment of bradycardia and heart failure. They monitor electrical signals in the heart and deliver electrical stimuli to cause contraction in the targeted heart chamber. Permanent pacemaker therapy is recommended in patients with symptomatic bradycardia or asymptomatic infranodal atrioventricular block to improve symptoms and quality of life. Biventricular pacemakers can also be used in cardiac resynchronization therapy, which corrects dyssynchrony between the ventricles. In patients who have symptomatic heart failure with reduced ejection fraction, left bundle branch block, and prolonged QRS duration, cardiac resynchronization therapy improves outcomes, including mortality. Medical procedures such as electrocautery or magnetic resonance imaging may interfere with a patient's pacemaker; family physicians should coordinate with cardiologists to ensure appropriate care for patients in whom these procedures are indicated.
abstract.textZh: 心律調節器是用於治療心搏過緩和心臟衰竭的植入式心臟裝置。它們監測心臟中的電信號並傳遞電刺激以引起目標心室收縮。對於有症狀的心搏過緩或無症狀的結下房室傳導阻滯的患者，建議使用永久性心律調節器治療，以改善症狀和生活品質。雙心室節律器也可用於心臟再同步治療，矯正心室之間的不同步。對於有射血分數降低、左束支傳導阻滯和 QRS 持續時間延長的症狀性心臟衰竭的患者，心臟再同步治療可改善預後，包括死亡率。電燒或磁振造影等醫療程序可能會幹擾患者的心律調節器；家庭醫生應與心臟科醫師協調，確保為需要進行這些手術的患者提供適當的護理。

articles.titleZh: 心律調節器治療：適應症與建議

articles.title: The Importance of Primary Care Subject Matter Experts: Output Quality in Large Language Models Prompt Engineering
articles.authors: Liaw W, Hung Bui Q, Adepoju O, Van Nguyen H

abstract.text: Large language models (LLMs) offer new opportunities to support primary care by generating documentation, summarizing records, answering messages, and providing education. While LLMs show promise, their effectiveness depends on how well their outputs align with real-world clinical needs. This commentary describes one team's development of Primary Care (PC) Navigator, a multimodal artificial intelligence (AI) tool that combines audio and video from clinical encounters with an LLM to generate behavior change plans. Our pilot study showed that prompt design plays a critical role in shaping output quality. Through collaboration between clinicians and engineers, we created more effective prompts and recommend that others use the CARE framework (Context, Action, Result, Example) to ensure the outputs are accurate, relevant, and actionable. Clinician involvement is essential not just for evaluating the LLM's performance, but also for shaping its development. By participating in prompt engineering, clinicians move from passive users to co-developers. Their input ensures that LLMs in primary care are both technically functional and aligned with patient needs, professional values, and the realities of frontline practice.
abstract.textZh: 大語言模型 (LLM) 透過產生文件、總結記錄、回覆訊息和提供教育，為支援初級保健提供了新的機會。雖然法學碩士表現出希望，但其有效性取決於其產出與現實臨床需求的契合程度。這篇評論描述了一個團隊開發的初級保健 (PC) Navigator，這是一種多模式人工智慧 (AI) 工具，它將臨床遇到的音訊和視訊與法學碩士結合起來，以產生行為改變計劃。我們的試點研究表明，即時設計在塑造輸出品質方面發揮關鍵作用。透過臨床醫生和工程師之間的合作，我們創建了更有效的提示，並建議其他人使用 CARE 框架（上下文、行動、結果、範例），以確保輸出準確、相關且可操作。臨床醫師的參與不僅對於評估法學碩士的表現至關重要，而且對於塑造其發展也至關重要。透過參與即時工程，臨床醫生從被動用戶轉變為共同開發者。他們的意見確保初級保健領域的法學碩士既具有技術功能，又符合患者需求、專業價值觀和第一線實踐的現實。

articles.titleZh: 初級保健主題專家的重要性：大型語言模型的輸出品質提示工程

articles.title: Daily Nutrient Intake and Inflammation Among US Adults
articles.authors: Mainous AG, Yin L, Orlando FA, Saguil AA

abstract.label: INTRODUCTION
abstract.text: Systemic inflammation has long been associated with chronic disease and mortality. Dietary interventions have been a proposed mechanism to decrease inflammation. Using high-sensitivity C-reactive protein (hs-CRP) as a marker of inflammation, we investigated whether daily intake of nutrients purported to be anti-inflammatory had an association with current inflammation.
abstract.textZh: 長期以來，全身性發炎一直與慢性疾病和死亡有關。飲食幹預已被提議為減少發炎的機制。我們使用高敏感 C 反應蛋白 (hs-CRP) 作為發炎標記物，研究了每日攝取的抗發炎營養素是否與目前發炎有關。

abstract.label: METHODS
abstract.text: We used the National Health and Nutrition Examination Survey 2021-2023 to conduct a population level analysis of US adults. Individual diets were translated into daily nutrient intakes. hs-CRP was measured in close temporal proximity to dietary assessment. For each nutrient, intake was categorized as low, moderate (includes recommended intake), or high. hs-CRP and dietary nutrient intake were examined with parametric and non-parametric statistics.
abstract.textZh: 我們利用 2021-2023 年國家健康和營養檢查調查對美國成年人進行了人口層面分析。個人飲食被轉化為每日營養攝取量。 hs-CRP 的測量時間與飲食評估非常接近。對於每種營養素，攝取量分為低、中（包括建議攝取量）或高。透過參數和非參數統計檢查 hs-CRP 和膳食營養素攝取量。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: High intake of certain nutrients was significantly associated with lower levels of hs-CRP when compared to low intake of these nutrients (dietary fiber: 2.7 vs. 3.9, p=0.001; folate: 3.3 vs. 4.1, p=0.002; magnesium: 2.8 vs. 4.0, p=0.001; vitamin B6: 3.4 vs. 4.0, p=0.01; vitamin C: 3.4 vs. 4.0, p=0.04; vitamin D: 1.3 vs. 3.8, p=0.03; vitamin K: 3.1 vs. 4.1, p=0.0001). For dietary fiber and magnesium, the significant association was also demonstrated when comparing low to moderate intake. Not all hypothesized nutrients showed significant associations with inflammation.
abstract.textZh: 與低攝取量相比，某些營養素的高攝取量與較低的 hs-CRP 水平顯著相關（膳食纖維：2.7 vs. 3.9，p=0.001；葉酸：3.3 vs. 4.1，p=0.002；鎂：2.8 vs. 4.0，p=0.001； 4.0，p=0.04；維生素 D：1.3 與 3.8，p=0.03；維生素 K：3.1 與 4.1，p=0.0001）。對於膳食纖維和鎂，在比較低攝取量和中等攝取量時也證明了顯著關聯。並非所有假設的營養素都與發炎有顯著相關。

abstract.label: CONCLUSION
abstract.text: Usual dietary intake of dietary fiber and magnesium indicate that they are anti-inflammatory. Folate, and vitamins B6, C, D, and K appear to confer greater anti-inflammatory benefit only above recommended dietary levels. Dietary strategies emphasizing these nutrients may help individuals lower hs-CRP and potentially mitigate inflammation-related health risks.
abstract.textZh: 日常飲食中攝取的膳食纖維和鎂表明它們具有抗發炎作用。葉酸和維生素 B6、C、D 和 K 似乎僅在高於建議的膳食水平時才具有更大的抗炎功效。強調這些營養素的飲食策略可能有助於個體降低 hs-CRP，並有可能減輕與發炎相關的健康風險。

articles.titleZh: 美國成年人的每日營養攝取量和炎症

articles.title: Association of Advanced Access With Primary Care Performance: A Systematic Review
articles.authors: Adadja J, Lafrance S, Gnanvi J, Bergeron F, Boutin A, Breton M, Guertin JR, Berthelot S

abstract.label: PURPOSE
abstract.text: Timely access to primary care remains a major challenge. Advanced access, an organizational model for appointment management, aims to improve accessibility by allowing patients to consult their health care professional in a timely manner. This systematic review evaluated its association with several key dimensions of primary care performance.
abstract.textZh: 及時獲得初級保健仍然是一項重大挑戰。進階存取是一種預約管理的組織模式，旨在透過允許患者及時諮詢其醫療保健專業人員來提高可訪問性。這項系統性回顧評估了其與初級保健績效的幾個關鍵維度的關聯。

abstract.label: METHODS
abstract.text: We conducted a comprehensive search in MEDLINE, Embase, Web of Science, CINAHL, and the Cochrane Library from inception to May 10, 2025. Randomized intervention studies, nonrandomized intervention studies, and observational studies comparing advanced access with traditional scheduling systems among patients in primary care were eligible. Outcomes were the wait time to an appointment, continuity of care, emergency department (ED) use, and patient satisfaction. Two independent reviewers selected studies, extracted data, and assessed risk of bias. We performed a narrative synthesis, separately analyzing universal and non-universal health care systems.
abstract.textZh: 我們在 MEDLINE、Embase、Web of Science、CINAHL 和 Cochrane 圖書館中進行了全面檢索，檢索範圍從開始到 2025 年 5 月 10 日。隨機幹預研究、非隨機幹預研究以及在初級保健患者中比較高級訪問與傳統調度系統的觀察性研究均符合資格。結果包括預約等待時間、護理連續性、急診室 (ED) 使用情況以及患者滿意度。兩位獨立評審員選擇研究、擷取資料並評估偏倚風險。我們進行了敘述綜合，分別分析了全民和非全民健保系統。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: Among 7,595 unique records identified, 29 studies were included. Of these, 23 evaluated appointment wait time, 13 examined continuity of care, 3 assessed ED use, and 13 evaluated patient satisfaction. Appointment wait time decreased in all 23 studies assessing this outcome, with 13 reporting statistically significant reductions. Continuity of care improved in 11 of 13 studies, of which 7 reported statistically significant improvements. All 3 studies evaluating ED use reported reductions in ED visits, although none demonstrated statistical significance. Patient satisfaction improved in 8 studies, with 3 reporting statistically significant improvements. Overall, findings were consistent across universal and non-universal health care systems.
abstract.textZh: 在確定的 7,595 份獨特記錄中，納入了 29 項研究。其中，23 人評估了預約等待時間，13 人檢查了護理的連續性，3 人評估了急診室的使用情況，13 人評估了患者滿意度。在評估此結果的所有 23 項研究中，預約等待時間都減少了，其中 13 項報告報告顯示統計上顯著減少。 13 項研究中有 11 項的護理連續性得到改善，其中 7 項報告顯示統計上顯著的改善。所有 3 項評估急診室使用情況的研究都報告了急診室就診次數的減少，但沒有一項研究顯示出統計學意義。 8 項研究的患者滿意度有所提高，其中 3 項研究報告有統計學上的顯著改善。整體而言，全民和非全民健保系統的研究結果是一致的。

abstract.label: CONCLUSIONS
abstract.text: Advanced access appears to improve appointment timeliness, continuity of care, and patient satisfaction, and may help reduce avoidable ED use across diverse health care systems.
abstract.textZh: 進階訪問似乎可以提高預約及時性、護理連續性和患者滿意度，並可能有助於減少不同醫療保健系統中可避免的急診室使用。

articles.titleZh: 高級訪問與初級保健績效的關聯：系統回顧

articles.title: Death by Rousui in Japan: Rethinking Death, Diagnosis, and Care in an Aging Society
articles.authors: Imanaga T

abstract.text: In Japan, death from old age-rousui-is officially recognized on death certificates and is now the third leading cause of death. Rousui describes a gradual decline in physiological function leading to death without a specific underlying disease. As a family physician, my first diagnosis of rousui occurred two decades ago, for a woman in her 90s whose decline was slow, multidimensional, and free of reversible causes. While culturally accepted, rousui remains undefined in clinical terms, creating uncertainty in diagnosis and care. This ambiguity influences end-of-life decision making, sometimes leading to overmedicalization or undertreatment. As populations age globally, Japan's experience offers valuable lessons on how to recognize, document, and care for those dying from aging itself-inviting a broader discussion on aligning medicine with the natural trajectory of life's end.
abstract.textZh: 在日本，死亡證明上正式承認年老死亡（流水），目前已成為第三大死因。肉碎描述了在沒有特定潛在疾病的情況下，生理功能逐漸衰退導致死亡。作為一名家庭醫生，我第一次診斷出「肉碎」發生在二十年前，當時是一位 90 多歲的女性，她的衰退是緩慢的、多方面的，而且沒有可逆的原因。儘管在文化上已被接受，但肉水在臨床術語中仍未定義，這給診斷和護理帶來了不確定性。這種模糊性會影響臨終決策，有時會導致過度醫療或治療不足。隨著全球人口老化，日本的經驗為如何識別、記錄和照顧因衰老而死亡的人提供了寶貴的經驗教訓，引發了關於如何使醫學與生命終結的自然軌跡保持一致的更廣泛的討論。

articles.titleZh: 日本的露水之死：重新思考老化社會中的死亡、診斷與護理

articles.title: Multicomponent School of Caring Program to Support Caregivers of Patients With Dementia: A Quasi-Experimental Effectiveness Study in Primary Care
articles.authors: Curto-Romeu C, López GM, Espelta EG, Reverté NB, Ferraté MF, Borràs CM, Gonçalves AQ, Del Mar Lleixà Fortuño M, et al.

abstract.label: PURPOSE
abstract.text: We aimed to evaluate the multicomponent School of Caring program supporting caregivers of patients with dementia with respect to caregiver burden, quality of life, emotional well-being, self-efficacy, and social support.
abstract.textZh: 我們的目的是評估支持癡呆症患者照護者的多組成部分的護理學校計劃，包括護理人員負擔、生活品質、情緒健康、自我效能和社會支持。

abstract.label: METHODS
abstract.text: We conducted a quasi-experimental pre-/postintervention study with a 6-month follow-up conducted in primary care in Spain. Participants were caregivers of dependent people with dementia. Sociodemographic characteristics and information regarding care tasks were collected using an ad hoc questionnaire. We evaluated the program's effectiveness using the Zarit Burden Interview, EuroQol 5 dimensions 3 levels scale, General Self-Efficacy Scale, Warwik-Edinburgh Mental Wellbeing Scale, and Oslo Social Support Scale, validated questionnaires to assess caregiver burden, quality of life, self-efficacy, emotional well-being, and social support. The analysis compared the results of the outcomes at 3 time points (baseline, postintervention, and follow-up). We used multivariate regression to identify characteristics related to improvements produced by the program.
abstract.textZh: 我們在西班牙的初級保健機構進行了一項準實驗性幹預前/幹預後研究，並進行了 6 個月的追蹤。參與者是患有失智症的受扶養人的照顧者。使用臨時問卷收集社會人口特徵和有關護理任務的資訊。我們使用 Zarit Burden 訪談、EuroQol 5 維度 3 級別量表、一般自我效能量表、Warwik-Edinburgh 心理健康量表和奧斯陸社會支持量表以及經過驗證的問卷來評估護理人員負擔、生活品質、自我效能、情緒健康和社會支持，從而評估了該計劃的有效性。該分析比較了 3 個時間點（基線、幹預後和隨訪）的結果。我們使用多元迴歸來識別與程序產生的改進相關的特徵。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: The School of Caring program was delivered to 8 groups, comprising 14-19 participants/group, from 2019 to 2023. A total of 132 caregivers completed the program and were evaluated pre-/postintervention, 33 (25%) of whom were lost to follow-up. The program produced significant improvements in all outcomes, which was maintained up to 6 months postintervention. At this stage, inexperienced caregivers showed the greatest improvement compared with former caregivers relative to burden levels. Overall, the amount of time dedicated to caregiving each day and experiencing a health issue were the elements that most significantly affected caregiver burden and quality of life.
abstract.textZh: 從 2019 年到 2023 年，護理學院計畫分為 8 個小組，每組 14-19 名參與者。共有 132 名護理人員完成了該項目，並在幹預前/幹預後接受了評估，其中 33 人（25%）失訪。該計劃的所有結果均得到了顯著改善，並且在幹預後持續了 6 個月。在這個階段，與以前的護理人員相比，缺乏經驗的護理人員在負擔水平方面表現出最大的改善。總體而言，每天用於護理的時間和經歷健康問題是對護理人員負擔和生活品質影響最大的因素。

abstract.label: CONCLUSIONS
abstract.text: The School of Caring program produced notable improvements in the burden and well-being of informal caregivers of dependent people with dementia. The findings provide evidence of the effectiveness of group-based, community primary care programs that support caregivers of people with high care demands such as dependent people with dementia.
abstract.textZh: 關懷學校計畫顯著改善了失智症受扶養人的非正式照顧者的負擔和福祉。研究結果證明了基於團體的社區初級保健計劃的有效性，這些計劃支持高照顧需求人群（例如患有失智症的受扶養人）的照顧者。

articles.titleZh: 支持癡呆症患者護理人員的多組成部分護理學院計劃：初級護理的準實驗有效性研究

articles.title: Addressing Primary Care Needs of Cancer Survivors: The Primary Care Engaged Research for Cancer Survivorship Care (PERCS) Initiative
articles.authors: Mollica MA, O'Malley DM, Balasubramanian BA, Ferrante JM, Greiner A, Hudson SV, Klemp J, Lawrence J, et al.

abstract.text: Primary care clinicians are ideally suited to provide comprehensive, whole-person survivorship care for cancer survivors that focuses on managing co-occurring chronic conditions and mitigating risks related to the cancer and long-term effects of the disease and its treatment. It is therefore critical to develop and test innovative strategies to support primary care practices in delivering high-quality survivorship care. The National Cancer Institute-funded Primary Care Engaged Research for Cancer Survivorship Care (PERCS) initiative encompasses 4 randomized controlled trials funded by cooperative agreement (U01) grants that aim to develop and test primary care practice- and health system-level interventions to promote comprehensive survivorship care for adult cancer survivors during and/or after cancer treatment. Here, we outline the overall goals of the PERCS initiative, describe key features of each study, and explore opportunities for leveraging synergies and collaboration with the overall goal of improving care and outcomes for all survivors.
abstract.textZh: 初級保健臨床醫生非常適合為癌症倖存者提供全面的、全人的生存護理，重點是管理併發的慢性病並減輕與癌症相關的風險以及疾病及其治療的長期影響。因此，制定和測試創新策略來支持初級保健實踐以提供高品質的倖存者護理至關重要。美國國家癌症研究所資助的癌症生存護理初級保健參與研究 (PERCS) 計劃包括 4 項由合作協議 (U01) 資助的隨機對照試驗，旨在開發和測試初級保健實踐和衛生系統層面的干預措施，以促進癌症治療期間和/或治療後成年癌症倖存者的全面生存護理。在這裡，我們概述了 PERCS 計劃的總體目標，描述了每項研究的主要特徵，並探索利用協同效應和合作的機會，以實現改善所有倖存者的護理和結果的總體目標。

articles.titleZh: 滿足癌症倖存者的初級保健需求：癌症倖存者護理初級保健研究 (PERCS) 計劃

articles.title: Prayer for Pain and Anxiety in a Primary Care Setting: A Randomized Controlled Trial
articles.authors: Jacobson K, Zipp J, Jones B, Case-Cook B, Schrieber M, Brown CG, Brown JW

abstract.label: PURPOSE
abstract.text: Studies of distant intercessory prayer as complementary medicine yield mixed results. We investigated commonly utilized proximal intercessory prayer (PIP) practices (ie, in-person prayer for another) used to treat pain and anxiety.
abstract.textZh: 將遠距代禱作為補充醫學的研究產生了不同的結果。我們調查了常用來治療疼痛和焦慮的近端代禱（PIP）做法（即親自為他人祈禱）。

abstract.label: METHODS
abstract.text: We recruited 180 participants from patients waiting for family medicine appointments. Enrollment for pain required scores of 4 or greater (in the past 7 days) on an 11 point (0 to 10) pain intensity numerical rating scale. Enrollment for anxiety required a score of 10 or greater on the Generalized Anxiety Disorder 7-item (GAD-7) scale, regardless of diagnoses. After their appointments, participants received 5 minutes of either Christian PIP (90 individuals) from a trained volunteer prayer practitioner or music (control, 90 individuals). Questionnaires reassessed pain or anxiety immediately, and 2 and 6 weeks later.
abstract.textZh: 我們從等待家庭醫學預約的患者中招募了 180 名參與者。疼痛登記需要在 11 分（0 到 10）的疼痛強度數字評級量表上得分達到 4 分或更高（過去 7 天）。無論診斷如何，焦慮症入組都需要在廣泛性焦慮症 7 項 (GAD-7) 量表上獲得 10 分或更高的分數。預約結束後，參與者接受了由訓練有素的志願者祈禱者提供的 5 分鐘的基督教 PIP（90 人）或音樂（對照，90 人）。問卷立即、2 週和 6 週後重新評估疼痛或焦慮。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: Proximal intercessory prayer vs control group participants reported significantly larger (1 to 2 point) reductions in pain immediately and 2 weeks later, and larger (roughly 2 point) reductions in Likert anxiety immediately and GAD-7 at 2 and 6 weeks. Participants in both groups were well-matched, and predominantly Black, female, low-income, and Christian. Outcomes did not vary significantly by most demographic, baseline symptom, religious affiliation, healing prayer belief, or religious intensity measures. The main exception was that Black participants reported larger symptom reductions for pain and anxiety. Participants reported no adverse events. Most participants reported wanting future PIP opportunities along with medical visits.
abstract.textZh: 與對照組參與者相比，近端代禱祈禱組參與者報告疼痛立即和 2 週後顯著更大（1 至 2 點）減輕，並且 Likert 焦慮立即更大（約 2 點）減輕，第 2 週和 6 週時 GAD-7 減輕更大（約 2 點）。兩組參與者都很匹配，主要是黑人、女性、低收入和基督徒。大多數人口統計、基線症狀、宗教信仰、治癒祈禱信仰或宗教強度指標的結果並沒有顯著差異。主要的例外是黑人參與者報告疼痛和焦慮症狀減輕幅度更大。參與者報告沒有不良事件。大多數參與者表示希望未來獲得 PIP 機會以及就診機會。

abstract.label: CONCLUSION
abstract.text: Proximal intercessory prayer was safe, effective, and well-received as complementary treatment for pain and anxiety. Further studies are warranted. Proximal intercessory prayer may be a low-cost, non-pharmacologic, effective adjunct to standard care with particular relevance for underserved populations.
abstract.textZh: 近端代禱是安全、有效的，並且作為疼痛和焦慮的補充治療方法廣受歡迎。進一步的研究是有必要的。近端代禱可能是一種低成本、非藥物的、有效的標準照護輔助手段，特別適用於服務不足的人。

articles.titleZh: 為初級保健機構中的疼痛和焦慮祈禱：一項隨機對照試驗

articles.title: Equity Evaluation of an Intervention to Increase Colorectal Cancer Screening at Federally Qualified Health Centers
articles.authors: Ganguly AP, O'Leary MC, Stradtman LR, Tan X, Brenner AT, Reuland DS

abstract.text: Racially and ethnically minoritized patients are underscreened for colorectal cancer (CRC), resulting in racial/ethnic disparities. This secondary analysis of a pragmatic patient-randomized clinical trial compared effects of a CRC intervention across race/ethnicity. The multicomponent intervention included a mailed fecal immunochemical test (FIT) for patients in Federally Qualified Health Centers due for screening, plus patient navigation for positive FITs. Among 3,734 patients, 9.7% identified as Hispanic, 29.0% as non-Hispanic Black, and 61.3% as non-Hispanic White, similar across intervention and control arms (P = .73). The adjusted risk difference (RD) for CRC screening uptake between arms was 18.3% (95% CI, 15.6%-20.9%). In stratified analysis, adjusted RDs were 16.7% (95% CI, 7.5%-25.9%) for Hispanic patients, 13.9% (95% CI, 8.6%-19.0%) for non-Hispanic Black patients, and 20.7% (95% CI, 17.2%-24.1%) for non-Hispanic White patients, which did not differ significantly (interaction P = .79). Because the intervention effect did not differ by race/ethnicity, broad implementation among minoritized populations could improve CRC screening disparities.
abstract.textZh: 種族和民族少數患者的結直腸癌 (CRC) 篩檢不足，導致種族/民族差異。這項實用的病患隨機臨床試驗的二次分析比較了跨種族/民族的 CRC 介入效果。多成分介入包括對聯邦合格健康中心需要篩檢的患者進行郵寄糞便免疫化學檢測 (FIT)，以及患者導航以獲取 FIT 陽性結果。在 3,734 名患者中，9.7% 為西班牙裔，29.0% 為非西班牙裔黑人，61.3% 為非西班牙裔白人，幹預組和對照組的情況相似 (P = .73)。各組間 CRC 篩檢率的調整後風險差異 (RD) 為 18.3%（95% CI，15.6%-20.9%）。在分層分析中，西班牙裔患者的調整後RD為16.7％（95％CI，7.5％-25.9％），非西班牙裔黑人患者為13.9％（95％CI，8.6％-19.0％），非西班牙裔白人患者為20.7％（95％CI，17.2％-24.1%)，兩者之間沒有顯著性差異（9.1%）。由於幹預效果不因種族/民族而異，因此在少數群體中廣泛實施可以改善大腸癌篩檢差異。

articles.titleZh: 聯邦合格健康中心增加大腸直腸癌篩檢幹預措施的公平性評估

articles.title: Older Black and Hispanic Patient Perceptions of Medicare Annual Wellness Visits: A Qualitative Study
articles.authors: Brown T, Nadeem T, Salazar C, Linder JA, Kricke G, Liss DT

abstract.label: PURPOSE
abstract.text: Medicare Annual Wellness Visits (AWVs) offer many potential benefits to older adults, but patients in racial and ethnic minority groups have lower rates of AWV completion. Our objective was to understand older minority patients' attitudes and preferences related to preventive care and AWVs.
abstract.textZh: 醫療保險年度健康就診 (AWV) 為老年人提供了許多潛在的好處，但少數種族和族裔群體的患者 AWV 完成率較低。我們的目標是了解老年少數族裔患者對預防性照護和 AWV 的態度和偏好。

abstract.label: METHODS
abstract.text: From June 2024 through October 2024, we conducted 4 focus groups at 2 urban primary care settings (ie, an academic health system and a Federally Qualified Health Center) among Medicare enrollees aged 66 years or more with 1 or more primary care encounter at a participating organization during the prior year. We recruited patients with Black race or Hispanic ethnicity documented in the electronic health record. Domains of interest were communication preferences, attitudes about preventive care and AWVs, and barriers to care. Focus groups were audio recorded, and transcripts were coded into key themes using a template analysis approach.
abstract.textZh: 從 2024 年 6 月到 2024 年 10 月，我們在 2 個城市初級保健機構（即學術醫療系統和聯邦合格健康中心）開展了 4 個焦點小組活動，對像是 66 歲或以上的 Medicare 參保者，這些參保者在上一年曾在參與組織接受過 1 次或多次初級保健。我們招募了電子健康記錄中記錄的黑人或西班牙裔患者。感興趣的領域是溝通偏好、對預防性護理和 AWV 的態度以及護理障礙。焦點小組被錄音，文字記錄被使用模板分析方法編碼為關鍵主題。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: There were 45 participants, who had a mean age of 71 years (SD = 4); most were female and identified as Black. Participants reported various forms of preferred communication, including patient portal, phone calls, and mailed letters. Five themes emerged: (1) the value participants placed on their health and preventive care; (2) the value placed on relationships with trusted primary care physicians; (3) barriers to scheduling and attending medical visits; (4) confusion or uncertainty about terminology describing preventive visits in office- and home-based settings, and; (5) lack of trust due to historical discrimination.
abstract.textZh: 共有 45 名參與者，平均年齡為 71 歲（SD = 4）；大多數是女性，被認為是黑人。參與者報告了各種首選的溝通方式，包括患者入口網站、電話和郵寄信件。出現了五​​個主題：（1）參與者對其健康和預防保健的重視； (2) 重視與值得信賴的初級保健醫生的關係； (3) 安排和參加就診的障礙； (4) 對描述辦公室和家庭環境中預防性訪視的術語感到困惑或不確定； (5) 由於歷史歧視而缺乏信任。

abstract.label: CONCLUSIONS
abstract.text: Interventions to increase Medicare AWV uptake in Black and Hispanic patients must address and overcome barriers such as those identified in this study.
abstract.textZh: 提高黑人和西班牙裔患者醫療保險 AWV 吸收率的干預措施必須解決並克服本研究中發現的障礙。

articles.titleZh: 老年黑人和西班牙裔患者對醫療保險年度健康就診的看法：定性研究

articles.title: More Indirect Patient Care Activities per Visit: 11-Year Analysis of Family Physician Electronic Health Records in Canada
articles.authors: Gallant F, Grandy M, Correia RH, Palmer E, Tracey J, Sabri S, Easley J, Hedden L, et al.

abstract.label: PURPOSE
abstract.text: Understanding and addressing increased administrative workload among family physicians is receiving attention, but data describing administrative tasks are limited. We used electronic health record (EHR) data to describe trends in orders made by family physicians, capturing changes in total workload per physician and the volume of per-patient contact over time.
abstract.textZh: 了解和解決家庭醫生行政工作量增加的問題正在受到關注，但描述行政任務的數據有限。我們使用電子健康記錄 (EHR) 數據來描述家庭醫生的訂單趨勢，捕捉每個醫生的總工作量和每個患者的接觸量隨時間的變化。

abstract.label: METHODS
abstract.text: We used national Canadian Primary Care Sentinel Surveillance Network EHR data to measure annual counts of patient contacts, laboratory tests, referrals made, and prescriptions per physician from 2011 to 2021. We evaluated trends in the annual rates of these orders per patient contact by fitting multivariable Poisson regression within a generalized estimating equation framework.
abstract.textZh: 我們使用加拿大國家初級保健哨點監測網路 EHR 數據來​​衡量 2011 年至 2021 年間患者接觸量、實驗室檢測、轉診和每位醫生處方的年度計數。我們透過在廣義估計方程式框架內擬合多變量泊松回歸來評估每次患者接觸的這些訂單的年率趨勢。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: Family physicians reporting EHR data saw more unique patients, had more total contacts, and had more days with patient contact in 2021 than 2011. In 2021, the average numbers of laboratory tests, referrals, and prescriptions per physician were greater than in 2011 (68.5%, 80.2%, and 43.1% increases, respectively). Rates of referrals and laboratory tests increased by 57% (incident rate ratio [IRR]2021; 95% CI = 1.57; 1.36-1.80) and 29% (IRR2021; 95% CI = 1.29; 1.18-1.41), respectively. The number of prescriptions per patient contact remained constant (IRR2021; 95% CI = 0.96; 0.90-1.03).
abstract.textZh: 與 2011 年相比，2021 年報告 EHR 數據的家庭醫生看到了更多的獨特患者、接觸的總次數以及與患者接觸的天數。 2021 年，每位醫師的平均實驗室檢查、轉診和處方數量均高於 2011 年（分別增加了 68.5%、80.2% 和 43.1%）。轉診率和實驗室檢測率分別增加了 57%（發生率 [IRR]2021；95% CI = 1.57；1.36-1.80）和 29%（IRR2021；95% CI = 1.29；1.18-1.41）。每次接觸患者的處方數量保持不變（IRR2021；95% CI = 0.96；0.90-1.03）。

abstract.label: CONCLUSIONS
abstract.text: Our results suggest a significant increase in family physician administrative workload per patient contact over a period of 11 years. Whereas further research is needed to better understand drivers of increased referrals and laboratory tests, strategies to streamline administrative tasks in primary care could help inform the development of effective policy.
abstract.textZh: 我們的結果表明，11 年來，家庭醫生每次接觸患者的管理工作量顯著增加。儘管需要進一步研究來更好地了解轉診和實驗室檢測增加的驅動因素，但簡化初級保健行政任務的策略可以幫助制定有效的政策。

articles.titleZh: 每次就診更多的間接病患照護活動：加拿大家庭醫師電子健康紀錄的 11 年分析

articles.title: Fall-Related Emergency Department Visits Among Adults With and Without Intellectual and Developmental Disabilities or Cerebral Palsy
articles.authors: Cantet N, Benevides TW, Meade MA, Jehu DA, McKee MM, Miller HL

abstract.text: Although older adults (>65 years of age) are considered the highest-risk population for fall-related injuries, adults with intellectual and/or developmental disability (IDD) or cerebral palsy (CP) are also at increased fall risk. We aimed to compare the incidence of fall-related emergency department (ED) visits with injury and age-related trends among adults aged 18-80 years with IDD or CP and a non-IDD/CP comparison group using the 2019 Healthcare Cost and Utilization Project State Emergency Department Databases. Fall-related ED visits with injury represented a greater proportion of ED visits among adults with IDD or CP compared with adults without. Among adults aged 62-65 years with no IDD/CP, 7.3% of ED visits were for falls with injury. Similar incidences of fall with injury were found at earlier ages among adults with IDD (aged 42-45 years) or CP (aged 34-41 years). Clinicians should consider screening for fall risk at younger ages among patients with IDD or CP.
abstract.textZh: 儘管老年人（>65 歲）被認為是跌倒相關傷害的最高風險族群，但患有智力和/或發展障礙 (IDD) 或腦性麻痺 (CP) 的成年人跌倒風險也較高。我們的目的是使用 2019 年醫療保健成本和利用計畫州急診資料庫，比較 18-80 歲 IDD 或 CP 成年人與非 IDD/CP 對照組中跌倒相關急診科 (ED) 就診的發生率、傷害和年齡相關趨勢。與沒有受傷的成年人相比，患有 IDD 或 CP 的成年人因跌倒而受傷就診的比例更高。在 62-65 歲無 IDD/CP 的成年人中，7.3% 的急診就診是因跌倒受傷。在患有 IDD（42-45 歲）或 CP（34-41 歲）的成年人中，較早年齡的人也有類似的跌倒受傷發生率。臨床醫生應考慮在 IDD 或 CP 患者中篩檢較年輕的跌倒風險。

articles.titleZh: 有或沒有智力和發育障礙或腦性麻痺的成年人與跌倒相關的急診就診

articles.title: Diagnostic Performance of General Practitioners in Carotid Plaque Detection Using AI-Enhanced Point-of-Care Ultrasound After Systematic Training
articles.authors: Liu X, Yao S, Yang H, Pan Z

abstract.label: PURPOSE
abstract.text: While point-of-care ultrasound (POCUS) has been integrated into daily practice by general practitioners (GPs) in some countries, there is a paucity of literature documenting its use by Chinese GPs. Additionally, artificial intelligence (AI)-assisted diagnosis is increasingly applied to imaging equipment. This study aims to explore the diagnostic performance of GPs in carotid plaque detection using AI-enhanced POCUS after systematic training.
abstract.textZh: 儘管一些國家的全科醫生 (GP) 已將護理點超音波 (POCUS) 融入日常實踐中，但記錄中國全科醫生使用該技術的文獻卻很少。此外，人工智慧（AI）輔助診斷越來越多地應用於影像設備。本研究旨在探討經過系統訓練後，GP使用AI增強的POCUS進行頸動脈斑塊檢測的診斷效能。

abstract.label: METHODS
abstract.text: This diagnostic accuracy trial was conducted in Shanghai, where 7 GPs received systematic training then recruited patients with high atherosclerotic cardiovascular disease risk during outpatient visits for free carotid plaque screening. We comprehensively evaluated their diagnostic performance using 2 approaches: per-patient (ie, assessed whether patients had any carotid plaque) and per-vessel (ie, determined plaque presence in any carotid vessel). Evaluation metrics included sensitivity, specificity, positive predictive value (PPV), negative predictive value (NPV), and the κ statistic for agreement.
abstract.textZh: 這項診斷準確性試驗在上海進行，7名全科醫生接受了系統培訓，然後在門診招募動脈粥樣硬化性心血管疾病高風險患者進行免費頸動脈斑塊篩檢。我們使用兩種方法全面評估了他們的診斷效能：每位患者（即評估患者是否有頸動脈斑塊）和每個血管（即確定任何頸動脈血管中是否存在斑塊）。評估指標包括敏感度、特異度、陽性預測值 (PPV)、陰性預測值 (NPV) 和一致性 κ 統計量。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: A total of 169 patients (mean age 69.6 years [SD 5.76]; 37.9% male) were included in this study. At the per-patient level, sensitivity was 0.87 (95% CI, 0.80-0.95); specificity was 0.91 (95% CI, 0.86-0.97); PPV was 0.89 (95% CI, 0.82-0.96); NPV was 0.89 (95% CI, 0.83-0.96); and the κ value was 0.78 (95% CI, 0.69-0.88), indicating high agreement with the gold standard. The diagnostic performance evaluated at the per-vessel level was comparable to that at the per-patient level.
abstract.textZh: 本研究共納入 169 位患者（平均年齡 69.6 歲 [SD 5.76]；37.9% 為男性）。在每位患者層級上，敏感性為 0.87（95% CI，0.80-0.95）；特異性為 0.91（95% CI，0.86-0.97）； PPV 為 0.89（95% CI，0.82-0.96）；NPV 為 0.89（95% CI，0.82-0.96）；NPV 為 0.89（95% CI，0.95% CI κ值為0.78（95% CI，0.69-0.88），與金標準高度吻合。每個血管水平評估的診斷性能與每個患者層級評估的診斷性能相當。

abstract.label: CONCLUSION
abstract.text: Our findings indicate that, after systematic training, GPs can effectively perform carotid plaque screening using AI-enhanced POCUS within a clinical workflow in high-risk elderly populations.
abstract.textZh: 我們的研究結果表明，經過系統培訓後，全科醫生可以在高風險老年人群的臨床工作流程中使用人工智慧增強的 POCUS 有效地進行頸動脈斑塊篩檢。

articles.titleZh: 全科醫生經過系統訓練後使用人工智慧增強床邊超音波進行頸動脈斑塊檢測的診斷表現

articles.title: Where We Learn to Doctor: Rural Practice as Essential Medical Education
articles.authors: Jegen D

abstract.text: Rural medicine is often viewed as a professional compromise, yet it offers some of the most formative clinical training available. It teaches physicians to thrive in discomfort-whether the discomfort is limited medical resources, broad responsibility, geographic isolation, or patients' economic barriers. That discomfort is what shapes physicians into more resilient, resourceful, and empathetic clinicians. Experiences across rural and remote regions demonstrate how limited access to technology and subspecialists sharpens diagnostic reasoning, strengthens reliance on physical examination, and demands confident judgment, while delayed transfers and scarce support systems heighten responsibility and interdisciplinary collaboration. Rural physicians also confront the daily impact of social determinants of health, serving not only as clinicians but as public health advocates within vulnerable communities. These challenges reveal discomfort as a powerful teacher, fostering adaptability, leadership, and perspective. Intentionally seeking rural training is therefore not a detour but a formative pathway that equips physicians with the skills necessary to practice effectively in any setting.
abstract.textZh: 農村醫學通常被視為一種專業妥協，但它提供了一些最具影響力的臨床培訓。它教導醫生在不適中茁壯成長——無論這種不適是醫療資源有限、責任廣泛、地理隔離還是患者的經濟障礙。這種不適感使醫生成為更有彈性、更足智多謀、更有同理心的臨床醫生。農村和偏遠地區的經驗表明，獲得技術和專科醫生的機會有限，如何加強診斷推理，加強對體檢的依賴，並要求自信的判斷，而延遲的轉移和稀缺的支持系統則加強了責任和跨學科合作。農村醫生也面臨健康問題社會決定因素的日常影響，他們不僅充當臨床醫生，而且充當弱勢社區的公共衛生倡導者。這些挑戰揭示了作為一名強大的教師的不適感，培養了適應能力、領導力和視角。因此，有意識地尋求農村培訓不是一條彎路，而是一條形成途徑，使醫生具備在任何環境下有效執業所需的技能。

articles.titleZh: 我們在哪裡學習醫生：農村實踐作為基本醫學教育

articles.title: Underuse of Pharmacologic Therapies for Myalgic Encephalomyelitis/Chronic Fatigue Syndrome Before Specialist Evaluation
articles.authors: Grach SL, Seltzer J, Mueller MR, Aakre CA, Natividad LT, Lawson DK, Ganesh R, Hurt RT

abstract.label: PURPOSE
abstract.text: Myalgic encephalomyelitis/chronic fatigue syndrome (ME/CFS) is a multisystem neurologic disease characterized by profound fatigue and decreased functional capacity, postexertional malaise, and unrefreshing sleep, along with cognitive impairment and/or orthostatic intolerance. Its prevalence has risen exponentially with the COVID-19 pandemic. Pharmacologic therapies have been used successfully by ME/CFS specialists but may be underused by the general medical field.
abstract.textZh: 肌痛性腦脊髓炎/慢性疲勞症候群（ME/CFS）是一種多系統神經系統疾病，其特徵是嚴重疲勞和功能能力下降、勞累後不適、睡眠不清爽，以及認知障礙和/或體位不耐受。隨著 COVID-19 大流行，其盛行率呈指數級上升。藥物療法已被 ME/CFS 專家成功使用，但在一般醫學領域可能未被充分利用。

abstract.label: METHODS
abstract.text: To assess this potential practice gap, we retrospectively analyzed the records of 571 patients with an ME/CFS diagnosis referred to our ME/CFS specialty clinic in Minnesota during 2018-2022. We ascertained medications that had already been tried at the time of consultation and also ascertained supplement use.
abstract.textZh: 為了評估這一潛在的實踐差距，我們回顧性分析了 2018 年至 2022 年期間轉診至明尼蘇達州 ME/CFS 專科診所的 571 名 ME/CFS 診斷患者的記錄。我們確定了在諮詢時已經嘗試過的藥物，並確定了補充劑的使用。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: With the exception of medications primarily used for pain and anxiety, use of pharmacotherapy for ME/CFS symptom management as proposed by specialists was limited. Overall, 68.3% of patients had had at least 1 medication potentially prescribed for ME/CFS; the most common were serotonin-norepinephrine reuptake inhibitors, gabapentin, and tricyclic antidepressants. A slightly larger share of patients, 72.2%, reported having taken at least 1 dietary supplement; the most common were vitamin D, vitamin B12 and B complex, and fish oil.
abstract.textZh: 除了主要用於治療疼痛和焦慮的藥物外，專家建議的用於 ME/CFS 症狀管理的藥物療法的使用是有限的。整體而言，68.3% 的患者至少服用過 1 種可能用於治療 ME/CFS 的藥物；最常見的是血清素-正腎上腺素再攝取抑制劑、加巴噴丁和三環抗憂鬱劑。略高的患者比例（72.2%）表示服用了至少一種膳食補充劑；最常見的是維生素 D、維生素 B12 和維生素 B 複合物以及魚油。

abstract.label: CONCLUSIONS
abstract.text: Our findings suggest that potentially helpful medications for ME/CFS are being underprescribed in the general medical field and that patients may resort to supplements to manage symptoms. Better education of clinicians about available treatment options and treatment guides may improve management of this debilitating disease.
abstract.textZh: 我們的研究結果表明，在普通醫學領域，對 ME/CFS 可能有用的藥物處方不足，患者可能會求助於補充劑來控制症狀。對臨床醫生進行更好的關於可用治療方案和治療指南的教育可能會改善這種使人衰弱的疾病的管理。

articles.titleZh: 在專家評估之前，肌痛性腦脊髓炎/慢性疲勞症候群的藥物治療使用不足
